### Part 041

- This main dish looks rather cute. With Kiminami Anna's help, this dish was made with the tastes of provisional head priestess Neko in mind. Although it does not quite match the flavor that Hibiki used to produce, Lady Neko seems rather pleased with your work nonetheless. Due to the lack of spices, humans might find this dish a tad on the plain side. ｜ 外形可爱的主食。在木南杏奈的帮助下，按照「代宫司寝子」的口味制作而成，虽然无法还原当初「阿响」做出的味道，但是寝子大人似乎很满意的样子。由于没有加入调味料，对人类来说会有些寡淡。

- By the time a detective is facing a criminal, they have in some sense already failed. Whatever you might do to establish the truth and identify the culprit, you'll never be able to undo the damage caused by the crime. That's why I want my reputation to spread. I want to be a famous detective that makes would-be criminals quake in their boots and quit while they're ahead! In other words, I want to nip crime in the bud. Well, now that you've heard my spiel, why don't you lend me a hand? ｜ 面对犯罪的时候，侦探已经失败了。无论怎样还原真相，找出真正的犯人，都无法挽回事件发生造成的损失。所以，我才会想要扩大自己的名声，成为能让坏人想想就感到害怕的名侦探！也就是，扼杀犯罪在摇篮之中。好了，既然把这一点都告诉你了，就快来一起帮我的忙吧。

- A strange "substance" obtained from fighting against the All-Devouring Narwhal. Its actual weight far exceeds what would be expected given its size.\nEverything gathers around heavy objects, just as gold attracts more than iron, or the ground more than in the breeze blowing above. Just as light cannot escape from the vortex of darkness, cause and effect is attached to fate, perhaps irreversibly so. ｜ 从吞星之鲸的战斗中取得的奇异「物质」，实际质量远比从尺寸看上去的重。\n一切都聚集在命定沉重的事物旁，正如黄金比之黑铁、大地比之轻风。正如光线无法从黑暗的涡眼当中逃脱，因缘也会汇聚在沉重的命运上，或许这也是不可逆转的规则吧。

- Help Needed:\nYou see all sorts of strange things every day when you're observing ocean life. Could the Corps of Thirty muster up some able hands to settle this? ｜ 求助：\n每天观察海洋生物的时候总能看见些奇奇怪怪的东西，上次是有人在海面附近溺水，这次是一帮<color=#3399CC>镀金旅团</color>。\n看他们的样子像是把<color=#3399CC>降诸魔山</color>当成赃物藏匿点了，希望「三十人团」能尽快调集人手处理。

- In ancient times, the human warriors who walked with Pari would hold a ritual of purification for the Pari scattered in the desert, so as to bring them back to the Vourukasha Oasis. ｜ 在古时，与花灵同行的人类勇士，会为流散在沙漠中的花灵举行净罪的仪式，将她们带回花海。
- A beautifully crafted and expensive sealed jar, adorned with special graffiti designs commonly found in the realms of the Masters of the Night-Wind. These graffiti patterns are said to be a form of Phlogiston Engraving inscription, believed to have the power to extend the freshness of the jar's contents. As a result, such jars are often used to store precious medicines and pigments. ｜ 样式精美、价格不菲的密封罐，其上绘有特殊的涂鸦彩绘，多见于「烟谜主」内。据说，这种罐上的涂鸦彩绘是燃素刻录图案的一种，有着可以延长内容物保质时间的神奇功能。因此，人们多用这种罐子来存放珍贵的药品和颜料。
- Gameplay Tutorial ｜ 玩法教学
- Help me go and look for clues. Please! ｜ 你快点去调查新线索吧，拜托了！

- ...Sorry, that probably sounds a bit naive. But I really believe that we, the people of Natlan, will be reunited in the Night Kingdom after our passing. ｜ …抱歉，听上去有些幼稚吧？但我是真的相信逝去的纳塔人可以在夜神之国重新相会。

Of course, its high price tag is also quite daunting for anyone who wishes to get their hands on it.\nDue to the magnificent, well-preserved, and peerless patterns on its surface, it has become a rare collector's item and is often displayed prominently in the shop as a key piece of decor... ｜ 可见于须弥城中珠宝店的巨大餐盘。虽说名义上是餐盘，但考虑到它「放下一整只烤蕈猪和五人份的鱼卷都还绰绰有余」的尺寸，以及难以找到匹配的桌子的特点，似乎并不太实用？当然，它高昂的价格也令人望而却步。\n得益于精美、完整且毫无瑕疵的花纹，它成为了少见的收藏品，常被当成重要装饰品，摆放在店铺的醒目位置…

I like to join in when I'm around, too... with the saurians, I mean. ｜ 别看伊法经常教训病号，他和龙们的关系其实很好。闲下来他会在诊所门口弹吉他，让围上来的龙一个一个跟着唱。\n但其实就是呜呜叫啦。我如果碰到了也会加入。我是说加入龙。

Moreover, it possesses extremely strong defensive abilities.\nOther than using <color=#FFE14BFF>Elemental Reactions</color> to destroy the Xenomare Pearl, you can also destroy the four Resonant Coral Orbs that revolve around its body that the Enraged Millennial Pearl Seahorse creates while guiding Fontemer Hoarthunder to deal effective DMG to said Pearl. ｜ 君临于一切原海异种之上的海马孤王，拥有更为强大的<color=#FFE14BFF>异海珍珠</color>，使其能够进行更多变且猛烈的元素攻击，且具有极强的防御能力。\n除了利用<color=#FFE14BFF>元素反应</color>破坏异海珍珠，破坏「千年珍珠骏麟·升怒」在空中引导「原海古雷」时召唤的四枚围绕其自身旋转的共鸣珊瑚珠，也能对异海珍珠有效造成损害。

- I've got other things to do right now... ｜ 暂时有别的事…
- Alright, I've decided. I'm heading to this festival. Maybe immersing myself in the music there might give me some new ideas. ｜ 我决定了，我一定要去你们说的这个庆典，沉浸在音乐里，说不定能开发出什么新的创意美食。
- Okay, leave it here then. Sometime playing the waiting game is part of the mixing process. ｜ 那么就放在这吧，调酒偶尔也要耐心等待。

- "Fang of Watatsumi" ｜ 「海祇之牙」
- Hehe, yep I'll be right there. I hope you're ready to lose today! ｜ 好，等着吧，今天我一定会赢的。

- I'm a Gestionnaire, and I'm new here at the Palais Mermonia. I've been assigned to perform some simple legal work here. ｜ 我是刚刚进入沫芒宫的新人复律员，被安排到这里进行一些简单的普法工作。
- Hmph, fine, since even my Yasnapati fancies so. I shall wake her up with my power and let you listen to her dimming voice. ｜ 哼，也罢，既然连吾之「谒颂主」都这样说了，就姑且以吾之力量将其唤醒，让你们听听她的终末之声好了。

- Guilty? Nonsense. I'm here on official business! Look, Qiaoying Village sent someone to the Institute because they needed someone to repair something. The Institute couldn't find anyone, and when they noticed I was twiddling my thumbs in Lumidouce Harbor, they ultimately decided to send me... ｜ 我…我心虚什么？别瞎说，我这是公派外出，是翘英庄这边派人找到院里，说是要维修个什么机关，院里东找西找没找到人手，最后找到了在柔灯港闲得发慌的我，就把我给派了出去…
- The energy that a Source Mechanism requires is dependent on both size and the complexity of its operating logic. The quantity of Phlogiston Units a Secret Source Servant requires is [DATA LOST]... ｜ 秘源机关所需的能源根据运行逻辑的复杂和机体大小都有关系，秘源龙仆所需的「单位燃素量」为「数据佚失」…

- "But an empire of slaves who claim to be free will find itself unmade by the very lies it utters..." ｜ 「但以名为自由的奴役建起的帝国，终将覆灭于同一个谎言…」
- But not a raft! It's light and sits high on the water, so no bends or unseen reef can stop us. ｜ 咱这小竹筏就不一样，重量轻吃水浅，不管什么急弯暗礁，都挡不住咱们。
- (...) ｜ （……）
- An ancient species of finch, with feathers that blaze like fire.\nThough no conclusive evidence exists, passionate finch researchers have long speculated that these birds, in ancient times, once boasted longer plumage and larger bodies. This isolated species may serve as proof of their theories. ｜ 羽毛如火般的古代种团雀。\n虽然没有证据证明，但是资深的团雀研究爱好者一直认为，在相当久远的从前，团雀应该具有更长的翎羽，和更大的体型。这种因为隔绝的环境而保留下来的古代种团雀，说不定能够佐证他们的想法。
- I see. Well, guess the surprise will have to wait until tomorrow. ｜ 这样啊，看来只能把惊喜留到明天了。

- Uh, Paimon didn't quite catch that. ｜ 没，没听懂！
- Paimon can see the door Kuisel exited from here. What should Paimon do now? ｜ 从这里可以看到奎瑟尔离开的门呢，那接下来该怎么办呢？

- Instructor's Tea Cup ｜ 教官的茶杯
- Investigations are being conducted to track smuggling. All goods passing through the port need to be registered and inspected. ｜ 本港现严查走私活动，凡经本港出入的货物皆需登记并接受检查。
- We're familiar with this place after all the adventures we had with you guys! ｜ 毕竟我们对这里很熟悉嘛，和你们一起经历了那么多冒险！
- So, you want to see me cry? That might be a little difficult. A show of anger, though... That might be something I could accomplish. ｜ 你想看我哭吗？那可能有些困难。生气或许会更容易些。
- That prayer... It gives me a strange feeling that I can't put a finger on. And Samail too... What he said... I think I should study it further once I get back. ｜ 那首「祷文」…有种说不上来的怪异的感觉，还有萨梅尔…说的那些话…有必要回去之后重新深入研究一下。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>End Phase:</color> Deal 1 $[K104].\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 2</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>造成1点$[K104]。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：2</color>
- To this day, nothing remains of them. Not memory nor memorial. ｜ 而今什么也没有剩下，没有人记得它们，更无处凭吊。
- Exactly! It, uh... makes this moment even more special because we're already friends! ｜ 对啊对啊，比起不认识的人把羽饰拿过来，这样反而更亲切嘛。
- Another round! Let's go for another round! ｜ 下次再来！下次再来！
- Thanks again, Chevreuse. ｜ 这次也谢谢你了，夏沃蕾。
- Of course! Being an adventurer is really interesting! ｜ 那是当然了，做冒险家可是很有趣的。

- It can fly, it can crawl, or it can bounce. Even insects are fair game! ｜ 天上飞的，地上爬的，跳的，都可以！也可以是昆虫！
- Alright, alright, don't look at me like that. Do whatever you want. It's not as if I'm your parent or something. ｜ 好吧，好吧…不要这样看着我了。你想要怎样就去吧，我又不是你家里的老妈子。
- Achieve victory ｜ 赢得胜利
- Okay, let's start cooking with the Unrivaled Fresh Fruits. ｜ 唔…这就开始用「鲜嫩无朋之果」来做料理吧。
- Given what we saw just now, I'm afraid the shrine maiden has already discovered all my usual spots. Nowhere is safe from the maiden... ｜ 按刚刚的形势来看，巫女姐姐可能已经把我平时睡觉的地方都掌握了，去什么地方估计都是一样的。

- They call it Chilled Meat. ｜ 冷鲜肉。
- Of course, that was only intended to scare them. When it comes time to move tomorrow, they will probably be released. ｜ 当然，这句话只是吓唬他们的啦。等到明天搬迁之时到了，应该会把他们放出来的。
- Argh! ｜ 可恶…
- Secret Archive ｜ 禁室密所大图鉴
- Let's have at it. ｜ 没问题。

- "I'm in no hurry to leave. Did you forget that he's offering six times the pay of anyone else?" ｜ 「我倒是无所谓，毕竟他出手阔绰。你忘了？他开给我们的薪俸可是其他地方的六倍！」

- Curse that Fontainian Pinky Club, they got no respect for rules! Quick, someone tells the big cheese something fishy is going on! ｜ 该死的枫丹小指会，不讲规矩！快来人去通知瓢把子！事情有诈！

- That's true... ｜ 是喔…
- You jest! Even if I sold them to you, what would I use then? ｜ 您别开玩笑了，先不论这信标本身多少钱，要是我卖给您了，我用什么去…
- Ororon's outfit. Those with foresight should know how to conceal themselves. Thus, cape and cowl are his greatest weapons. ｜ 欧洛伦的装扮款式。预见者应当懂得隐藏，斗篷和兜帽是他最好的武装。
- Have you released a Xiao Lantern? ｜ 你放过霄灯了吗？
- Look, I even did a painting inspired by the bravery and freedom of the Scions of the Canopy... ｜ 为了赞美自由勇敢的悬木人，我甚至作了一幅画…

- The trial arena. It's not far from the tribe. ｜ 飞行试炼场，离花羽会不远。
- I am sure you have encountered the music recorded in the form of paintings, yes? ｜ 嗯，你应该也见过这种以绘画的形式记录下来的「乐章」吧。
- I joined this team of my own accord. I'm not going to change my decision based on what others say. ｜ 我来参加勘探队，是我自己的决定。我是不会因为别人怎么说而改变的。

- Talk to Amber ｜ 与安柏对话
- A mantle brooch that has lost its luster. The gold plating that once adorned it was ground away by the wind and the waves long ago. ｜ 色泽暗淡的斗篷别针。原本镀上的金色已经被海风磨去。
- I'm joking! Anyway, I do plan to stay here for a bit, and see if I can convince Lingyuan to go on the trip with me. ｜ 开玩笑的啦！总之，我还是打算先在这边停留一段时间，也顺便试试看能不能劝灵渊和我一同出游。
- Flowers from a distant land, a distant land's flowers~ Have you two brought some today? Is this the hour? ｜ #异国的花，异国的花~派蒙和{NICKNAME}带来了吗？
- Fresh Zaytun Peach ｜ 新鲜的墩墩桃
- The Knave is after the Gnosis, isn't she? ｜ 现在「仆人」的目的还是神之心吧？
- We've still got to bring Granny Una some beautiful flowers! ｜ 我们还要给宇奈婆婆带去好看的花呢！
- Mechanical Crab ｜ 机械螃蟹
- Well, according to my experience, this mechanism should be no different from those basic old mechanisms Shalmar usually brings back home. You just need to insert all the keys and boom, it'll be unlocked! ｜ 不过按我的经验，这个机关跟沙尔玛平时捡回家里的低级旧机关差不多，应该是嵌入所有机钥就能解锁的那种。
- On the other hand, I'd be happy to answer any more questions you have about here and now. ｜ 但如果还有其他关于「现状」的问题，我倒是很乐意为你们解答。
- If you eat enough of this... it makes you really sleepy. ｜ 吃着吃着…就困了。
- Thank you for being with me for all this time, I can feel that I'm getting closer to my dream. Hope we can keep this up in the future~! ｜ 谢谢你陪我走到现在，离我的梦想已经越来越近了呢。未来的日子，也请多多关照啦~！
- Seamless Shield Healing|{param5:F2P} Max HP+{param6:I} ｜ 无郤气护盾治疗量|{param5:F2P}生命值上限+{param6:I}
- Right, it pays to be cautious. ｜ 嗯，小心驶得万年船。
- My hobby? Stargazing! In this all-too-real world in which we live, we all need to look up from the dust once in a while and fix our gaze on the stars, in a spirit of wonder... That, plus the whole thing about me being an astrologer. ｜ 我的爱好？仰望星空。在这个真实得太过分的世界里，每个人都需要仰望星空，更何况，我还是个占星术士。
- Everything left in the camp will get confiscated, so I figured I should get this to you before the Corps could get their hands on it. ｜ 营地里的东西肯定都会被收缴，如果不交出去，就没有机会了。

- Isn't this place called the "excavation site"? ｜ 这里不是叫「挖掘地」吗？
- She did, but don't worry, she's just happy for you is all. ｜ 说了一些哦，不过她是为你高兴，没有别的意思。
- Small wonder, then, that she utilized the power of Sub-Space Creation to preserve her favorite sights within this teapot. ｜ 想来她也是运用外景之能，将自己喜欢的景象放入小小的茶壶之中…
- Take a look in the mirror. ｜ 去照照镜子。
- Shame, but the only person who's won against me... is Captain Beidou, of course. ｜ 可惜，截止目前赢过我的人就只有一个人…当然，是北斗大姐头啦。
- Ha... Navia! ｜ …娜维娅！
- Adventure Item ｜ 冒险道具
- Don't worry, you weren't disturbing me either way. If there is anything I can help with, or if there's any intel you need me to gather, you need only ask, Honorary Knight. ｜ 怎么能算是打扰。要是有什么我能帮得上忙的事，或者有什么需要我收集的情报，就随时告诉我，荣誉骑士。
- The doubled mellow aroma of Onions and Peppers brings a distinctive tickle on the taste buds. ｜ 洋葱和胡椒的结合，双倍的醇香带来与众不同的味蕾刺激。
- Mask of Solitude Basalt ｜ 不动玄石之相
- Hey! Are you a new adventurer? Wanna join my team? ｜ 你好！你也是新人冒险家吗？要不要来我的冒险团？
- Judging by your looks, I assume you've seen some spots, gathered some materials, and found your inspiration? ｜ 看你们的眼神，想必饱览了各地的风光和物产，找到了灵感？
- Hrooo... Aoowrrr! ｜ 呜…嗷啊！
- Plunge DMG|{param11:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param11:F1P}
- Though the day will come when I put her on trial, I must commend the God of Verdure on her sense of responsibility. Few things are without flaws in this world, but the devotion and benevolence she displays are a testament to her commitment to continued progress. I felt enormous regret when I learned of the mistreatment she has endured over the past five hundred years. ｜ 即便将来会有审判她的一天，我也认可草木之神的责任感。世间难有完美的人与事，可专注和溺爱也证明了一个责任者不断前行。听说她曾遭到约五百年的冷遇，我很为她的经历遗憾。
- That night was definitely the nail in the coffin for the "incantations from novels" fad. Still, something tells me "The Miraculous Adventures of the Traveler" will remain an interesting series for a long time to come! ｜ 这件事之后，小说里的咒语什么的，就完全不流行了呢。不过《旅行者的奇妙冒险》应该还能搞出有趣的内容吧！
- Charged Attack Final DMG|{param7:P} ｜ 重击终结伤害|{param7:P}
- Now that you mention it, doesn't it seem like it's a little less foggy here than the surrounding area? ｜ 这么一说，我们所在的区域跟周围比起来，雾气好像少一些？
- Exactly. It may just be a legend to others, but for me, it's a real part of my family history. ｜ 没错，它对别人来说只是一个传说，对我而言却是真实存在过的家族往事。
- That miser Rama though... I've ordered so many times from her, and she never gave me a discount. ｜ 不过拉玛这家伙，我都订了这么多次了，她也没有给我打打折…
- Simply put, even though the Sign of Apaosha has disappeared, this Sunyata Flower hasn't recovered from its corrosion and it's still extremely feeble... ｜ 只不过，即使「焚真之天象」已消弥，这片「净觉花」受到的侵蚀也还没恢复，格外虚弱…
- You're just finding someone to step up to the plate, huh? ｜ 你就是想随便找个人吧。
- Hi, I'm Linlang. I run an antiques shop called Xigu Antiques... How may I help you? ｜ 我是琳琅，经营叫做「希古居」的古董行…请问有事吗？
- Fallen: II ｜ 倒下·其二
- Hehe! Look what we have here! Isn't this the fan we're looking for? ｜ 快看快看！这个是不是要找的那把扇子？

- Oh, one of the villagers generously gifted me with some fresh Bamboo Shoots. They will add some seasonal flavor to a meal on my return to Liyue Harbor. ｜ 对了，轻策庄的居民送了我新鲜竹笋。等回到璃月港，可以拿去做成应季菜品。

- Understood... ｜ 我知道了…

- This <color=#00E1FFFF>Vision</color>... It is of no use to me. ｜ 这<color=#00E1FFFF>『神之眼』</color>…不要也罢了。

- Hahaha, where'd that expression of discontent on your face go, eh? ｜ 刚才一脸不乐意的表情一瞬间就消失了。
- Honestly, I didn't expect our ragtag bunch to do this well. We just came together last minute to save the archon, you know? ｜ 想不到我们这支临时组建起来拯救神明的队伍，还是很靠谱的嘛。
- Changsheng, Qiqi meant that as a compliment. There's no need to be upset. ｜ 长生，七七这话并无贬义，不用计较。
- What is an aquabus? ｜ 巡轨船是什么？
- An Outrider is busy outside the gates of Mondstadt... ｜ 在蒙德城外，一位「侦察骑士」正在忙碌…
- You have spirit. ｜ 唔…很有气势。

- Paimon remembers! This is from "The Black Nacre and the All-Devouring Kraken"! This is the part right after we meet the Chief Mate! ｜ 我想起来了！这一段是「黑水晶号与吞金海怪」的旁白，我们与大副刚刚见面的情景！
- Quest Item ｜ 任务道具
- If the rules of our nation were suddenly cast by the wayside, then it wouldn't be long until chaos ensued. I had no intention of letting their dreams disrupt my life. ｜ 整个国家的规则一旦被这些人打破，什么都会乱套。我不过是希望他们的梦想别扰乱我的生活。
- (This dish looks simple enough, and I did my research, so surely it can't cost all that much? Worst-case scenario, maybe ten thousand Mora...) ｜ （这道菜看起来平平无奇，我又事先做过调查，应该不会花很多摩拉吧！不怕一万，就怕三万…）
- With you by my side, my troublesome work was a little less dull than usual. ｜ 今天有你陪同，麻烦的工作稍微变得不那么枯燥了呢。

- A weapon? That's a classic choice! ｜ 武器？感觉是很经典的宝藏呢！
- Maximize your resources and try to use all your Elemental Dice each Round ｜ 合理分配资源，尽量每回合用完元素骰
- Though I sense that your mind is not yet made up, I am still comforted by your words. There are three days left before the ceremony. I hope they will bring you clarity. ｜ 虽然知道您可能还没有完全想好，但听见您这样说，我还是放心了许多。离仪式还有三天，到时候希望您能确定自己的心意。
- It's almost like how our tribe gathers together for festivals. Still, as soon as the season changes, the herd quickly disperses again. ｜ 就像是…部族里定期举办的聚会一样。不过，时节一过，它们就会迅速离开。
- A considerable number of these made their way back into Liyue Harbor through means unbeknownst to me, and passed through several pairs of hands before finally ending up in yours, and those of your fellow bidders today. ｜ 其中有相当一部分，都以见不得人的方式流回了璃月港，再几经辗转，来到了你们的手上。

- Ugh... It's morning already... *yawn* Paimon still needs more sleep. ｜ 唔…早上了呀，感觉还没睡够呢，昨晚真是太折腾了。
- Bah... She is a child of obvious human flesh. How can a human be judged to be a falcon? Comedy! ｜ 噗…毕竟这孩子还是个人类，人类怎么做别人的猎鹰呢？

- No one has ever traversed this terrain before, and it is teeming with monsters that are stronger than the ones you see wandering about in the wilds. ｜ 因为之前似乎没有人发现过这个地方，所以其中汇聚的魔物数量不少，能力也比野外游荡的魔物强。
- Recommended areas of visitation are the Fountain of Lucine and Opera Epiclese. Other than that, I do not recommend anything. Institute's ruins comprise the northern part of Erinnyes... ｜ 值得一去的地方是露景泉与欧庇克莱歌剧院。除此之外的地方并不推荐。伊黎耶岛北面是科学院的遗址…
- According to your observations, this samachurl-occupied place bears many similarities to the Divine Ingenuity domain. Perhaps that samachurl had found its way in by mistake before discovering a way to use the Domain's power...\nSpeaking of which, you can't help but feel sorry for this samachurl, in here all alone with nothing but countless cabbages to keep it company while the other hilichurls revel outside... ｜ 根据观察，这位丘丘萨满所处的秘境似乎与「神工天巧」的那座有着诸多相似之处。或许那位丘丘萨满也是误入其中，找到了某些借助秘境力量的窍门…\n话说回来，外边的丘丘人都在吃香喝辣，而它孤零零地待在里边，手边只有数不清的卷心菜，似乎也有点可怜？

- I spent so much of my life working to have this home, but in my old age, I found that I had no one to share it with. ｜ 我辛苦了一辈子赚了这么一栋房子，到老了，发现自己孤零零一个人。

- So I've gotta be my freest, happiest self in order to share that with others... Yeah, that makes a lot of sense! Thank you all so much, I'll be sure to take that to heart! ｜ 比其他人更自由、更快乐…我懂了！谢谢各位老师，我会把你们的教导铭记在心的！

- One of the bookcases that may be found within the Yashiro Commission Headquarters. It is said that the other two commissions make infrequent use of these as well.\nThis type of bookcase is quite tall indeed and consumes nearly 90 percent more wood than standard bookcases, which has greatly increased its capacity to the point where it can hold a veritable sea of tomes and other vessels while not taking up much more space than the average bookcase. It is somewhat more expensive, of course, but so what? ｜ 可见于社奉行本部的书柜，听说这种书柜也被其余两奉行少量采购过。\n这种书柜格外高大，消耗的木材比普通书柜多出将近九成，优点是容积巨大，足以储藏海量书籍与器物，而且占用的房间面积并不比普通书柜大多少。这样一看，单价较贵的缺点也就不算什么了。

- And I'll return every last one of your mad— Sorry, your Village Keepers. We'll share our other resources with you, too. ｜ 你们的疯…不，守村人，我都会悉数送还。至于其他资源，也可以与你们共享。

- ·Consume Sanctifying Elixir to generate Artifacts through the process of Definition, or consume Artifacts to obtain Sanctifying Elixir through the process of Extraction.\n·During each cycle, there is a limit on both the amount of Sanctifying Elixir that can be extracted and the number of times that Artifacts of each Set can be defined.\n\nArtifacts draw their power from stories. This explains how it is possible to attempt to create Artifacts through sacred writings. Legend tells of an instance where seventy sages independently produced identical translations of the same source text; and thus, the original text was considered to be sacred. A person has only to place their hand on this machine and the story behind the Artifact will naturally flow out of it. ｜ ·消耗祝圣之霜通过定义产生圣遗物，或是将圣遗物萃取为祝圣之霜的道具。\n·每个周期内，能通过萃取产生的祝圣之霜数量有限；各圣遗物套装定义的次数也有限制。\n\n圣遗物力量的本源来自于故事，因此神圣的书写可以尝试制造圣遗物。传说曾有七十个贤者各自独立翻译出了一模一样的译文，因此神圣的原文可以称圣。只要把手放在这台机器上，圣遗物背后的故事会自然流出。

- Food ｜ 食物
- In truth, the yumekui-baku are not a particularly formidable kind of youkai. When the dark calamity struck Inazuma, all we could do was run and hide. Our neighbor, the Kitsune Saiguu, sacrificed herself in that disaster. I was devastated, but helpless to stop it... It was seeing all that loss and despair that inspired me to go into this vocation. I decided to study abroad, and through my travels in Liyue, Sumeru and Natlan, I was able to integrate my abilities with human medicine. And, thus, my current practice was born. ｜ 其实，食梦貘一族的妖力并不强大。当年，漆黑的灾厄涌来时，我们只能惶恐地躲藏。邻家的狐斋宫姐姐在那场灾厄中牺牲了，我非常伤心，但无力改变什么…许多人也失去了重要的家人和伙伴，内心遍布疮痍…从那时起，我就有了为人们进行心理诊疗的想法，于是我出国求学，先后游历了璃月、须弥和纳塔，结合我的能力和人类的学术理论，慢慢确立了如今的诊疗之道。

- Oh. Sorry. ｜ 嗯。对不起。
- The device whose official name is the Common Cooking Device. It consists of a tightly sealed pot and furnace, which isolates it as much as possible from any outside environmental influences, decreasing the safety hazards posed by an open fire and making it suitable for as many use cases as possible. When this device was first designed, one could have added a pressurization mechanism to the entrance of the pot, which would have allowed one to cook food under high pressure to improve the texture. However, this function was discarded by the engineers during mass production due to material and capital limitations. ｜ 正式名为「泛用型烹饪装置」的机关，具有完全密封的锅体和锅炉，尽可能隔绝了外部环境的影响，降低明火带来的安全隐患，从而最大限度适应不同的使用环境。设计这型机关时，若是在锅体开口增设压力机关，还能以高压高温烹煮食材，提升菜肴的口感，但在量产时，由于材料工艺和成本的限制，这一功能还是被工程师们放弃了。
- Place Blocks ｜ 放置方块
- A tribe that lives a leisurely life surrounded by hot springs and waterside vistas, the "People of the Springs" has nearly become a byword for tourist holidays. When you're taking a break from all that relaxing and you're not busy befriending Koholasaurs, you can capture lines taut with tension by zipping round the Spiritways... ｜ 于水畔与温泉之间悠然生活的部族，「流泉之众」之名几乎成为假日旅游的代名词。在此休憩一番，结交几位鳍游龙的伙伴，便能在「游隙灵道」的疾行中捕捉富有张力的线条…
- A drink with special flavoring huh? Well, that'll be easy enough, I was planning on looking for some more flavorings anyway. Hm, I've got a list of things we can search for. ｜ 特别的调酒辅料？那简单了，我本来就打算去搜集一些调酒辅料，清单也已经列好了，我们就按着这份清单搜集吧。

- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- An Inazuman home with a simple structure that can also be used as a storefront. It is simply and inexpensively made, and rent is thus cheap even in prime real estate locations within Inazuma City, which is very suited indeed to people new to the mercantile business, such as the owner of Netsuke no Gen Crafts. However, the flaw of such stores is also quite plain to see, which is that they lack storage space and thus require frequent supplies of goods, which puts some pressure on the store owner. As such, situations where supply cannot meet demand occur from time to time. ｜ 单层结构的稻妻房屋，可被作为商铺使用。房屋结构简单，建造成本不高，哪怕是在稻妻城内的「白玉地段」，租金也极为便宜，适合业商的初心者，诸如「根付之源」的店主。不过，这种商铺的缺点也显而易见——储货空间有限，需要频繁进货备货，经营压力不小。因此，客至货缺的窘迫情况时有发生。

- $[K1]: When your active character is <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1708]</color>, equip this card.\nAfter $[A1708] equips this card, immediately use <color=#FFD780FF>$[S17082]</color> once.\nWhen $[A1708], who has this card equipped, is on the field, and after you trigger <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C117082]</color>'s effects: Add 1 copy of the $[K56]ed card into your Hand. If this card is a {SPRITE_PRESET#3104}Location Card, then the next {SPRITE_PRESET#3104}Location Card you play this Round will cost 2 less Elemental Dice. (Once per Round)\n(You must have $[A1708] in your deck to add this card to your deck.) ｜ $[K1]：我方出战角色为<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[A1708]</color>时，装备此牌。\n$[A1708]装备此牌后，立刻使用一次<color=#FFD780FF>$[S17082]</color>。\n装备有此牌的$[A1708]在场，我方触发<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C117082]</color>的效果后：将1张所$[K56]卡牌的复制加入你的手牌。如果该牌为「{SPRITE_PRESET#3104}场地」牌，则使本回合中我方下次打出「{SPRITE_PRESET#3104}场地」时少花费2个元素骰。（每回合1次）\n（牌组中包含$[A1708]，才能加入牌组）

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nDuring the Moonchase Festival, Travelers can complete quests in Moonchase Tales or take part in Moonlight Seeker and Trail of Delicacies challenges to obtain rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nDuring the event period, reach Adventure Rank 28 and complete "A New Star Approaches" and "Mondstadt Gastronomy Trip" to take part in the "Moonlight Merriment" event. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n在逐月节期间，旅行者可以通过完成「逐月佳话」中的任务，或参与「觅取月晖」与「珍肴霞踪」挑战获得奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n活动期间，冒险等阶达到28并完成「迫近的客星」与「蒙德食遇之旅」后，可以参与「韶光抚月」活动。

- <color=#37FFFF>Baizhu:</color> Only the most magnanimous soul could labor to preserve life by slaying evil spirits. I was once fortunate enough to see the Conqueror of Demons with my own eyes. We even brought him back to the pharmacy to take care of him for a day. Unfortunately, I did not know his true identity at the time, and didn't even have a chance to speak with him before he left on his own.\n<color=#37FFFF>Changsheng:</color> But you've seen him since then, haven't you? There's no reason to be upset.\n<color=#37FFFF>Baizhu:</color> Yes, you're right. ｜ <color=#37FFFF>白术：</color>降魔大圣杀生为护生，心有大慈悲。我曾有幸亲眼见过他本人，还将昏迷的他带回庐中照顾了一天，只可惜当时我不识仙师真身，又没来得及多交谈几句，他就独自离开了。\n<color=#37FFFF>长生：</color>后来你们不是又见过嘛，不用遗憾啦。\n<color=#37FFFF>白术：</color>说得也是。

The "eye" notices your presence and tries attacking, only to have you block with your blade. Now feeling endangered, it repels you, countless doors slamming in your face... ｜ 你来到一处奇异的空间，空中有一只诡异的「眼睛」，正在从人们的噩梦中吸食能量。「眼睛」注意到了你的存在，尝试发起攻击，却被你挥剑挡下。感受到威胁的「眼睛」将你推远，无数扇门在你面前关闭…

---
### Part 042

- Yes, one understands what the Conqueror of Demons means. The city of Liyue has changed much after our long separation. ｜ …嗯，降魔大圣的意思，我能明白。许久未见的璃月，也的确与我印象中大相径庭。
- That makes her our prime suspect, then. ｜ 现在所有的疑点都指向她了。
- What a coincidence. I happen to agree. ｜ 巧了，我也是这么觉得的。
- Follow the memory and look for the correct location ｜ 遵循回忆找到准确的地点
- Use an exploding Flamegranate to trigger the Melt reaction on the Gluttonous Yumkasaur Mountain King. ｜ 在一次挑战中，利用火榴果的爆炸对贪食匿叶龙山王触发融化反应。
- Not yet. ｜ 还没有。
- He could have paid me to fix the problem... ｜ 明明可以付钱给我让我来解决问题…
- Challenge Summary ｜ 挑战回顾

- Wavecrest Waltz ｜ 浪尖之舞
- They're not in any real danger, are they? ｜ 他们不会真遇见什么危险吧…
- If we had you on the survey team, I bet we'd have ruined a few Kameras less. ｜ 要是你能和我一起去丈量土地，我肯定能少用坏几台留影机。
- Whether the journey before you leads to the heights of the heavens or the depths of the abyss, each step you take is another achievement. ｜ 不论前路是星辰还是深渊，能向前迈出下一步都是值得庆贺的事。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nA girl named Banu has given you a strange commission. Use the item she gives you, "Banu's Wisdom," to search for these "Future Stars" she speaks of.\nDuring the event, you must find all the Future Stars and fulfill Banu's wish to unlock a varied number of rewards.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 30. Complete the Archon Quest "Requiem of the Echoing Depths" and the Archon Quest "Through Mists of Smoke and Forests Dark" for a better experience.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nDuring the event, you have to help your commission-giver, Banu, fulfill her wish. As her commission updates, you will have to explore different areas and help her find the objects she is pursuing. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n女孩芭努向你们提出了一份有些奇特的委托，使用芭努提供的工具「芭努的智慧」，寻找她口中的「未来星」吧。\n活动期间，找到全部未来星，完成芭努的心愿，可以解锁多种奖励。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到30级。（完成魔神任务「回响渊底的安魂曲」、魔神任务「穿越烟帷与暗林」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动期间，旅行者需要协助委托人芭努达成心愿。随着芭努委托内容的更新，旅行者需要探索不同区域，帮助委托人芭努找到她所追寻之物。
- Really? You're not just trying to trick me, are you? I mean, I'm not trying to make life hard for you. But I... I think I might get another anxiety attack. Could you... tell me what this book is about? ｜ 当真？没骗我？不是凑数？啊，我不是想为难你。可能是焦虑又发作了。你说说这本书讲了什么？
- The Akademiya wants the representatives from each Darshan to nominate someone to serve as the Knight of Flowers for the Parade. ｜ 教令院那边希望各学院代表推举一名人选，去担任花车巡游当天的「花之骑士」一职。
- Indeed we were! Ample discussion is necessary prior to progressing any task. ｜ 哈哈哈，没错。充分的讨论是推进工作的前提。
- Outside, yes, many. After I returned home... No, nobody has asked. ｜ 在外面的时候，有很多人这么问。回家了之后…倒是没有人问了。
- Motif: Artful Flower 3 ｜ 纹样·巧花之三
- It's called tempura and it's served with a special dipping sauce. ｜ 用这种手法做出来的食物，似乎是被称为「天妇罗」，还要搭配特别的蘸汁来着。
- But later on, Miss Dunyarzad asked her parents to find a way to borrow it for her. She said the mysterious markings fascinated her, even though she couldn't get into the book itself. ｜ 但是后来，迪娜泽黛小姐也托父母想办法借到这本书，她说书上的神秘记号让她非常在意，有点看不进书了。
- If it refuses to leave, harden your heart and <color=#00E1FFFF>take the food it got from Archon-knows-where away</color>. That should give it the signal that it's time to go home. ｜ 它要是耍性子不肯动，你们要狠心一点，<color=#00E1FFFF>把来路不明的吃食拿走</color>，这样它就知道要回家了。
- Watch the positions of the Spikey Fish and choose the right special Jumpy Dumpty. After a special Jumpy Dumpty is thrown, find the right time to let it explode, which will make the most of the special Jumpy Dumpty and blow up the most Spikey Fish. ｜ 注意观察角角鱼的位置，选择合适的特别蹦蹦，投掷后，在准确的时机引爆，就能让特别蹦蹦发挥最好的效果，一次炸到最多的角角鱼…

- Whoa, what a weird-looking tree... ｜ 喔——好怪的树…
- That's what being human is about. ｜ 这才是人类。
- Iaune suddenly runs over in a panic... ｜ 艾尤恩突然慌慌张张地跑了过来…

- The individual has been missing for over a month, and has accrued a tab in the tens of thousands of Mora at the L'or noir. If anyone can provide useful information, please contact Tetreaux. We are most grateful for any information. ｜ 该人已失踪超过一个月，在黑金酒吧有数万摩拉欠款。如能提供有效信息，请联系泰托，必有重谢。
- Haha, it is most gladdening, indeed. Yet the news that I would be attending to this matter in person was surely the only guarantee that my faithful subjects ever needed of a felicitous outcome! ｜ 哼哼，劳烦本皇女亲自出马，有这种结果也是应该的嘛！
- A flower that grew from a rock, breaking through the stone as it strove to reach the light. ｜ 岩石之中生长出来的花。能够裂穿坚硬的岩壁，是因为花追寻着光。
- ...Do you mean the Fungi and spores? Actually, that said, what are the Varuna Contraption and the Varunastra exactly? ｜ …难道是蕈兽和孢子？不过，法留纳神机和法留纳法宝到底说的是什么东西呢？
- You have to believe in yourself more, Ms. Paimon! The heroes of the story are all sure of themselves. That's why they're the main characters. ｜ 派蒙姐姐要多一点自信哦，故事的主角都是很自信的，所以，自信的人才可以当主角。

- Such specific punishments. ｜ 好具体的神罚。

- Once upon a time in Fontaine, humans and Melusines didn't get along like they do today. Some people feared and hated us because they heard that we were born from the body of Elynas... Others didn't trust Monsieur Neuvillette, and by extension they didn't trust us Melusines either... And maybe some of them were just subconsciously wary of us because we looked different... Back then, it was really difficult to make human friends. So I really treasured that one little girl who knew I was a Melusine but was still willing to hold my little round hand... ｜ 在很久以前的枫丹，人类跟美露莘的关系并不像今天这样融洽。有些人听说美露莘是从厄里那斯的血肉中诞生的，对我们又恨又怕…有的人出于对那维莱特先生的不信任，连带不会相信美露莘…还有的人也许并没有想太多，光是看我们跟人类长得不一样，就会下意识疏远…那个时候想跟人类做朋友真的是很困难的事情呢，所以我很珍惜那位明知我是美露莘还愿意牵起我的小圆手的人类女孩…

- Usually, zombies are cold and stiff, which forces them to locomote by hopping about.\nAs such, Qiqi keeps up a calisthenics regimen to retain a human-like form.\nThe 77th-generation Director of the Wangsheng Funeral Parlor, Hu Tao, doesn't see the point of all this. Whenever she meets Qiqi, she will say: "It would be easier if you just let me bury you."\nQiqi, of course, has no wish to be buried, and so conducts her exercises at night when no one's about.\nQiqi's memory falls far behind those of non-undead disposition.\nIf she does not continue to reinforce her impressions of someone, she will completely forget them in three days tops.\nBut who knows, this might be a good thing — for a person with painful memories, forgetting may, in fact, be a form of release.\nThe person Qiqi must remember most... not only does this person have a very punch-able face, but she also shows up every single day.\nAs such, Qiqi isn't too concerned about her poor memory. ｜ 通常来说，僵尸的躯体又冷又僵，使得他们只能一跳一跳地行动。\n为了保持接近正常人的状态，七七一直在做柔软体操。\n「往生堂」第七十七代堂主胡桃对此却并不看好。每次见到七七，她都热情似火地提出：「被我埋掉会更轻松一点哦。」\n七七当然不想被埋掉。所以，她如今只在无人的夜晚锻炼身体了。\n拥有不死之身的七七，记忆力远逊于常人。\n如果不持续强化印象，不出三天她就会把人忘得一干二净。\n但这说不定也是一件好事呢，毕竟，对有着痛苦回忆的人来说，忘却反而是种解脱。\n眼下最需要被七七记住的那个人…不仅有张欠打的脸，还会日复一日在她眼前晃悠。\n因此，七七本人并不在意「记性不好」的问题。

- Roar... Rawr! Rawr! ｜ 唔，呀！呀！
- Tubby ｜ 阿圆
- Let's go to the ruins we were at before once we leave the dream. Maybe we'll find some sign of him changing his mind! ｜ 我们出了梦境以后，就去刚才的遗迹看看吧…说不定就能读到他回心转意的笔记了！
- "Tales of Humanity":\nI've been told that if you ask for help in the paper, someone really will come. Am I being overly wishful?\nAlthough Euphrasie keeps insisting these kind souls really exist, I just don't know what to think.\nIn my line of work, every day brings a pile of fresh troubles and I'm constantly snowed under.\nAnyway, if someone out there could bring me <color=#3399CC>White Iron Chunks</color> I would be eternally grateful.\nI can't even get the higher-ups to replace broken maintenance tools and instead have to fix them myself... Who thought simply making a living would be so tough? ｜ 「人间百态」：\n据说在报纸上登一条求助消息就会有人应征来帮忙，世界上真的有这种好事吗？\n虽然欧芙女士向我一再说明这是真的，但我想人还是不应该太贪心。\n干我这工作每天都能遇上一堆麻烦事，不是工具出问题就是活干不完。\n如果有好心的先生或者女士愿意提供点<color=#3399CC>白铁块</color>，我感激不尽。\n唉，水道维修工具坏了不是找上头统一调换，得我自己修。混口饭吃不容易啊。
- Grandma, look, look! Sumeru City is just as lively as Setaria said! ｜ 奶奶，奶奶，您看！须弥城就像塞塔蕾姐姐说的一样热闹！

- Flowers that bloom at Ley Line openings. Defeat all opponents in the Ley Line opening challenge and consume Original Resin to obtain a rich bounty. ｜ 会在地脉溢口处盛开的花朵。如果能完成堵塞地脉的挑战，并消耗「原粹树脂」的话，就能获取大地的丰厚馈赠。

- Iai: Sheathed ｜ 居合·纳刀
- Ores are very important resources, you know... They can be used to make lots of different things. If you have some spare time to go mine some, I'm sure they'd come in handy. They're not far off — I'll show you where to look. ｜ 嗯…请问，你现在有时间吗？矿石可是很重要的生活材料，可以拿来做不少东西，你应该需要的吧？就在这附近哦，我来指给你。
- These islands have been the focus of recent military conflicts, and I don't recommend that adventurers go there alone. However, many could not resist the temptation of treasure hunting... *cough* ｜ 这些群岛最近时有兵家之争，我是不建议冒险家们贸然前往的。但怎奈很多人无法抗拒探险寻宝的诱惑，咳咳…
- Our base camp is on an island in the center of the sea. Yakov is still delirious, so I must send him there first. ｜ 我们这支小队的休整处在海域中央的岛屿，现在雅科夫这个样子，我必须得先把他送到那边去才行。
- No, I'm fine, literally. If something's wrong, it's too late anyway... ｜ 不，我真的没事。如果有事，那一定也为时已晚了，呜…

- Now! Use the power of the good dreams! ｜ 就是现在，使用美梦的力量！
- Maybe you dance with danger, and I dance for artistic reasons... But we both share the same desire to perform our best. ｜ 虽然是不同的舞台，但我们都希望能将自己的舞蹈跳得更好。
- "Traitors"? Well, if we're the ones who make it back alive, then the only traitor they'll remember is you! ｜ 我们是叛徒？不…只要活着回去的是我们，叛徒就是你才对！

- Wow, you have really sharp eyes! ｜ 哦哦！眼力真好！

- When your opponent generates a falling block, <color=#F39000>2</color> random regular blocks on their field will gain <color=#19c78e>Nightmare</color>.\n<color=#19c78e>Nightmare</color>: If a block with this effect is not cleared in the current block-fall, it will be converted into an obstacle, and another random regular block will gain <color=#19c78e>Nightmare</color>. ｜ 对手下落方块生成时，使其场地中随机<color=#F39000>2</color>个普通方块获得<color=#19c78e>「魇煞」</color>。\n<color=#19c78e>「魇煞」</color>：若持有此效果的方块在当次下落未被消除则转化为阻碍方块，并使随机1个普通方块获得<color=#19c78e>「魇煞」</color>。
- Thank you, friend. If it weren't for you, I'd still be taking a beating from those meka... ｜ 谢谢你，好心的朋友。要是没有你，我不知道要被那些机关揍到什么时候…

- ...A bold attack. ｜ …很有气势的攻击。

- Obtain the "Wax and Wane" effect after an Elemental Reaction is triggered, gaining <color=#99FFFFFF>33</color> Elemental Mastery while losing 5% ATK. For every 0.3s, 1 stack of Wax and Wane can be gained. Max 5 stacks. For every 6s that go by without an Elemental Reaction being triggered, 1 stack will be lost. This effect can be triggered even when the character is off-field. ｜ 触发元素反应后，获得「盈缺」效果：元素精通提升<color=#99FFFFFF>33</color>点，攻击力降低5%。每0.3秒至多获得一层盈缺效果，至多叠加5层。未触发元素反应时将每6秒失去一层。角色处于队伍后台时也能触发效果。

- When you put it like that, it makes you sound pretty awesome... ｜ 某种程度上，是听起来挺厉害的…

- I need a moment... ｜ 我再准备一下…

- My polearm doesn't distinguish friend from foe, and there is clearly a limit to the red ropes' power. That's why I loathe crowded areas. ｜ 刀枪无眼，红绳的力量也有极限，所以我才不喜欢人多的地方。

- Do you need a hand with anything? ｜ 有什么需要帮忙的吗？

- (Good, they're arguing. Looks like they just needed an excuse. They've probably had enough of this job already.) ｜ （很好很好，果然吵起来了，这帮人肯定看愚人众不爽很久了，就想找个借口打架。）
- Large bookcases found inside The Cat's Tail. After reading some of the thick books on its shelves, what can be discovered is that most of the content has to do with cat care, tavern management techniques, and tips for efficient cooking. From Margaret's perspective, this is essential knowledge for her and her staff. Rumor has it that Shuyun will sometimes read this to the duel cats, though as they only need to focus on mastering Genius Invokation TCG, they aren't too interested in the details offered by these books. Often, they drift off to sleep during readings. On the other hand, treating these pieces of "essential knowledge" as functional sleep aids might not be such a bad thing either... ｜ 布置在猫尾酒馆内的大型书柜，摆放着许多册厚重的书本，阅读后就能发现，这些书本的主要内容大多与照料猫猫的要点、管理酒馆的技巧、快速烹饪餐点的窍门有关，在玛格丽特看来，这些都是酒馆员工的「必备知识」。据说，恕筠有时也会将书里的内容读给猫之牌手们听，但猫猫们只需要打好「七圣召唤」就不愁吃穿，所以大多对书里的内容不感兴趣，听着听着就会睡着。换个角度来看，这些「必备知识」变成了合格的睡前故事，倒也是一件好事…

- The courage to leap when faced with the precipice of a cliff is the key to freedom's gate. ｜ 面临危崖也无惧跃下者，其勇敢正是打开自由之门的钥匙。

- ...But at a tea party, I'm not normally subjected to a constant stream of questions. The energy consumption of that interview just now was three times as much as the average tea party... ｜ …但是在茶话会上，一般也不会有人一直向我提问。应付刚才的情况，能量消耗已经到平时的三倍了…

- After using <color=#FFD780FF>Sacred Rite: Wolf's Swiftness</color> or triggering the Judication effect of the Passive Talent "Featherfall Judgment," Cyno will gain 4 stacks of the "Day of the Jackal" effect. When he hits opponents with Normal Attacks, he will consume 1 stack of "Day of the Jackal" to fire off one Duststalker Bolt.\n"Day of the Jackal" lasts for 8s. Max 8 stacks. It will be canceled once Pactsworn Pathclearer ends.\nA maximum of 1 Duststalker Bolt can be unleashed this way every 0.4s.\nYou must first unlock the Passive Talent "Featherfall Judgment." ｜ 施放<color=#FFD780FF>圣仪·煟煌随狼行</color>或触发固有天赋「落羽的裁择」的「裁定」后，赛诺将获得4层「豺祭」效果。赛诺的普通攻击命中敌人时，将消耗一层「豺祭」效果，并发射一道渡荒之雷。\n「豺祭」持续8秒，至多叠加8层，并将在圣仪·煟煌随狼行的启途誓使状态结束后移除。\n每0.4秒至多通过这种方式发射一道渡荒之雷。\n需要解锁固有天赋「落羽的裁择」。

- The development of a new Orb is experiencing a huge lack of funding too, so it will be impossible to complete it at the expected rate. ｜ 新型宝珠的开发资金也有着很大缺口，不可能完全以预期的速度完成。
- But who wrote this book, and why? Don't we think there might be a bigger safety risk here? ｜ 可是，写这本书的人到底是谁，为什么要这样做？这件事…将来会不会威胁到大家的安全？
- Long-awaited peace is now within reach. You have the opportunity to set that future in motion. ｜ 长久以来梦想的和平就在眼前，你有机会用双手创造这样的未来。
- Increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>. When party members obtain Elemental Shards from Crystallize reactions, the equipping character will gain 1 Seal, increasing Elemental Skill DMG by <color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>. The Seal lasts for 15s, and the equipper may have up to 2 Seals at once. All of the equipper's Seals will disappear 0.2s after their Elemental Skill deals DMG. ｜ 攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>20%</color>；队伍中的角色获取结晶反应产生的晶片时，会为装备者赋予1枚「约印」，使元素战技造成的伤害提升<color=#99FFFFFF>18%</color>，约印持续15秒，至多同时持有2枚。所有约印将在装备者的元素战技造成伤害后的0.2秒后移除。

- So spices are out of stock in your store? ｜ 店里的香料断货了？
- *sigh* Fine, fine. I've neither the time nor energy to bargain with you at my age. I suppose this price will do. ｜ 唉，罢了罢了，婆婆我这把年纪，也没什么精神头跟你们讨价还价了，就按这个价吧。

- Monumental stone statues that watch over the whole of Teyvat. Legends say they were sculpted in the images of The Seven who sustain this world. - A group of hilichurls is wandering in the wilderness. Some of them are Geo-enhanced. Defeat all of them and put an end to this threat. ｜ 一群丘丘人正在野外游荡，威胁着过往行人，其中一部分以「岩」强化了自身。消灭所有魔物，清除这股威胁。

- You can't find her exact location? Okay... I'll mark that spot on the map for you. ｜ 你不太清楚她具体在哪里？行…我把她的所在位置给你标在地图上。
- That has nothing to do with me! I—It's probably some graffiti by some random drunkard... ｜ 绝对和我没关系！说不定…说不定是哪个醉汉喝多了随便涂鸦…
- At first, I was worried something might have gone wrong with the herbs, but judging by the way people were talking, it seems like they were pretty pleased with the results! ｜ 起初我还担心用于炼制的药材会不会出什么问题，但是听他们的说法，效果似乎很不错。
- Ting Zhi is busy near Wangshu Inn... ｜ 廷稚正在望舒客栈附近忙碌…
- History does not change easily, but human hearts can. Believe your own eyes. Only that which you see is true. What is unseen is but an illusion. ｜ 历史不会轻易被改变，但人们的心会。相信自己的眼睛，你所见才是真实，未见则为虚幻。
- All party members gain a 60% Hydro DMG Bonus. ｜ 队伍中所有角色获得60%水元素伤害加成。
- Cyrus looks like he's about to retire — says he wants to settle down in Springvale. ｜ 塞琉斯先生一副要退休的样子，老是说要去清泉镇悠闲度日。
- Sorry, I'm currently trying to make Smoldersleet Elixir. I'll be occupying this Crafting Bench in the meantime, I'm afraid. ｜ 实在不好意思，我正在试制「烟霰丹剂」，可能需要占用合成台一段时间。
- The silently-flowing underground rivers of The Chasm are home to a variety of fish. In that sense, one could speculate that these waters connect this place to the outside world. ｜ 在层岩巨渊中静静流淌的地下河，其中出没着各种鱼类，如此看，这片水域可能隐蔽地与外界相连。
- Obtain all Abyssal Stars in the Spiral Abyss. ｜ 深境螺旋：取得「深境回廊」的所有渊星。
- Besides the Sebastos himself, only said superiors, the Harmosts, could have changed Phobos's melody. ｜ 能够改变「福波斯」旋律的人，除了至尊之外便只有作为上位者的调律师了。
- We sure are! And who're you? ｜ 是呀。你是谁？

- Your opponent's characters deal +1 DMG, and take -2 DMG when taking DMG that is not "Arkhe: Pneuma" aligned.\nAfter an opposing character takes DMG that is "Arkhe: Pneuma" aligned: You gain 3 Omni Dice, and the above effect is canceled until the Round ends.\nBefore you choose your action, if your side has no more than 4 Elemental Dice remaining: You gain a "Pneuma Block." (Once per Round) ｜ 敌方造成的伤害+1，受到的不具有「始基力：芒性」的伤害-2。\n敌方受到具有「始基力：芒性」的伤害后：我方获得3个万能元素，并且直到回合结束前上述效果无效。\n我方选择行动前，如果我方的元素骰不多于4个：我方获得「芒性能量块」。（每回合1次）

- Because I—I'm an adventurer... ｜ 我…我是冒险家嘛…

- I've already informed the Police Station. There'll be someone to take you into the warehouse, so you may head there directly. ｜ 我已经告知了奉行所，会有专人带你们进入仓库，你们直接前往即可。
- Interesting Things ｜ 感兴趣的见闻…
- What are we doing here? We look like eavesdroppers... ｜ 我们来这里做什么呀？搞得好像要偷听什么一样…
- Move! Do you want to get thrashed that badly? ｜ 跑起来！你对挨打很执着吗？
- Especially since Maloney mentioned that the initial plan was to cast Gillian as the lead... ｜ 之前马洛尼也提到过，原计划是让吉莲来出演「主角」…
- Charlotte: Friendly ｜ 夏洛蒂·友好
- Heh... Looks like Guoba's not too sure about all that... ｜ 唔，这方面的事，锅巴好像完全不懂？
- Look who it is... ｜ 那是…
- Bloodtainted Greatsword ｜ 沐浴龙血的剑
- ... ｜ ……
- Either way, though, I believe you are innocent in all of this. Had you actually been alright with making money through less than noble means, your life wouldn't be the mess it currently is. ｜ 不过我相信你是清白的。如果你能接受这种赚钱方式，生活不会像现在这样糟乱。
- I came to Mt. Tianheng once with my father as a child. I remember it being such a long climb that I could barely feel my legs by the time we reached the top. ｜ 小时候我随父亲来过一次天衡山。记得这座山好高好高，爬到山顶时腿已经酸得不行了。

- So we can actually enter the Harvisptokhm? ｜ 原来可以进到树的里面吗？

- Score 2,000 points in the challenge "Whirling Petals" in Radiant Sparks ｜ 在「光焰蹈跃」的「花旋」挑战中获得2000分

- We yearned for that future. We looked to you to take us there. ｜ 我们曾如此憧憬着那样的未来，如此凝望着你。
- This was originally intended to buy bedding and other materials by which sleep quality might be improved, but on the other hand, Sayu has no wish to sleep forever just yet. ｜ 原计划用于购置寝具、改善睡眠的资金，但早柚还不想就此长眠。
- "Lord Hiiragi," you said... Haha, don't worry, as I said, I'm not here to contravene the ceasefire. ｜ 「柊大人」，是么…呵呵，我是不会破坏停战协议的…
- Okay, everyone, let's go. ｜ 嗯，大家，我们走吧。
- So little Nara will play with Aranishat and Aralila, too. ｜ 小那菈也一定会愿意和兰难世和兰梨娄一起玩游戏的。
- But some questions don't go away once they pop up in your head... Every time Paimon closes her eyes, they spin around like Specters... Hmm... ｜ 可是有些问题就是一旦浮现在脑海里就会挥之不去嘛…每次闭上眼睛它会像飘浮灵一样围着脑袋绕圈…唔唔…

- A mask once covered in gold leaf. Perhaps it is a relic from some ancient officer of the legions. ｜ 曾经覆以金箔的面具，或许是古时统帅军团之人的遗物。
- Wings of Transient Dreams ｜ 梦生须臾之翼
- To be safe, I'll bring the relic along with us. Who knows, it might just come in handy. ｜ 保险起见，那个圣物我也带上了。说不定它能派上些用场。
- Fella, if you want to survive and thrive, you should be more careful next time. ｜ 小哥，你这个样子，以后怎么出门啊。
- Hehe... I suppose that sounds better, doesn't it? ｜ …我是不是应该这么说比较好？
- Maybe they imagined her having wings. ｜ 说不定长着翅膀。
- Everyone sits on the campsite grounds, enjoying the delicious feast together with the Fungi. ｜ 大家在营地里席地而坐，与蕈兽伙伴们肩并肩，一起享用美味的饭菜。
- Controlled Directional Blast ｜ 可控性去危害化式定向爆破
- He's a veteran miner, and an agile one, too. He took very good care of youngsters who were new in the mine. ｜ 老何可是老前辈了，身手敏捷，对新来的小伙子们都多有照顾。
- The weather today is perfect for observation. Let's see if it shows up. ｜ 今天的天气很适合观测，接下来就是看它会不会来了吧。

- Vacation... ｜ 度假…
- So please, Narzissenkreuz, come back with us. There are other people you need to see. ｜ 然后纳齐森科鲁兹，你和我们回去吧。你需要见一见其他人。
- It's much more difficult to express those feelings to someone's face. People get shy in those situations, it's just how it is. ｜ 举个例子，如果你站在这里，有的人可能会因为羞涩不敢说一些话——这也是人之常情。
- He was quite lovely, actually. ｜ 其实也很漂亮。
- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- Hehe, that's right! Since I'm this lucky, I believe that as long as I try my best, good things are bound to happen! Building a water park will be a cinch! ｜ 呵呵，没错。既然我运气这么好，我相信只要我加倍努力，就一定会有好事情发生的！水上乐园也一定可以轻松建成！
- Huh, every card in my deck is super impressive on its own. Working together, you'd think the result would be even more impressive... ｜ 奇怪，我牌组里的每一张牌都很厉害啊，把它们组合起来，不是应该更厉害吗…

- D—Don't look down! It's so high up here. Let's just get out of here once we've placed the instruments! ｜ 别、别往下看！太高了，安置好仪器之后就快走啦！
- Xavier mentioned that there's a device that contains the Tatarigami core in here. That should be the one. ｜ 泽维尔说的存储有「祟神」核心的装置，应该就是那个东西了。
- Yeah... That's the only way we'll know for sure... ｜ 也对，不去看看怎么知道…

- This is where Mr. Raimondo's project team was originally located, a place far enough from the center of the explosion to not be greatly impacted by it. You know, meaning "lots of people who are still alive." ｜ 这里本来是雷蒙多先生所领导的项目组所在地，距离爆炸中心比较远，没有受到太大的影响，还有许多能动的活人。
- When HP is above 90%, increases CRIT Rate by <color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color>. ｜ 生命值高于90%时，暴击率提升<color=#99FFFFFF>14%</color>。

- You! Don't expect any discount from me for your next month's rent! And the water bill, furniture, and all that food you mooched... I let it all slide before, but now it's time to pay up! ｜ 你！下个月的房租，别指望我再给你打折扣了！还有之前没计较的水费，家具费，蹭饭的伙食费…都给我补上！
- You meet a passionate adventurer at the front desk of the Mondstadt Adventurers' Guild. ｜ 在蒙德的冒险家协会前台，你遇到一位热情的冒险家。
- Well well, look who's so well-informed! I suppose Panuelle must have told you? ｜ 你倒是消息齐全。应该是帕纽尔告诉你的吧？
- You'll find those who focus on the beautiful essence of all things. ｜ 有专注着事物美好本质的人。
- Whoa, he's one fast dragon! We better catch up, or we'll lose him. ｜ 这家伙飞得也太快了吧！快追上去，可别跟丢了啊。
- Ahaha... Sorry for not clarifying things before, and making you travel so far. ｜ 啊哈哈…之前都是误会，抱歉啦，让你跑这么一趟。
- Hey there. ｜ 哟，少年。
- "Finally, the Uyuu Restaurant once again, at last! Mr. Okazaki's as friendly as he ever was, and the wine's still excellent!" ｜ 「终于又来了一次『乌有亭』，冈崎老爷还是那么亲切，酒也是久违的爽快！」
- Talk to the afterimage in front of the seal ｜ 和封印前的残魂对话
- Pleasure. Also, Hu Tao, the final is about to start. I just came to make sure you're aware. ｜ 另外，胡桃，决赛快要开始了，我是来通知你的。
- A coral that grows profusely in the dark and gloomy places of Enkanomiya. Thanks to the sheer amount of them that grow, their pale white glow stands some chance against the dark. Perhaps after many long years, these corals might grow as large and sturdy as giant trees, but in cold and lonely Enkanomiya, bereft of a certain vitality, the Sangacorallia may just opt to continue slumbering. ｜ 隐伏在渊下宫暗处的珊瑚，郁杌丛生。得益于攒聚生长的姿态，淡白的荧光得以勉强对抗夜暗。或许在漫长的岁月过后，这些珊瑚能生长得高大健壮，宛如巨树。但在这冷寂的渊下宫，缺少某些干预时，或许珊瑚虫们也会久久沉睡吧。
- Haha, you are as direct as they say. ｜ 你果然和传说中的一样，是个爽快的人呀。
- I've marked the location of the scammers on your map. I'll leave the rest to you two. ｜ 那些人出没的区域我已经在地图上圈了出来，接下来就拜托两位了。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nThe Inazuman illustrator named Asagiri is currently frustrated by her lack of artistic inspiration. Perhaps you and your Kamera might be able to come to her aid...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 30 and complete the following prerequisite quests: Archon Quest "Ritou Escape Plan" and World Quest "Snapshots."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nTwo photo-taking spots will unlock every day after the event starts.\nFollow Asagiri's requests and use the Kamera to take various pictures.\nDuring this event, you can redeem rewards in the event menu after successfully taking a photo at each site for the first time. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n稻妻的插画师朝雾正在为缺乏创作插画的灵感而烦恼，也许，旅行者手上的「留影机」能帮上她的忙…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到30，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「离岛逃离计划」、世界任务「暂留此影」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动开始后，每天都会有两个新的留影地点。\n按照朝雾的请求，用「留影机」记录下各类画片吧。\n活动期间，在每个「留影地点」首次完成留影后，可以在活动界面领取奖励。
- Thrilling performance. I've never seen anything like it before in my life. Your reputation is well-deserved! ｜ 啧，这么精彩的戏剧，我还是头一回看到。果真是，名不虚传啊！
- When we were at Wangshu Inn and the abandoned house earlier, though I couldn't remember everything, I still... felt a sense of familiarity. I could easily picture myself in those places... ｜ 之前在望舒客栈与废弃房屋的时候，我虽然没办法立刻想起来，但也隐约有一种印象，感觉周围的一切都很熟悉…
- Next time for sure. ｜ 下次一定。
- Upgrades <color=#B09057FF>Inferno's</color> Basic Attack such that it leaves behind continuously-burning Liquid Fire on hit. ｜ 强化<color=#B09057FF>「奇术机关·万里焰焰」</color>，使这种机关的基础攻击命中后，会留下短时间内持续燃烧的液态火。
- I have never been able to agree with certain philosophies. Even Sachin himself struggled to comprehend the notion of sacrificing oneself for the greater good. ｜ 我向来不认可某类理念。通过强迫自己牺牲来实现「皆大欢喜」的结果，哪怕是那个萨齐因都难以理解。
- Perhaps, but we must investigate the buoys regardless. ｜ 还是主动确认一下比较好。
- Records of the Gallant: Black Raccoons ｜ 侠客记·黑貉
- Oh, you look really busy. Has something serious happened? ｜ 你们看起来好忙啊，是发生什么大事了吗？
- He rescued me from the brink of death once, many years ago in the desert. When he learned that I was a scholar, he invited me to come here, and revive the might of Hermanubis together. ｜ 很多年前我险些在沙漠遇难，是他救了我。得知我是学者，他邀请我一起复兴赫曼努比斯的力量。
- "Hey, I found it! The other half of the ship, it's here! *sigh* After everything we went through with the army, all our hard-won treasure is gone, and so's the ship... When Chief Janome finds out, we'll be in for the scolding of a lifetime..."\n"This samurai puppet is all that's left. Hah... and we're no more capable of getting out of here on our own strength than it is." ｜ 「喂——！找到啦，断的另外半截在这里！唉，枉费咱们跟官兵纠缠那么久，辛辛苦苦带出来的财宝都没了，船也毁了…蛇目二当家知道了会骂死我们的吧…」\n「现在就剩这么台傀儡武士。我们也好，它也好，一个都走不了。」
- Thunderwrath ｜ 啸雷示出
- No, I didn't see anything, so don't ask! ｜ 我没看到，我不知道，别问我！
- One of my colleagues came across some newly formed Condessence Crystals and Magical Crystal Ore on the way over here. Good thing, he was on the ball too, or he would've tripped over them. ｜ 有同事在来的路上看到了一些新生的萃凝晶和魔晶矿，还好他反应快，不然就要被绊倒了。
- Massive Electro energy is coursing through this thundering ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Weapon Ascension Materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座雷鸣不止的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的雷元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得强化装备的物质。
- Have you learned your lesson now? ｜ 这下总该懂事一点了吧？
- If you've got some time to spare, you gotta come see it! We've got nothin' but 5-star reviews from everyone in town! ｜ 有时间一定要来看看我们表演啊你！街坊看过都说好！

- It's alright if you can't make time, though. No matter where you go, we will do our best to catch up to you. I'm sure we'll see each other again! ｜ 不过，就算你们一时抽不开身也没问题。不管你们旅行到哪里，我们都会想办法追上你们的脚步，还会再见的！

- Corrosion Resistance {0}.\n{1} Max Bokuso Box Energy.\nThe Bokuso Box can disperse normal darkness.\nThe Bokuso Box will mark out nearby Tokoyo Legumes and Aphotium Ore on the minimap.\nUsing the Bokuso Box will also mark out nearby treasure chests and challenges on the minimap. ｜ 抗侵蚀强度 {0}。\n睦疏之匣能量上限 {1}。\n睦疏之匣可驱散普通黑雾。\n睦疏之匣会在小地图上标记周围的常世之荚和渊海髓矿的位置。\n使用睦疏之匣，会在小地图标记周围的宝箱和挑战的位置。
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making Valley Stone Archway: Recurring Omen of Abundance.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「秀谷石坊-『丰兆往返』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Huh? No... of course not! ｜ 欸？没有吧…！
- Ah, yes. Seems I did mention that... ｜ 啊呀，好像是这么说过——
- After the character's Normal Attack hits an opponent, this opponent will be afflicted with a Sign of Snaring. After 3s, the Sign will be removed, dealing True DMG to this opponent. After a character's Normal Attack hits an opponent <color=#F39000FF>with a Sign of Snaring</color>, the DMG dealt by the Sign's removal will be increased. This DMG can be increased for no more than 9 times. ｜ 角色的普通攻击命中敌人后，将为该敌人施加滚奏之印。3秒后，滚奏之印将被移除，并对该敌人造成真实伤害。角色的普通攻击命中<color=#F39000FF>附有滚奏之印</color>的敌人后，将使滚奏之印移除时造成的伤害提高，至多提高9次。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>The character deals +1 DMG</color>.\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>When the character uses a Skill that costs at least a total of 5 Elemental Dice and Energy</color>, +2 additional DMG. (Once per Round) ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>角色造成的伤害+1</color>。\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>角色使用原本元素骰费用+充能费用至少为5的技能时，</color>伤害额外+2。（每回合1次）
- Okay, lemme think... To learn the game, you'll need at least two Character Cards to switch between... ｜ 我想想，学习基础规则至少得有两张可供切换的角色牌才行…
- Stairway to Wangshu ｜ 望舒须筑阶
- Only those who dare to refute the "truth" can gain true wisdom. It seems that such courage is not found in you. ｜ 只有敢于破斥真理之人才能获得真正的智慧，看来你也并无慧根。
- Being the charming and wealthy woman that she is, Ningguang has never had a shortage of suitors.\nIt seems that every eligible bachelor, from the young esquires of Yujing Terrace, to accomplished young businessmen, to renowned sea captains, has at some point invested substantial energy into trying to win Ningguang's affection. One rumor even has it that a wealthy businessman from the Court of Fontaine signed a major trade deal with Liyue Harbor for the sole reason that it would mean he could see Ningguang more often.\nNingguang treats all her suitors with an equal measure of kindness and grace, but also keeps them at distance — enough to keep them interested but not push them away. Curiosity got the better of everyone in town, and now everyone wants to know: Who is Ningguang's lover? \nLittle do they know, Ningguang has no love for finite things, and will certainly not be bound by something that is finite.\nThe Jade Chamber, a floating palace above Liyue Harbor, belongs to Ningguang alone. It started out about the size of a room, but has since grown so large that in the moonlight it casts its shadow over the whole of Liyue.\nA portion of Ningguang's seemingly limitless wealth goes towards hiring skilled craftsmen to continue the expansion and refurbishment of the Jade Chamber, ensuring that it becomes ever more extravagant as time goes by.\nTo Ningguang, the Jade Chamber is a symbol of her wealth and power, and a sign that her business is flourishing.\nSave for Mora, it is the thing Ningguang loves most in the world — because it is infinite.\nOne day, she insists, it will cast its shadow over all the seven nations of Teyvat. ｜ 像凝光这样富有魅力又家财万贯的女性，自然不会缺少异性的追求。\n出身玉京台的贵公子、事业有成的年轻富商、周游七国的大船长，都愿费尽心思换取凝光嫣然一笑。甚至传说有一位枫丹廷来的大老板，与凝光聊过几句，便下令签订与璃月港的贸易合约。如此大手笔，只为能更多地见到凝光。\n凝光对每一位追求者都彬彬有礼，保持着优雅体面又令人不失臆想的距离。这也渐渐成为璃月街头巷尾的热门话题：凝光大人究竟爱谁？\n人们并不知道，凝光不会爱「有限」之物，也不愿被「有限」所困。\n「群玉阁」，这座飞行在璃月港上空，只属于凝光的宫殿。起初，它只有房间大小，如今已能遮蔽璃月上空真正的银月了。\n凝光赚来的无尽财富，有相当一部分用在了邀请顶级工匠不断扩建「群玉阁」上，使其变得越发庞大华贵。\n在凝光看来，「群玉阁」象征着她的权威与魄力，是象征她生意运转良好的符号。\n它是凝光最爱的事物，仅次于摩拉。它几乎像是「无限」的。\n终有一日，它的影子会笼罩七国。
- As someone who watches over this system, I would hope that each river that flows from the source will eventually reach the ocean. ｜ 作为一个每天注视着湖泊的人，我希望每一条流出的河都能抵达大海。
- Kanjou Notice ｜ 勘定公告

When triggering a <color=#FFCC33>Vaporize or Melt</color> reaction, the character will be buffed. Seize victory on the blazing battlefield! ｜ 此地的敌人不耐久战，他们的防线将被熊熊的业火吞噬殆尽。触发<color=#FFCC33>蒸发或融化</color>反应时，角色会获得强化。在灼热的战意中利落地取胜吧！

- Now that you know the situation, are you willing to travel to the border and rescue Hu Tao and company? Your prior experience exploring that realm makes you our best hope. ｜ 情况大致如此，两位既有探索生死边界的经历，能否前去救援胡堂主一行？
- ...Oh, right, come to think of it, I've never seen her grown up. ｜ …啊，对啊，是我没见过她长大的样子啊…
- Oh no, run! ｜ 糟了，快跑！
- Even the most ordinary stretch of countryside, the humblest of hills, harbors poignant profundities from the distant past. ｜ 看似平平无奇的山野，其实蕴含着悠远的诗意。
- This domain looms large as you visit another island shrouded in illusion. The strange plants around this domain resemble instruments. Perhaps this might prove the ideal stage for a certain resident rocker to show her stuff? ｜ 造访另一座幻象笼罩的岛屿后，闯入众人视线的秘境。秘境周边盘踞着乐器般的奇妙植物，或许某位摇滚乐手能在这里尽情发挥自己的才能？

- Fontaine's land area was once greater than what it is now, but the diluvian periods have caused many places to become permanently submerged under water... ｜ 枫丹的陆地面积原本比现在要大，但涨水期时有许多地方都被淹没了…
- So, based on what you're saying, the Fontaine Research Institute is still unwilling to give up this "harmless" Arkhium project, yes? ｜ 所以照您的说法，枫丹科学院现在依旧不愿放弃「无害」的始基矿项目吗？
- The flowers of the Sacred Sakura tree bloom all year round, and they protect the peace and serenity of Inazuma. ｜ 「神樱树」常年花开，护稻妻永世安康。
- Who knows when we'll meet next... ｜ 不知道下一次见到你…又是什么时候呢。
- Record of the Tomb of Carouses ｜ 饱饮之陵的记录

You'll enjoy it more that way, I think."\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: "Candace" starts with the Talent Card "The Overflow" equipped.</color> ｜ 「不愧是你…既然如此，接下来的牌局，我也不会手下留情了，这样才能让你玩得尽兴。」\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】「坎蒂丝」初始装备有天赋牌「衍溢的汐潮」。</color>

- But after all that happened this time, I've... made up my mind to support her choice. ｜ 但经过这次的事之后…我现在很坚定，会选择支持她。

- Certified player Railah. A researcher who seems all but obsessed with her studies. She often says all manner of mysterious things while inviting others to play TCG matches with her. Her play style is as erratic as her speech, making her hard to read indeed... ｜ 协会认证牌手莱拉。似乎是醉心于某项研究的学者，总是一边唠叨着神秘的话语，一边邀请他人进行「七圣召唤」的对局。她的牌技正如她的语言风格，飘忽不定，让人难以捉摸…

- The shard of a weapon that you obtained from defeating Childe, who had unleashed the might of his Delusion.\nIt is stained with a profound color that is not of this world, no doubt due to the land of endless darkness that the young boy saw with his own two eyes.\nPerhaps it has nothing to do with the power of a Delusion, but as they say, the weapon reflects its user... ｜ 战胜解放了邪眼之力的「公子」后，得到的武器破片。\n因为曾经抵达无穷的至暗之地，以少年的双眼目睹了那个国度的漆黑，因此不可逆地染上了不应属于这个世界的深邃色彩。\n纵使「邪眼」的力量与其无关，但物似主人形…

- Shh, look over there. ｜ 嘘。看那边。
- A frying device made from durable stone and Sandbearer Wood that comes with a stove with great firepower that retains precise adjustability. The wok itself has an ingenious curvature that can improve the tea-frying efficiency.\nJust like in cooking, the higher the flame, the sterner the test of the teamaker's skills, because one must control the wok temperature very carefully when frying tea. Those who are qualified to control the stove in a teahouse are often artisans who can more than hold their own. ｜ 以耐用的「却砂木」与石料打造而成的炒青机器，有着火力强劲的灶台，且调节火焰大小的幅度和精度都相当可观。锅体的弧度设计颇为巧妙，也可有效提升炒茶的效率。\n与烹饪相同，越猛的火力越考验茶匠的技艺，因为炒茶时，需要严格控制锅内的温度。在茶坊中，有资格掌握炉灶的人，往往都是能独当一面的茶匠…

There is no consensus in Inazuma as to where the name "unagi" came from, but everyone at least agrees that it will take a whole lifetime to master its making. ｜ 烧烤而成的菜肴。切好的鳗肉，先通过蒸煮将多余的脂肪去除，再进行烤制后淋酱。关于这道菜的名字来由，在稻妻有着各种各样的说法，唯一得到一致认同的是：想要烤出完美的鳗肉，需要一生的专注。

- My my, such harsh words... It hurts to hear that kind of talk from you two. But, as you can clearly see, I'm here working like a dog for the festival, yet you say I'm not doing my job. ｜ 哎呀呀，我真是好伤心啊，明明人家就正在为祭典的事操劳，却被你们当成了不务正业。

Upon success, the less <color=#FFE14BFF>total Construction Points</color> you spent, the higher the score you will get. ｜ 在「试行模式」中，到达所有检定点后，即视为挑战成功，挑战成功时，搭建目前道路所花费的<color=#FFE14BFF>总体建造物材点</color>越低，就会获得越高的评价。
- Sorush ｜ 斯露莎
- And he has the gall to try and high-road us, claiming that he kept his mouth shut for the sake of the show! How about taking some responsibility for what he's done? ｜ 还大言不惭说什么为了演出，根本就是不敢承担责任！
- I may have gotten a little heated just now when talking about Genius Invokation TCG, but please don't paint me as some sort of battle-freak. ｜ 我刚刚聊到七圣召唤的时候情绪可能有些激动，但请不要把我当成什么战争狂热者。
- Isn't that fine, though? That's a problem child we're talking about — and any monster that eats him will inherit those problems. That'll save us some trouble, won't it? ｜ 不挺好吗？那可是问题小孩，吃掉他的魔物也会变得有问题。这样两边都解决了，一举两得！

- The inventor of Theater Mechanicus previously came to the Feiyun Commerce Guild seeking investment. Although the guild manager was not interested, Master still wanted to support them. ｜ 之前机关棋谭的发明人找到飞云商会，想拉我们的投资，虽然老爷不感兴趣，但二少爷还是想要支持的。
- Sounds like you have a favor to ask us, but Paimon's really not following... ｜ 听起来像是有事要委托我们，但我怎么听不懂你说的话…
- See, told you it would all work out! Didn't I mention I'm an old hand at this whole argument game? ｜ 我就说没问题的吧？吵架这方面我最有经验了。

- Are you still unable to let go of King Deshret's secrets? ｜ 还是放不下关于赤王的未解之谜吗？
- That really is a shame. ｜ 确实有点遗憾。
- Oh, Traveler? What brings you here? ｜ 旅行者？您怎么来了？

- Want to mix a drink? ｜ 想请你去调酒…

- Hehe, Paimon definitely would like to go first! ｜ 这样一说，有点跃跃欲试起来了！

- Please, gaze upon the radiant beauty of Ms. Hina, see how truly lovely she is... ｜ 请您务必看看希娜小姐，她真的非常可爱…

- After her Nightsoul points are depleted, Kachina will switch to consuming Phlogiston to maintain her Nightsoul's Blessing.\nWhile in an area with Phlogiston Mechanics within Natlan, she can use Nightsoul Transmission: Kachina. When the active character is currently sprinting, climbing, in a movement mode caused by certain Talents, or at a certain height in the air, the following will trigger when switching to Kachina: Kachina will enter the Nightsoul's Blessing state and ride <color=#FFD780FF>Turbo Twirly</color> when taking the field while gaining 30 Nightsoul points. Nightsoul Transmission can be triggered once every 10s by your own team.\n\nAdditionally, while in Natlan, Kachina will consume 90% less Stamina when climbing while riding <color=#FFD780FF>Turbo Twirly</color>. ｜ 在夜魂值耗竭后，卡齐娜将会转而消耗燃素来维持夜魂加持。\n在纳塔存在燃素机制的区域时，能够进行夜魂传递·卡齐娜。当前场上角色处于冲刺、攀爬或是特定天赋赋予的移动状态下，或是位于一定高度的空中时，切换卡齐娜登场时触发：卡齐娜将进入夜魂加持状态，搭乘<color=#FFD780FF>冲天转转</color>登场，并获得30点夜魂值。自己的队伍每10秒能触发一次夜魂传递。\n\n此外，位于纳塔地区时，卡齐娜搭乘<color=#FFD780FF>冲天转转</color>时攀爬消耗的体力降低90%。
- Dopey isn't the brightest, and he can't really understand or appreciate your exquisite choice of words. Please, show him clemency, Prinzessin... ｜ 「阿呆」不太懂事，听不懂皇女考究的用词，还请皇女见谅…

- I'm honored to have such a caring friend. ｜ 有你这样体贴的朋友，是我的荣幸。
- Oh! We finally found you! You're Arakunti, aren't you? ｜ 哦！可算找到你啦！你就是兰贡迪吧！
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nGo forth into The Chasm and help a researcher from Sumeru settle an ongoing crisis in which dark mud is spewing forth from its depths!\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 28 and complete the following requisites: complete the "Surreptitious Seven-Star Seal Sundering" World Quest to unlock the Underground Mines of The Chasm and obtain the Lumenstone Adjuvant in "Chasm Spelunkers" and upgrade it to Level 2.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nFrom the first day of the event, a new quest will unlock each day.\nYou must complete the previous day's quest to accept the newly-unlocked one.\nComplete the quests on each day to obtain the corresponding rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n前往层岩巨渊，帮助须弥学者处理黑泥爆发的危机吧！\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到28，完成前置任务「巧瞒七星解磐键」解锁层岩巨渊·地下矿区，在任务「方入巨渊初探勘」中获取流明石触媒，并强化等级到达2级。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n活动开始的第一天起，每天都会解锁相应的任务。\n新解锁的任务需完成前一天的任务后才能够接取。\n完成每日的活动任务以得到对应的活动奖励。
- Is... Is that really true? I've never heard of such a thing! ｜ 欸？欸！真的吗？我从来都没听说过！
- Please, I was only looking at them to get a better idea of what your new show may be about. ｜ 哪有的事，我只是在靠这些东西分析，你们新剧的内容是什么。
- Calm down, no need to panic. That's not why we're here. ｜ 别急，不用这么慌张，我们不是为了检查而来。
- But if we let nature seize control of its order once more, the people of Chenyu Vale will suffer and languish. I hope you can understand. ｜ 但如果任自然取回它的秩序，那对沉玉谷的人们都是有害的、倒退的。希望你能理解。
- Dance of the Shimmering Wave ｜ 浪沫的旋舞
- Finches often nest in the treetops, but even they find it hard to carry heavy berries high up into the branches with their small bodies...\nAs such, some clever clogs amongst them will pick up withered branches and leaves to construct a "secret base" behind tree stumps where cats rarely come calling. Apart from storing delicious treats beloved amongst Finches, they also contain tools for Finch use.\nFor example, pinecone hats to protect one's head when picking berries, or dried mint leaves for polishing one's claws... ｜ 团雀们常在树冠里筑巢，但它们用小小的身板拎着沉沉的浆果时，很难高高飞上枝头…\n为此，某些聪明的团雀会叼来枯枝落叶，在无猫问津的树桩后方搭建一个「秘密基地」。除了各种团雀喜爱的可口佳肴，基地里还存放着可供团雀们使用的道具。\n比如采摘浆果时保护脑袋的松果帽子，还有打磨爪子的干薄荷叶…
- Using an Elemental Skill increases DEF by <color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color> for 15s. ｜ 施放元素战技时，防御力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>24%</color>，持续15秒。

- Understood, Your Grace. ｜ 是的，这就去办。

- Estampe! Where have you been!? ｜ 埃斯唐普！你之前都去哪了！？
- You Fontainians and your tea drinking... ｜ 你们枫丹人还真是喜欢喝茶呢…

- But once they freeze on the spot, the potion will kick in, slowing their "subjective" time. ｜ 可一旦他们停止行动、僵在原地，长效溢神剂就会发生作用，让他们的「主观」时间变得非常缓慢。
- The Gnosis is long gone, then. ｜ 原来那个时候就已经…
- Wait, but if your illness "remained dormant" for several decades, are you saying that... what you're going through now is just a relapse of what happened all those years ago? ｜ 等下，你说「很多年都没有出过问题」。难道说你年轻时患的，就是现在正在发作的健忘症吗？
- Then we're home free. ｜ 就能出去了。
- I used to be a mercenary. I joined the Adventurers' Guild so I could take advantage of their superior intelligence network and track down the sword. ｜ 当初身为雇佣兵的我，为了找「剑」，想要利用冒险家协会的情报网，所以才加入了协会。
- These kids are taking their game so seriously... They're so committed... ｜ 这些小朋友们，玩得好认真啊，都好入戏…
- A flower carved from flint and Drakite, signifying that its bearer is qualified to become a beast tamer. ｜ 用燧石与龙晶镌刻而成的花，意味着佩戴者已获得成为驯兽师的资格。
- Manage Ads Sharing Preferences ｜ 营销授权管理
- I really miss it... Although there seem to be few people brewing the "Thousand-Wind Wine" now, the return of the west wind is still so familiar... ｜ 真怀念啊…虽然现在似乎很少有人酿造「千风佳酿」了，但归来的西风却还是那样熟悉…
- #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}, try going over there. ｜ #{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}，试着到那去哦。
- But now... Think about it. The commissioner wouldn't lack for good doctors around his person. But what about Yashiori Island? The only person the sick here can count on is me. ｜ 但现在…你想想，奉行大人身边名医不会少，可八酝岛呢？这里的病人只有我一个医生可以依靠了。
- Umbrella of Calm ｜ 安淳伞叶
- Bleh, forget about it. I wouldn't last ten seconds in there... ｜ 还是算了吧，我可受不了…
- Where are they now? ｜ 海螺现在在哪？
- Ah, Mr. Noailles. Your timing couldn't be better. Could I ask you about the results of the investigation into Caterpillar... ｜ 诺瓦勒斯看守，您来得正好，关于卡特皮拉的调查结果…
- Crucible of Intense Purity ｜ 猛烈纯洁坩埚
- I'm sorry... I'm the one to blame for all this. I've always had bad luck and it always rubs off on everyone around me... ｜ 对不起…这些事得怪我。我的运气一向很差，留在我身边也会被我传染…
- I'm sure she won't mind having two lovely children like you over for snacks, especially since you're helping us with some of the chores. ｜ 请两个可爱的孩子帮点小忙，吃些点心，我想莫蒂西娅是不会有意见的。
- There's a Shade of Tokoyo here, huh? Could he be... Bunkoku? ｜ 居然有一个「常世之灵」在这里…他难道就是文谷？
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Maybe he got locked up again by that partner of his... ｜ 说不定他又被关进别的笼子里了…
- I recall you telling me previously that your most rigorous superior had to return to the city to hand in those most complicated documents. I imagine that was a terribly grueling ordeal... ｜ 您之前和我说，您那位严谨的上司为了递交那些繁复的文书，不得不前往城内工作，想必肯定十分劳苦。
- Everyone looks keen to learn. ｜ 感觉大家听得好认真。
- Of course. I'm sure you've realized that as long as I remained at this center, he would be able to use my name to advertise this place. Even if I just sit back and do nothing, others will be deceived and suffer because of me. ｜ 你应该意识到了吧？只要我在这里，他就能利用我的名声做宣传。哪怕我什么都不做，也会有人因我受骗。
- There was a really dishonest merchant who tried to register Monsieur Neuvillette's name as a trademark! The merchant even hired two bigshot lawyers to support their case, the whole city was up in arms! ｜ 之前有个奸商想用那维莱特大人的尊名申请商标，还找了两位大律师撑腰，闹得满城风雨。

- Well, it's not always a good thing to know more. The more news you hear, the more bothered you will be. After a while, even a happy life will be beyond your reach... ｜ 有时候啊，事情不是知道得越多就越好。消息越多，烦恼就越多，烦恼一多，就没办法开开心心的了…
- Casting <color=#FFD780FF>Rites of Termination</color> increases CRIT Rate of all nearby party members (except Rosaria herself) by 15% of Rosaria's CRIT Rate for 10s.\nCRIT Rate Bonus gained this way cannot exceed 15%. ｜ 施放<color=#FFD780FF>终命的圣礼</color>时，基于自身暴击率的15%，提高附近的队伍中所有角色（不包括罗莎莉亚自己）的暴击率，持续10秒。\n通过这种方式获得的暴击率提升，无法超过15%。

- Might it be that you have come to do business with me, the Lord Sangemah Bay? Hahaha, of course, of course! Please, give me a moment to conclude our business here, then I'll be with you straight away. ｜ 莫非，是有生意要找我桑歌玛哈巴依老爷？啊哈哈，当然好！稍等片刻，我结束这边的交易就来陪你。

- This realm is truly beginning to thrive. I cannot help but be stirred... ｜ 这片洞天啊，越来越繁华了，我也难免触景生情咯…
- ...Why? ｜ …为什么？
- Well, he is, blast him — but he always acts seriously and makes others do the work! ｜ 那个可恶的家伙，分明是我的下属，却总是摆出一副严肃的样子来，让其他人努力工作！

- Mary-Ann ｜ 玛丽安

- Rich rewards! ｜ 有丰厚的报酬！

- A swarm of Wenut. For some reason, they have recently become unusually violent, hiding in sandstorms to attack unsuspecting prey passing by. ｜ ——是一群沙虫。也不知道为什么，它们的性情最近变得异常凶暴，还会潜藏在沙暴里袭击过往的猎物。
- I will never find a way to repay him fully. Now that he's in trouble, I have to find a way to help him get back on his feet... ｜ 师父的救命之恩我永生难报，现在师父深陷困境，我也要想办法帮他才是…
- Memory is a mysterious thing indeed. Losing a portion of your memories will alter your sense of self. Lose ten years' worth, however, and it would be like living in the past, like returning to a version of yourself that never grew up. ｜ 人的记忆是一种很神奇的东西，失去部分记忆会改变自我认知，失去十年间的所有记忆，则会回到没长大的「过去」。
- "According to residents of Aaru Village, there were cured Eleazar patients who'd escaped from there." ｜ 「听阿如村的人说，曾经还有被治愈的魔鳞病患者从那里逃出来。」
- Seems like it's leading us somewhere... ｜ 好像在指引我们去什么地方…

- A display model based on clockwork meka and Pneumousia installations that can be found in the Fortress of Meropide. Only the appearance is the same as the original, as it possesses none of the original's most basic functionality. In theory, programming a clockwork meka to patrol a specific area and equipping it with the intelligence to maintain law and order requires regular maintenance from an engineering specialist, and that doesn't come cheap. As a purely ornamental decoration, it requires none of the high capital costs or difficulties of maintaining an operational device. Preserving only the outward appearance and majesty of the original is certainly a valid option. ｜ 以「梅洛彼得堡」中可见的发条机关与芒荒设施为原型制作的展示模型，仅有着与原品完全一致的外观，并不具备基本的功能。理论上，要想让发条机关按照设置在特定区域内巡逻，承担维护治安的智能，需要专门的工程师对其定期保养，费用也并不低廉。高昂的成本和各种麻烦都不适合一种观赏性摆设，因此，保留最直观的威严外表也不失为一种选择。

- Gathering the strength of stone around her weapon, Noelle strikes the opponents surrounding her within a large AoE, dealing <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG</color>.\nAfterwards, Noelle gains the following effects:\n·Larger attack AoE.\n·Converts attack DMG to <color=#FFE699FF>Geo DMG</color> that cannot be overridden by any other elemental infusion.\n·Increased ATK that scales based on her DEF.\n\n<i>Sometimes, it's not just dust that needs sweeping...</i> ｜ 将磐石的力量凝聚在武器上，冲击周围的敌人并进行一次大范围扫击，造成<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素伤害</color>。\n此后，获得如下效果：\n·提高诺艾尔的攻击范围；\n·将攻击伤害转为<color=#FFE699FF>岩元素伤害</color>，该元素转化无法被附魔覆盖；\n·基于诺艾尔的防御力，提高攻击力。\n\n<i>需要扫除的，有时不仅仅是灰尘…</i>

- Or perhaps I could sing the praises of the countless gorgeous maidens in the Court of Fontaine, ethereal as the clouds themselves... ｜ 还是说，我应当从枫丹廷说起：当我走在枫丹廷的街道上，如同云朵一般轻盈的淑女，从我的两边穿过…

- Well then. The animals are in your hands. ｜ 总之，小动物就拜托你了。

- Sounds like a seriously exaggerated analogy! ｜ 听起来像是很夸张的比方！
- Samail, we've solved everything for you and brought you to the throne. Your dream... should be fulfilled. Jeht is useless to you, so why keep her? ｜ 萨梅尔，我们已经为你解开了所有谜题，将你带到了御座之前，你的愿望…应该已经实现了，婕德于你无用，何必继续扣留她。
- I actually have the same concern... ｜ 其实我也有些担心…
- If only we'd made less noise.. ｜ 要是再小心点就好了…
- About Mona ｜ 关于莫娜…
- Let me part this violet mist and open a path for the Khvarena. ｜ 让我驱散这些紫色烟霭，为灵光开辟通路。
- Would you like to have a chat with me? ｜ 想一起聊聊天吗？
- You two wish to meet with Sumeru's archon. Understood. Please wait... ｜ 好的，二位想要见须弥的神明大人，请稍等…
- Still musing about that, hmm... I suppose you're remembering the events with Jiangli and Jialiang from last time? It did cross our minds as well. ｜ 魔神残渣啊？你们是不是想到了上次江蓠和嘉良的事呀？其实我们也想过了。
- Let's go back and talk to Jeht! ｜ 我们快回去找婕德吧！
- Honestly, just listening to you talk about your travels makes me want to travel myself! ｜ 哈哈哈，听着你说的这些，我都有点想去外面旅行了。
- Please take extra care in your investigation, you two. ｜ 二位在途中请多加留意、多多调查。
- #{NICKNAME}! Paimon! What are you doing here? ｜ #{NICKNAME}、派蒙，这么巧，你们也来了？
- Such a great end to the play. You've done well, young one. How did you find it? Was it hard to perform with paper? ｜ 这出戏算是完美落幕了，年轻人，你做得不错。感觉怎么样，演纸映剧难不难？
- Really? You don't need to try to make us feel better... ｜ 真的吗？不用安慰我们也行…
- No. I don't need it. ｜ 不需要。
- "But he's a destitute scholar who loves citing the classics and going off on tangents. Added to the fact that I drank a lot with him to get the conversation going, I can't remember what he said very clearly. I think the crux of it was that it had something to do with some golden stone and Ruin Hunters... That old man really can drink a lot." ｜ 「但因为他是个穷文人，说话总爱引经据典，绕一堆弯子。加上当时为了套话，跟他喝了不少酒，具体说了啥都记不清了。总之，要点应该和啥金色石头，以及遗迹猎者有关吧…老头子真能喝。」
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启

- Haha, how sweet of you to say. Then I have no choice but to assist you in earnest. ｜ 哈哈，嘴真甜。既然如此，我也得认真帮忙才行了。

- Huh. Why's there a stone tablet here? ｜ 咦，在这里怎么会有一块石碑…
- I've been in contact with Francis. He's received that batch of goods — thanks a lot. ｜ 我和弗朗西斯联络过了，那批货物他已经收到，多亏了你。

- You'd have to ask Tubby for her permission on that... ｜ 可能要问问阿圆的意见…
- A traditional Liyue dessert dish. The large chunk of fruit soaked in the soup seems like unto a lonesome boat drifting down a flowing river, and the fresh taste of the dish assails like a sudden breeze. ｜ 传统的璃月甜品。大片的果块浸于澄莹汤水之中，宛若一叶舟行于汨汨流淌的一湾溪水之上，舌尖的花果香气便是那一缕袭人的清风。
- Were I to accept your goodwill, I may find myself embroiled in conflicts between the Shogunate and Sangonomiya. That would not suit me. ｜ 如果我接受了来自您的好意，可能还会陷入幕府与珊瑚宫的矛盾漩涡之中，这并不适合我。
- Although it looks like I'm just hanging around with nothing to do, inside, I'm distraught about the path ahead. Granny Citlali is blocking my way and I can't get past. ｜ 我只是看上去无所事事，其实在为前路感到烦恼，奶奶她成了拦路虎，让我无路可走。

- When a character obtains an Elemental Shard created by a Geo Elemental Reaction, a small shockwave will be unleashed that will deal 500% of that character's ATK as DMG to nearby opponents. Additionally, all characters in the party gain a 40% Geo DMG Bonus for 10s after this effect is triggered. These effects can be triggered once every 5s and this CD is shared between all party members. ｜ 角色获得岩元素反应产生的晶片时，会释放小型冲击波，基于该角色的攻击力的500%对周围的敌人造成伤害。此外，触发该效果后的10秒内，队伍中所有角色获得40%岩元素伤害加成。该效果每5秒至多触发一次，队伍中所有角色共享冷却。

- Ei plants the seed of light, and your sense of time starts to blur as Inazuma's centuries of history blaze by in point form. The two gods pass you by, the Sacred Sakura blazes from the present into the past, and Ei walks from the "now" into the "future" — thus does Eternity enter a new chapter.\nRaiden Makoto: The miracle tree that blesses the people, in this moment new to the world and yet to be known.\nRaiden Makoto: When to plant it, where it shall bloom... She who brings it into being must let her heart and dreams decide.\nRaiden Makoto: Grant it life, Ei.\nRaiden Ei: Is this... is it really...\nRaiden Makoto: Eternity extends time into infinity, dreams illuminate each moment within.\nRaiden Makoto: When both shine in unison, the Sacred Sakura blooms from the darkness, finally free from the clutches of the Heavenly Principles.\nRaiden Makoto: Now, the nightmare has dissipated, and reality is made whole. The vision we both yearn for is still further ahead.\nRaiden Makoto: My only regret is that I cannot witness Inazuma's future, nor can I walk this journey with you.\nRaiden Makoto: Do you know, Ei, I am so happy right now. Because my final wish has now come true.\nRaiden Makoto: Your polearm once protected me from countless calamities. For this, I've always felt indebted to you.\nRaiden Makoto: Though I could never repay you in full, this Sacred Sakura will buy you some time until you are ready to awaken and embrace the new.\nRaiden Makoto: What do you think? Did it do the trick?\nRaiden Makoto: This time, it really is goodbye, Ei.\nRaiden Ei: Goodbye, Makoto. ｜ 光团化作的种子由影种下，时间的概念逐渐模糊，稻妻几百年的经历以符号的形式展开。两位神明擦肩而过，神樱由「现在」飞往「过去」，影由「现在」走向「未来」，永恒终于揭开新篇。\n雷电真：庇佑万民的奇迹之木，此刻仍然是无人所见的陌生存在。\n雷电真：它于何时落地，又在何处发芽，都取决于令它降生之人的心与梦。\n雷电真：赐它生命吧，影。\n雷电影：难道，这是…\n雷电真：永恒令时间无限延展，梦想使每一个刻度都熠熠生辉。\n雷电真：两者交相辉映，神樱终将不拘于天理之禁锢，自漆黑中绽放。\n雷电真：至此，噩梦消散，现实圆满，你我共同向往的光景仍在前方。\n雷电真：只可惜，我无法见证稻妻的未来，也无法再与你同行了。\n雷电真：你知道吗？影，我现在很开心。因为我最后的心愿也实现了。\n雷电真：你的薙刀曾为我挡下无数灾厄，我一直觉得，我对你有所亏欠。\n雷电真：虽然只是微不足道的报答，在你真正醒来，迎来新的相遇之前，这棵神樱会为你争取时间。\n雷电真：怎么样，它应该已经起到作用了吧？\n雷电真：这次是真的再见了，影。\n雷电影：嗯。再见了，真。

Between mouthfuls of delicious meat and rich sauce, one bowl of rice might seem too measly a match for this taste experience! ｜ 璃月烧腊之一。色红而腴，味香而浓，恐怕再多看一眼就要馋晕过去。入口是甘旨的肉与丰盈的汁，只搭配一碗米饭真是远远不够！

- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nOne day, you receive a commission from the Fontaine Fishing Association. In accordance with the commission's requirements, you and Paimon go to Erinnyes to investigate, the curtain rises on a wondrous new adventure...\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20, and complete the Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom." (Complete the Archon Quest "Masquerade of the Guilty" to get the best experience from this event.)\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\nThe Thelxie's Fantastic Adventures event is divded into 3 themes.\n\nTheme 1: Motherboard Troubleshooting\nBuild and complete circuits to guide the signal to its destination and adjust the motherboard to troubleshoot issues.\n\nTheme 2: Record of the Search for Glory\nExplore different bodies of water, and find special items with the help of the Echoing Conch...\n\nTheme 3: Purgation Counterstrike\nGo to designated location, defeat enemies, and protect the peace of the Kingdom of Water Imps together with the Prince... ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n这天，你收到了枫丹钓鱼协会的委托。按照要求，你与派蒙前往了伊黎耶岛调查，一场奇妙的历险即将拉开帷幕…\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并完成以下前置任务：「巨龙与自由之歌」。（完成魔神任务「罪人舞步旋」后体验更佳。）\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n「特尔克西的奇幻历险」活动分为三个主题：\n\n主题一·「主板调试问题集」\n通过搭建回路，引导信号前往信号终点以调试主板解决问题。\n\n主题二·「参寻荣耀追游录」\n探索各处的海域，在回响海螺的指引下，寻找特定的物品…\n\n主题三·「肃清邪物反击战」\n前往指定地点，战胜敌人，与王子一同守护水妖王国的和平…
- Or maybe there's something on my person that attracts them? I don't really get it either... ｜ 或者说，是我身上有什么特别的东西吸引它？我是弄不清楚…
