- Monsieur Neuvillette rarely appears in public, almost as if he's intentionally trying to put some distance between himself and the people. At first, I thought it might be just me, but my ever-observant sister noticed it too, so I suppose that must really be the case. ｜ 那维莱特先生很少公开露面，似乎刻意和人们保持着距离。一开始我还以为是我的错觉，但观察最最敏锐的琳妮特也有同感，那看来确实是这样了。

- You and Ayaka stroll through the woods in the gentle moonlight. In this quiet and tranquil atmosphere, Ayaka once again asks you to witness her doing something she has always wanted to do:\n Drawing out her paper fan, Ayaka steps into the stream, and with her song, she dances in the moonlight with the grace of a white heron in flight.\n After the dance, Ayaka looks at you, her cheeks a rosy red. So this is what she wanted to ask you to witness. ｜ 你们与绫华漫步于林间，漫步于温柔的月色下。在这静谧安宁的氛围中，绫华再次请求你，见证她完成一件她一直想做的事：\n抽出纸扇，步入溪水，伴着自己的歌声，绫华在月光下起舞，风姿卓然宛如翩飞的白鹭。\n舞毕，绫华带着羞赧的神情看向你，原来这就是她想请你见证的事。

- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- An elegant Liyue zither featuring a slender body and peg protectors shaped like crane feathers. Made with wood of only the finest quality and inlaid with exquisite gilded designs.\nThe lustre of the strings seems to shine, each one tough and durable, with treble notes ringing clear as water and its bass bold and forceful. When played lightly, it is like a breeze on a cloudy night whistling through the mountains. When played with vigor, it is as though a great battle is being waged with golden weapons hidden beneath each string. Gentleness and strength are coupled as one, and within this instrument is contained both poetry and power. ｜ 外观典雅的璃月古琴，有着形似鹤羽的护轸、修长的琴身，所用木材的质地绝佳，饰有鎏金的花纹。\n琴弦的色泽明丽，质地坚韧，高音清澈似水，低音刚劲有力，轻灵演奏时，若有流云晚风在山间奏鸣，倾力烈奏时，亦有金戈之声藏于弦底。刚柔并济，雅致与雄浑兼备。

- #When purchasing a Gnostic Hymn or Gnostic Chorus, the following limitations apply:\n1. If the Gnostic Hymn is only purchased on any platform other than PlayStation, its rewards cannot be claimed via the{SPACE}"PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Network."{SPACE}The opposite is also true. If only purchased via the{SPACE}"PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store,"{SPACE}rewards cannot be claimed on platforms other than PlayStation.\n2. If the Gnostic Chorus is only purchased on platforms other than PlayStation, its rewards cannot be claimed via the{SPACE}"PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Network."{SPACE}The opposite is also true. If only purchased via the{SPACE}"PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store,"{SPACE}rewards cannot be claimed on platforms other than PlayStation.\n3. If the Gnostic Hymn is purchased via platforms other than PlayStation before being upgraded to a Gnostic Chorus via the{SPACE}"PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store,"{SPACE}the current rewards can be claimed via any platform. Similarly, if the Gnostic Hymn is purchased via the{SPACE}"PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store"{SPACE}and then upgraded to a Gnostic Chorus via a platform other than PlayStation, the current rewards can be claimed via any platform. ｜ #购买「珍珠纪行」与「珍珠之歌」时，有如下限制规则：\n1. 若仅在除PlayStation以外的平台购买「珍珠纪行」，则无法通过 "PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Network" 领取这一期的纪行奖励，反之亦然：仅在 "PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store" 购买时，无法在除PlayStation以外的平台领取。\n2. 若仅在除PlayStation以外的平台购买「珍珠之歌」，则无法通过 "PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Network" 领取这一期的纪行奖励，反之亦然：仅在 "PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store" 购买时，无法在除PlayStation以外的平台领取。\n3. 若在除PlayStation以外的平台购买了「珍珠纪行」，并在 "PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store" 将其升级为「珍珠之歌」，则可以通过所有平台领取这一期的纪行奖励。同样，若在 "PlayStation{NON_BREAK_SPACE}Store" 购买「珍珠纪行」，并在除PlayStation以外的平台将其升级为「珍珠之歌」，则可以通过所有平台领取当期奖励。
- If it's just a meal... there's no reason for me to decline. It'll be my pleasure, Huixin. ｜ 只是一顿饭的话…我好像也没理由好推辞了，那就听你的安排吧，慧心。

- Talent Level-Up material.\nFreedom is the spirit of the land of the wind.\nTo sing is one such freedom. To sing on the land created by the Anemo Archon is to send your heart away with the song on the wind. ｜ 天赋培养素材。\n风之国土的精神是自由。\n自由其三，是歌唱的自由，即是能在风之神塑造的美好土地上歌唱，让自己的心与歌一同随风而去的自由。

- A gift from Alice, this hardcover storybook features an exquisitely carved cover. With the guidance of this book, you arrived in a world called "Simulanka" and experienced an adventure of heroes and dragons.\nAll adventures have their end, and all stories have their conclusion. Or perhaps this adventure itself was but a beautiful "illusion," while the memories of your adventures together with your friends is an incomparably vivid "reality," one that will live on forever in your hearts. ｜ 来自魔女艾莉丝的礼物，一本配有雕饰封面的精装童话书。在这本童话书的指引下，你们来到了名为「希穆兰卡」的世界，并经历了一场关于勇者与龙的冒险。\n所有的冒险都有终点，所有的故事都有结局。或许，这场冒险本身只是一方美丽的「虚影」，但与朋友们一同冒险的回忆却是真切无比的「实景」，并将永远在你们心中留存。

- Oh, does the paper happen to have a poem written on it? ｜ 万叶，你捡到的纸上是不是写了一首诗？
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- A large doll in the shape of a tanuki, which can never be pushed down, is based on a character from one of the popular light novels by Yae Publishing House:\nA chef who accidentally acquired divine power and is able to release a "Real Cooking Skills" barrier, in which other chefs will lose all their means of cheap tricks and can only compete with their competitors with their real skills. At that time, this character will be able to win the cooking showdown with their solid foundation.\nThis doll is ranked 22nd in sales among all light novel derivative products by Yae Publishing House and is occasionally sold at festival booths. Logically speaking, as a derivative product that is the protagonist of the work, its sales should be very high. However, after investigation, it is clear that most of the readers who like this character are chefs with mediocre skills. Perhaps the target audience of this character is slightly skewed... ｜ 狸猫造型的大型玩偶，永远无法被推倒，其原型是「八重堂」某本热销轻小说中的角色：\n偶然间获得了魔神之力的厨师，能够放出「真实厨艺」的结界，位于这个结界中的其他厨师会失去一切投机取巧的能力，只能凭真本事与竞争对手一较高下。届时，这位角色就能凭借自己扎实的基本功赢得厨艺对决。\n这种玩偶的销量在「八重堂」所有轻小说的衍生商品中排行第二十二，还偶尔会在祭典的摊位上贩售。照理来说，身为作品主角的衍生商品，它的销量应该很高才对。但经过调查可知，喜欢这个角色的读者，大多是技艺平庸的厨师，或许这位角色的目标受众出现了偏差…

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Someone complained that you're too loud. ｜ 有人说你们太吵了。
- I have taken what you said recently to heart and tried to make a few adjustments in my life. ｜ 我之前按你说的，试着对自己的生活做出一些改变。

As such, folklore describes these timid finches as portents of disaster, for when they begin to hurriedly flee, that means ruination must not be too far behind. ｜ 在枫丹常见的小型鸣禽，歌声悦耳动听。\n据说，青冠雀对外界反应十分灵敏，一有风吹草动就会立刻丢弃巢穴逃走。故此在民间传说中，胆小怕事的青冠雀往往象征着灾厄的预警者。当其仓促逃离之日，就是灾难临近之时。

- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- Ah! Albedo!? Are... are you okay? ｜ 啊！阿贝多？！你、你没事吧？
- Duel on the Fanatic Passion difficulty once ｜ 参与一次狂热难度的比试
- A cup carved out of ice that is as chilly and biting as winter. Its former master would drink an unfreezable liquor from it. ｜ 用寒冰雕制成的杯盏，如冬天一般坚利。曾经的主人从中啜饮过不冻之酒。
- I do want to go out and investigate, yes... But help is needed inside the city, too, and that's very important! I can't just drop my duties like that... ｜ 虽然我确实很想去野外调查…但城里也需要有人帮忙，城里的事也很重要！我可不能擅离职守…
- Oh, are you interested in Yalda Candies? I have some boxes of candy here. Pick whichever one you want. ｜ 哦对了，你们对雅尔达糖果感兴趣吗，我这有几个糖果盒子，你们随便挑。
- Agh, it's nothing major. Can't talk about it right now, though... ｜ 啊，不是什么大事，现在也没法跟你说…
- Help Mountain adjust the three Monoliths ｜ 帮助大山调整三处镇石
- I agree! You were the one who invited the Traveler to be the teacher, so you should cooperate, Captain. ｜ #说的对呀！大姐头，旅行者可是您请来当老师的，{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}有需要，您怎么也得配合配合…
- Huh? Xiao... Are you here for the festival? ｜ 咦？ 魈…你是来海灯节玩的吗？
- Night Raven Warrior ｜ 战士夜鸦
- The shrine maiden Miyuki is currently having a massive headache over the abnormal state of the Thunder Sakura in Kannazuka... ｜ 巫女阿幸正在为神无冢上雷樱树的异状而头痛…
- In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- What I hear is that, as it just so happens, the Knights of Favonius caught some Treasure Hoarders making camp in the Dragonspine foothills. ｜ 听说骑士团那边，最近恰巧抓到了几个在雪山脚下扎营的盗宝团成员。
- The Starry Skies Their Flowers Rain ｜ 星天的花雨
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a "Garden Stellar Musical Pillar."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『庭园的星辉乐柱』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- Wait... Was it Bartobas? O—Or was it Barsibato? I feel like I said it wrong again. ｜ 等等…应该是巴托巴斯？还是巴斯巴托来着。刚才好像又说错了。
- Ahem... Yes, you can say that. In the settings that many people imagine, this is known as a Starconch, and it dwells in the sea. H—However, in the setting I have created, its name is the Great Future Star. ｜ 咳咳…也能这么说，在许多人的设定里它叫星螺，是长在海里的。但…但是在我的设定里，它的名字叫大未来星。
- *sigh* Though we don't know how long peace can last this time around, the thought of being able to go home still gets me all teary-eyed... ｜ 唉…虽然对和平能持续多久还抱有疑虑，但是只要一想到能回家，就忍不住热泪盈眶了…
- Now that the toymakers' problems are resolved, let's visit Tanger and Razi! ｜ 阿折罗造像的危机已经解决。接下来的拜访对象是拉齐与丹吉尔。
- Hmm, no, that's not right. If they turn back into normal rocks, there'd be no profit to be made... ｜ 呃，不，变成普通陨石之后，不就没得赚了吗…
- "Enri" ｜ 「昂利」
- The Acting Grand Master of the Knights of Favonius is also very interested in meeting you, and formally invites you both to <color=#00E1FFFF>our headquarters</color>. ｜ 代理团长大人对两位也很有兴趣，希望能在<color=#00E1FFFF>骑士团总部</color>一叙。
- I like a big tray of seafood, no turf, all surf! And no veggies either! One bite makes me feel like a little fish swimming around the sea... Ah, so satisfying! ｜ 那种一盘子端上来，不带一点蔬菜，也没有禽肉和兽肉的纯海鲜大餐，吃上一口，就像扎进海里一样，化作一条小鱼，游来游去…唔…太满足了。
- We need someone who understands geology and ore. ｜ 这份工作需要了解地质与矿石的人哦。
- Don't lose sight of why we're traveling, Paimon... ｜ 派蒙，不要忘记旅行的目的…
- I'm surprised you were willing to come to Sumeru City at all. ｜ 你居然肯来须弥城了。
- Detect and dig up Challenge Coins from underground! ｜ 探测并挖掘出地下的挑战币！
- And Fischl... Her words are as impressive as ever! ｜ 菲谢尔前辈…她说的话也一如既往地很有气势！
- Remember that strange mist we found earlier? I would like to investigate that further. ｜ 你还记得那个雾气吗？我想再调查一下。
- ...Back then, no one imagined this feral child would grow up to be the strongest warrior of the Flower-Feather Clan. ｜ …谁都想不到，那个野孩子能长成花羽会最强的战士吧。

- Hmm... I'm starting to have second thoughts... ｜ 呜…内心有点动摇…

Its attacks will create Wards for itself, nearby Shadowy Husks, and Black Serpent Knights at the cost of its HP after they <color=#FFE14BFF>hit characters defended by Shields</color>. ｜ 谜样的漆黑旗手。它的攻击在<color=#FFE14BFF>命中处于护盾庇护下的角色</color>后，会以生命值为代价，为自己、身边的「黯色空壳」与「黑蛇骑士」创造护罩。
- ...Paimon doesn't think that's the problem here! Anyway, like Arama said, "striking really really hard" should take them down. ｜ …应该不是休息的问题吧！不管怎样，像兰罗摩说的，「很用力很用力打」，总归是能解决的吧！

- And Ruu's here too. I don't think he'll let us do this, considering that he's the son of the priest and all... ｜ 而且，阿瑠也来了。既然是祭司家的孩子，应该不会允许…

- ...Why am I the only one dying here? ｜ …为什么死的只有我？

- Yeah. If Babel didn't have me doing commissions for other assignments, I would be exploring the desert right alongside you. ｜ 嘿嘿，如果不是芭别尔主母还委托了其他任务，我就也陪你一起去沙漠里探险啦。
- They tricked Miss Carole into going to the crime scene and pressed charges against her. After that, they incited panic among the people in order to make Monsieur Neuvillette confess to his mistakes and yield up power. ｜ 他们将卡萝蕾小姐骗去凶案现场，让她背负嫌疑，之后着手制造恐慌，想要逼迫那维莱特大人承认错误、让出更多权力。
- This looks so much better. This is a... reconstruction project, right? It's just like how they rebuilt the Fontaine Research Institute, and restored the ruins to its original state. ｜ 这样看起来好太多了，嗯。这就是重建工程吧，就像重建枫丹科学院一样，把损毁的废墟恢复成原本应有的模样。
- I slept okay-ish before I came to the Akademiya, but since I started my studies... there's so much pressure... I just want to be able to sleep the whole night throo-hoo-hoough... ｜ 从前我还没进入教令院念书的时候，睡眠质量还算过得去。但自从在这里学习之后…唔，压力实在是太恐怖了…我真的很想每天安安稳稳一觉到天亮，呜呜…
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Eh? Wait, it seems like there's someone over there... ｜ 欸？等等，那边好像有个人…

- My wound aside, you look like... you've seen something unpleasant. Is Haypasia alright? ｜ 比起我，你的表情…有些难看啊。海芭夏她怎么样了？
- But now, I can finally share what's in my heart with Panuelle. ｜ 现在，我总算能把我的心里话告诉帕纽尔了。

- Hah, pretty good, Jeht. Made the best of some rather limited information on our foes there. ｜ 不愧是婕德呢，从这样有限的信息里就能推断出敌人是谁。

- Help Needed:\nThe fresh flowers I've bought for use in performances have almost all wilted.\nGoing onstage with withered flowers is just depressing. The more depressed I get, the poorer I perform, and the more the manager yells at me.\n*sigh* Well, guess I need some fresh Sumeru Roses urgently, then, or it'll be impossible for me to work.\nCould someone bring <color=#3399CC>10 Sumeru Roses</color> to the Grand Bazaar? If you don't mind, you can stay for my performance as well. ｜ 求助：\n这几天刚买来的演出用鲜花已经谢得差不多了。\n捧着凋谢的花演出真让人沮丧，越沮丧就越是表演不好，越要被经理人训斥。\n唉，我迫切地需要一些新鲜的须弥蔷薇振奋心情，否则这工作真是做不下去了。\n有人能送<color=#3399CC>十朵须弥蔷薇</color>到大巴扎这里来吗？你愿意的话，还可以顺带看看我们的演出。

- These drums were created by the Order of Skeptics' ancestors. Hit them according to a specific method to cause the elemental power within to resound...\nThere are three ways of hitting these drums. <color=#FFE14BFF>Normal Attacks</color> will create a light sound, while <color=#FFE14BFF>Plunging Attacks</color> will create a heavy one. <color=#FFE14BFF>Stay still</color> to create a pause. ｜ 过去由矫论团的先辈所制造的鼓，按照特定的方式敲击似乎便能震响其中的元素之力…\n俱利鼓有三种敲击方式，对其使用<color=#FFE14BFF>普通攻击</color>能够击出轻响，使用<color=#FFE14BFF>下落攻击</color>则会击出重响，<color=#FFE14BFF>停止不动</color>则为空拍。

- That doesn't sound like too much of a bad thing, to be honest. ｜ 听上去好像也并不是什么坏事。

- Food ｜ 食物
- A common avian species in Teyvat. Plump and meaty, but can also be trained to deliver messages.\nAn ordinary pigeon that takes its name from its glaze-like glossy neck. Because it is such a common sight to both people and animals alike, few take much note of its gorgeous plumage. Even when they land on the backs of Forest Boars, the heads of Snow Foxes, or next to Frogs, no one seems to notice them. ｜ 提瓦特常见的鸟类，肉质肥美，训练后也能远程传信。\n普通的鸽子，因琉璃光泽的头颈而得名。由于过于常见，许多人和动物已经不再对这种鸽子美丽的毛色多加注意。哪怕这种鸽子落在野林猪的背上，雪狐的头顶和青蛙们的身边，大家也像是没看见它们一样，完全没有反应。

- Linyang ｜ 琳阳
- The great dragon erected many peculiar structures across the land. In the ancient legends, the great dragon's outstretched wings could together blot out the light of the sky. Perhaps such descriptions were not hyperbole, or perhaps such wording was a metaphor for their desire to see beyond the sky.\nBut now, the traces of said ancient dragon have already vanished, and the people of today can only but glimpse the forging techniques of that ancient civilization through the shattered remnants of those massive structures and their patterns. ｜ 巨龙曾在大地上竖立诸多构型奇特的建筑。古老的传说中，巨龙的羽翼相互勾连便可遮住天光，或许这形容并未存有夸张之处，又或者这句话其实是他们觊觎天外之域的隐喻。\n不过如今远古之龙行迹已绝，现在人们只能从那巨大构造的残型与纹路里，窥得一些古老文明的铸就之法。

- The random checks triggered by the Fateometer often serve as indicators for destiny's course or the success or failure of an action.\nPress to draw a card and get a random number between <color=#00E1FFFF>1-20</color>. If the number displayed is greater than or equal to the check difficulty, you will pass this check. Otherwise, you will fail it. ｜ 「命运检定牌」发起的随机检定，往往昭示着命运的走向或行动的成败。\n点击抽取一张卡牌，将会从<color=#00E1FFFF>1-20</color>中随机获得一个数字，若卡牌显示数字大于等于检定目标，则本次检定成功，反之失败。

- ...Oh, I didn't notice. ｜ …我没发现。

- I don't dare... If not even a whole team of explorers could stand up to those monsters, I'm certainly not going back up there alone. ｜ 我不敢去啦…连探险队都被怪物袭击成那个样子，我一个人怎么敢上去。
- If the Yashiro Commission has heard of us... ｜ 如果社奉行的人听说过我们…

- Uninvited guests have appeared as a massive mob, wandering around, making a ruckus, and harming the innocent. Their presence even poses a threat to nearby Pari. As the one who has been crowned the Bloomguard, Sorush is obliged to drive such dangers away. However, she needs to be restrained in her use of force, such that she may repel the disturbances without shedding blood. ｜ 来历成谜的不速之客突然成群结队出现，四处游荡，大肆喧闹，伤害了无辜的小生命，甚至威胁到了周边的花灵。身为戴冠的勇者，斯露莎有必要清除这些安全隐患。不过，还需克制地使用武力，以得当的方式驱赶对方，避免流血冲突…

Paimon's not a mascot, Paimon is emergency—\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Hey! Paimon knows exactly what you're going to say. That joke stopped being funny a long time ago. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>可莉也是个很有意思的孩子呢。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>骑士团的大家都很喜欢她，说是团宠也不为过吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙和可莉…究竟哪一边比较强呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>啊，对了，派蒙不是吉祥物，派蒙是…\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哼，看到你张嘴就知道你准备说什么。这个笑话说太多次就不好笑了。

- You really know him well, huh... ｜ 你真是了解霍莱…
- Perhaps each has their motives... but this is the capital of commerce. A little exploitation once in a while is not unacceptable. ｜ 或许他们各有目的吧…不过，在这商业之都，偶尔被人利用，也不是什么不可接受的事。
- But I cannot deny that when I brandished my sword to scare those two away, I could sense that my body was somehow reluctant to do so. ｜ 不过确实，刚刚握住这把刀，对他们两个施加威胁的时候，我也感受到了身体在本能地抗拒。

- Complete Incandescent Tempura on Unending Refinement and achieve a {param2} point score ｜ 成功通过「线香烟火天妇罗」百炼难度且最高得分达到{param2}
- Being a merc is tough. The work itself is one thing, but the worst part is trying to get your client to pay you after you finish the job. The Akademiya's top of my list — they're pretty straightforward. The Adventurers' Guild isn't too bad either. But trading merchants can be a total nightmare. They're always telling me that their funds are tied up, so cash is tight, yadda yadda. "Just a few more days," they say.\nIf cash is so tight, how'd you pay for that big pile of goods on your cart, hmm? Tsk. ｜ 佣兵的工作可不容易，先不说接受的委托难度如何，更让人头疼的是完成委托后如何让客户迅速地结清钱款。教令院结钱最爽快，冒险家协会其次，结钱最不爽快的是那些做货物贸易的商人，他们总是说自己的资金正在周转，暂时拿不出多少现钱，让我再等等。\n嘁，拿不出钱，那他们车上那么多货是怎么来的？

- That is the case, yes. I have total faith, therefore, that you are capable of accomplishing this mission as well. ｜ 是这样没错，所以这件事情，相信您一定也能够漂亮完成。
- A new player, huh... You can ask Shuyun about the rules of the game, but if there's other things you wish to know... ｜ 是要成为牌手的新人吗…具体的规则倒是可以去问恕筠，不过如果有其他想要了解的…
- Help! My dinner is attacking me! ｜ 救命啊，食材打人啦！
- Preparing her pistolet, she enters the "Night Vigil" state, using steel and shot together. In this state, Clorinde's Normal Attacks will be transformed into "Swift Hunt" pistolet attacks, and the DMG dealt is converted into <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color> that cannot be overridden by infusions, and she will be unable to use Charged Attacks. Using her Elemental Skill will transform it into "Impale the Night": Perform a lunging attack, dealing <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color>. The DMG done through the aforementioned method is considered Normal Attack DMG.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Swift Hunt</color>\n· When her Bond of Life is equal to or greater than 100% of her max HP: Performs a pistolet shot.\n· When her Bond of Life is less than 100%, firing her pistolet will grant her Bond of Life, with the amount gained based on her max HP. The shots she fires can pierce opponents, and DMG dealt to opponents in their path is increased.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Impale the Night</color>\nThe current percentage value of Clorinde's Bond of Life determines its effect:\n· When the Bond of Life value is 0%, perform a normal lunging strike;\n· When the Bond of Life value is less than 100% of her max HP, Clorinde is healed based on the Bond of Life value, and the AoE of the lunging attack and the DMG dealt is increased;\n· When the value of the Bond of Life is equal to or greater than 100% of her max HP, use Impale the Night: Pact. The healing multiplier is increased, and the AoE and DMG dealt by the lunge is increased even further.\n\nIn addition, when Clorinde is in the Night Vigil state, healing effects other than Impale the Night will not take effect and will instead be converted into a Bond of Life that is a percentage of the healing that would have been received.\n\nClorinde will exit the "Night Vigil" state when she leaves the field.\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>Arkhe: Ousia</color>\nPeriodically, when Clorinde's Swift Hunt shots strike opponents, she will summon a Surging Blade at the position hit that deals Ousia-aligned <color=#FFACFFFF>Electro DMG</color>.\n\n<i>Though the evil that lurked in the shadows of the night had been purged across thousands of years, a shadow that the light could not reach clouded human hearts.\nEven now, the warning left by the Golden Hunter is etched into her memory: Those of the Night Vigil, carrying aloft lit candles against the blackness, have greater need still to remain vigilant. Be not corrupted by the cold dark.</i> ｜ 预装铳枪，进入剑枪结合作战的「夜巡」状态。在此状态下，克洛琳德的普通攻击将转为进行铳枪射击「驰猎」，造成的伤害将转为无法被附魔覆盖的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>，并且无法进行重击；施放元素战技将转为进行「贯夜」：进行突进剑击，造成<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。上述方式造成的伤害视为普通攻击造成的伤害。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>驰猎</color>\n·生命之契大于或等于生命值上限的100%时：进行铳枪射击；\n·生命之契小于生命值上限的100%时：发射铳枪时基于克洛琳德的生命值上限赋予她一定的生命之契，打出能穿透敌人的弹药，对路径上的敌人造成更高的伤害。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>贯夜</color>\n根据克洛琳德当前生命之契的百分比，决定此次贯夜的效果：\n·生命之契为0%时，将进行突进剑击；\n·生命之契小于生命值上限的100%时，将为克洛琳德恢复生命值，回复量基于她的生命之契数值，并提升此次贯夜的范围与造成的伤害；\n·生命之契大于或等于生命值上限的100%时，将进行贯夜·契令，为克洛琳德恢复更高比例的生命值，并进一步提升此次贯夜的攻击范围与造成的伤害。\n\n此外，克洛琳德处于夜巡状态下时，贯夜以外的治疗效果将不会生效，并转为为她赋予相当于生命值回复量一定比例的生命之契。\n\n「夜巡」状态将在克洛琳德退场时解除。\n\n<color=#FFD780FF>始基力：荒性</color>\n每隔一段时间，克洛琳德的驰猎命中时，将在命中的位置降下流涌之刃，造成具有荒性的<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素伤害</color>。\n\n<i>夜影中潜伏的邪祟之物早已在千年间被诛讨殆尽，然而人心中亦有光明难及的阴影。\n时至今日，她依然铭记着「黄金猎人」留下的告诫：点燃烛火的巡夜之人更应时刻保持警惕，莫要被冰冷的黑暗浸染。</i>
- Time to hand in your homework! ｜ 老师要来收作业啦！
- We'll talk about this later. ｜ 之后再聊吧。

- Uh, bye ｜ 再、再见。
- !!! ｜ ——！！
- A crunchy appetizer that's baked with mushrooms and cheese on top of bread slices. A single whiff of its amazing smell is enough to fill one with anticipation. Give it a bite, and you'll experience a pleasant burst of sweetness. ｜ 口感酥脆的小吃。在面包片上放上食材和奶酪，烘烤而成。仅是闻到香气，便令人满心期待，一口下去，鲜美中满口尽是令人无法抗拒的香甜。
- I was young then, and I'd lost a bet with some folks. I had three bowls in a row... and got so plastered that I fell off the ship and into the sea, right as we were weighing anchor. ｜ 当时我还年轻，和别人打赌输了，连吃了三碗…结果醉得刚出海就掉到了海里。

- It's fair indeed. ｜ 非常合理。
- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Limpide est le sanglot d'eau." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「露景澈映」。
- Whoa! Suddenly, we've got two handy sidekicks. Hehe. ｜ 哦！一下子多了两个可靠帮手呢，嘿嘿。
- You little brat! Bet you've been slacking off instead of fighting for Her Excellency like you ought to have, eh? And to top it off, you didn't even have time to write to me! ｜ 你这个混小子！是不是没给大御所殿下好好打仗！连给我写信的时间都没有了？
- Shield Level 1 DMG Absorption|{param2:F1P} DEF+{param3:I} ｜ 一级护盾吸收量|{param2:F1P}防御力+{param3:I}
- The crystal that I have in my possession is probably the key that links the two matters together. ｜ 我手里的晶体，应该就是串联起这两件事的钥匙。
- Check Character Talent ｜ 查看角色天赋
- When your $[A2502], who has this card equipped, is on the field, when <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C125021]</color> attached to an opposing character is removed: Apply <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C125021]</color> to the next opposing standby character. (Once per Round) ｜ 装备有此牌的$[A2502]在场时，敌方角色所附属的<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C125021]</color>状态被移除后：对下一个敌方后台角色附属<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[C125021]</color>。（每回合1次）
- Fine! I'm sure they'll get it, anyway. Traveler, come with me. I'll need a witness! ｜ 去就去！他们肯定会理解我的，旅行者，能拜托你和我同行，当个见证吗？
- In the literature buried deep beneath the yellow sands, the Lord of Flowers was the Mistress of Dreams. She bestowed dreams upon the exiled, the manic, and the foolish. In those dreams, they were presented with their dearest delights. Burdened by the brutality of reality, they were fascinated by the charm of the Lord of Flowers and captivated by her beauty and care. ｜ 在被黄沙掩埋的古老文献中，花的王者是梦的女主人。她曾为被放逐之人、癫狂之人与痴愚之人展现梦想，在梦想中为他们奉上甘美的欢乐，即使人们的手中只有黑铁的碗砵，依旧为花之女王的魅力所折服，深醉于她美丽的形象与无微不至的关怀之中。
- ... ｜ ……
- (This is probably the herbal soup that Diona is looking for...) ｜ （这应该就是迪奥娜要的草药汤了…）
- Something is bothering Arapacati lately... ｜ 兰帕卡提最近好像在为什么事情发愁…
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- Are you... clients? Apologies, this is just a little unexpected. ｜ 你们是…客人？抱歉，只是觉得有点意外。
- The good news is that the Confrerie of Cabriere is no more. Gone with them, too, is the entire Sinthe manufacturing and distribution network. ｜ 不过放心吧，现在卡布里埃商会已经解散，「乐斯」也被斩草除根。
- Come on, I'll take you to get changed. ｜ 走，我先带你们换衣服去。
- So... Aranakin, Aragaru, let's start the ritual. ｜ 那么…兰纳真，兰迦鲁，我们开始仪式吧。
- "...His wife... a regular customer at your store. Please keep an eye out." ｜ 「…他妻子…是你店里的常客，帮忙留意。」
- In the interest of preventing further harassment of the bladesmith clans by the Fatui, we chose not to publicly release the findings of our investigations into these matters. We trust you can understand why this was necessary. ｜ 但为了避免刀匠家族再度受到愚人众的迫害，我们并没有公开此事的调查结果，还请见谅。
- An intense earthquake has shaken Tianqiu Valley, and a long-forgotten threat awakens alongside it. Defeat the Primo Geovishaps who have occupied the caverns of the Tianqiu ruins and bring peace back to the land! ｜ 天遒谷发生了猛烈的地动，早已被遗忘的威胁随着地震再度醒转。镇压盘踞天遒城墟空洞的「古岩龙蜥」，平息大地的骚动吧！
- Stretchy Geo Fungus ｜ 伸缩岩蕈兽
- Exactly. That is how we, as the living, respect our heroes and the value of their lives. ｜ 没错，这也是依然活着的人，对英雄与生命本身表达敬意的方式。

---
### Part 045

- A clear bottle with a note that contains the deeds of someone named Liam and a strange drawing on the back. You followed the clues on the paper and found the treasure they left behind. ｜ 透明的小瓶，瓶中装着背面画有古怪图案的纸条，简要记录了某个叫利亚姆的人的事迹。根据纸条的指引你找到了此人留下的宝藏。
- Records of the Ancient Oases: Part X ｜ 古绿洲记事·其十
- Oh. ｜ 哦。
- Artificed Dancers developed by the Fontaine Research Institute.\nBossuet originally intended for Artificed Dancers to be works of art that transcended the era of mechanical reproduction. But after Bossuet was forced to resign, the project was taken over by Maillardet, who had his own unique understanding of what he wanted to achieve. As a result, while their features were perfected during the course of its development, the Artificed Dancers gradually strayed from Bossuet's original vision. ｜ 由枫丹科学院研发的奇械舞者。\n在博絮埃最初的设想中，奇械舞者是超越机械复制时代的艺术品。但在博絮埃被迫离任后，该项目改由梅雅德接手。梅雅德对于奇械和舞者均有自己独到的见解，因此在迭代过程中，奇械舞者的各项功能在臻于完备的同时，也逐渐偏离了博絮埃的设计初衷。
- Give five Apples to Yavanani ｜ 将五个苹果交给雅瓦娜尼
- Heh. It's alright. You still have a long road ahead of you. Now, do you want to learn about some other machines? ｜ 呵，没关系，反正时间还长着——你们还想听听更多机关吗？
- Still, I will need your help today again. My divesuit still hasn't been fixed, but Goldman's been pushing me to make up for the days where I was unable to finish work... ｜ 不过，今天我必须得再请您帮帮忙了，我的潜水服还没补好，但戈尔德曼却一个劲地催我工作，把前几天没干完的活全补上。
- Beneath the Stone ｜ 旋岩直下
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Really? ｜ 在战争的国度…
- Which one is better? The Nilotpala Lotus or Sumeru Rose? ｜ 桌子上是摆月莲好看，还是摆须弥蔷薇好看呢？
- Duration|{param4:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param4:F1}秒
- "...Maybe three days, maybe two hours... Tell that crazy Captain of ours..." ｜ 「…或许三天，或许两个小时…告诉我们的疯子船长…」
- Well... Come to think of it, I did see some rare Magical Crystal Ore while training around these parts. They say that the quality of these is a fair shade superior to those of ordinary ore. ｜ 唔…这些天在附近修炼的时候，看到了一些少见的「魔晶矿」，据说比一般的矿石成色要好不少。
- A horn fragment obtained after defeating the Goldflame Qucusaur Tyrant.\nA strange mark known as the "Flamelord's Blessing" extends out across its surface. Saurians that bear this mark are said to wield an ancient power of terrible potency. Yet given their slighter statures, this power is too great a burden for the Saurians of the present day to bear. As such, it has been the cause of much calamity, and many tragedies have stemmed from the uncontrollable power it has unleashed. ｜ 击败金焰绒翼龙暴君后，获得的角的残片。\n其上能够看到蔓延于角上的奇怪印记，这印记被称为「焰主之祝」，拥有此印的龙众将获得远古的伟力。不过，远古的伟力自然不是现在龙众的身躯所能承担，也是诸多祸事的来由。许多的悲剧，其源头正是不可自控的力量。
- Magnifico ｜ 马尼菲科
- Floral Green's Shallow Slumber ｜ 「浅睡的花青」
- Viridian Fantail Pigeon ｜ 叶绿扇尾鸽
- She said: "Er'ye always loves to make things difficult for himself. I feel sad about it." ｜ 她说：「二哥总爱跟自己过不去，听着让人难过。」
- Goblet of the Sojourner ｜ 异国之盏
- Walk around Sumeru City ｜ 在须弥城散步
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Cart ｜ 货车
- You have been online for {0} hour(s) today. Don't forget to take regular breaks. ｜ 今日在线时间已满{0}小时，请注意休息。
- Whew, that was intense. So what happened after that? Did Subject Two's plan succeed? Uhh, Paimon can't bear thinking about it... ｜ 好压抑的故事啊，后来怎么样？二号成功了吗？我都不敢想了…
- Akitsu Yuugei ｜ 「秋津游艺」
- How was it? What did you see? ｜ 如何？想起什么没有？
- By the way, I've introduced myself, but I don't know your name yet. ｜ 顺便，我已经自我介绍过了，但还不知道你们的名字呢？
- Complete {param0} Open World Time Trial Challenges in Tezcatepetonco Range, Quahuacan Cliff, and Ochkanatlan. ｜ 在镜璧山、翘枝崖、奥奇卡纳塔完成{param0}个大世界限时挑战。
- But all my stuff is on those two Sumpter Beasts... Traveler, could you please help bring them back for me? ｜ 但我的全部身家都在那两头驮兽的身上…旅行者，能不能请你去帮我把它们带回来？
- Oh, so these rocks make sounds when you step on them. ｜ 这些石头，原来踩下去的时候都能让某种声音响起来啊。
- How are your adventures going? ｜ 冒险进行得怎么样？
- Good luck! ｜ 加油。
- Ganyu ｜ 甘雨
- During drills, I fight against Sergeant Lin with real weapons as if I'm fighting a real opponent, practicing to fight against enemy leaders... ｜ 演练时，与林教头真刀真枪比划，是将教头当成对手，演练与敌将对决…
- There were circumstances, I'm afraid. ｜ 实在是事出有因。
- Decreases all party members' sprinting Stamina consumption by 25% for 1500s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色冲刺消耗的体力降低25%，持续1500秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- Volcanic Eruption ｜ 火山喷发
- Captured Rebels three times, but did not win ｜ 成功捕获三次游侠，本局游戏未能获胜
- Sounds familiar? It IS familiar. Isn't this just something we do all the time... ｜ 哪里是有些熟悉，简直太熟悉啦，这不就是杂…
- Scent on the Wind ｜ 随风而来的好味道
- Defeat all opponents within the challenge room ｜ 在挑战房间内击败所有敌人
- Thanks to the efforts of the Theater Mechanicus Representative Komakata, everyone's favorite game from Liyue is finally available in Inazuma. According to Komakata, in its latest iteration, the original gameplay of Theater Mechanicus has been expanded upon with more unique content... ｜ 在「机关棋谭代理」驹形小姐的努力下，源自璃月的「棋戏·机关棋谭」终于来到了稻妻。据驹形小姐说，这次的「机关棋谭」似乎新增了一种奇特的玩法…
- Let's look out for any trees that stand out around here, then. ｜ 那我们留意一下周围，看没有比较特别的树吧。
- My arrival truly is a fortunate coincidence. ｜ 我来得还真巧喔。
- Take him out, and deactivate the device! ｜ 干掉他，关闭那个装置！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Xbalanque ｜ 希巴拉克
- The furtive shades of our destinies intertwine themselves beneath hallowed light. Should tenebrous forces obscure thine path, you may call out my name in humble supplication. ｜ 你我命运的虚影于这圣洁的光耀下交织，若是前路有黑暗相阻，便尽可呼唤吾之尊名。
- Nowadays, the number dishes to be had has grown and grown, and we aren't quite as particular as we once were — we simply eat whatever we wish. ｜ 现在的逐月节，菜肴、小吃的种类越来越多，大家也就不那么讲究，想吃什么就吃什么了。
- And these are the least we can do for our guests. ｜ 而这两点，便是小店能够提供给大家的了。
- Locked ｜ 闭锁
- A water pouch used by the Viridescent Venerer. Its capacity is much greater than one would expect. ｜ 绿野猎人曾用过的水囊，里面的空间远比想象的更大。
- Just take it one step at a time, and you're sure to figure it out. I believe in you. ｜ 一步一步推进生产节点，肯定能找到突破口，我相信你们。
- We ran for our lives! No one was hurt, though, and our equipment wasn't damaged. We can also call for foodstuff resupply to replace the losses. ｜ 我们几个拼了老命才勉强逃出生天…幸好人毫发无伤，物资也大多完好。暂时失去的食物也还能再重新申领…
- Switching characters increases the DMG taken by all characters in that player's party by 25%. This effect stacks up to 4 times and lasts for 1 minute. ｜ 切换角色后，该玩家队伍中的角色承受伤害提升25%，至多叠加4次，持续1分钟。
- Wow, what an impressive person. We must properly thank him when we return. ｜ 这么厉害的人，回去之后可得好好谢谢他呀。
- Careful! There're hilichurls here too! ｜ 小心哦，这里也有丘丘人！
- It's the Same As Having Wings ｜ 「在空中飞行程度的能力」
- Start painting ｜ 开始绘画
- Baby Yumkasaurus ｜ 匿叶龙宝宝
- Guest Challenge: Baizhu ｜ 来客挑战：白术
- And you just had to go and ruin all of it!!! ｜ ——这一切都被你们给毁了！
- Look, Vanagni! Be careful... Even if you talk to them, their only response is rage and shooting flames. ｜ 你看，「桓那吉」，一定要小心…就算和他们说话，他们也只会生气，然后噗噗冒火。
- Huh? Have you placed it by the water? ｜ 嗯？你把那个东西放在水边了…

- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making "Ceaseless Clash."\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「『不息的争流』」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- While veterans who have mastered surfing would know how to get around it or use their strength to knock said birds into the air. Haha, yes! The cruelty of surfing made a reality! ｜ 只有熟练掌握冲浪技巧的老手才知道应该绕过去，或者反过来靠着实力把浮流鸟给撞飞！这也是冲浪残酷的真实！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Increases all party members' CRIT Rate by 12% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色暴击率提升12%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- How did I ever have the misfortune to meet you two... ｜ 我这是何等的晦气，居然撞上你们这块铁板。
- H—How could you even suggest such a thing? No, I shall not allow it! ｜ 你、你在说什么，决不允许这样做！
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Hmm, it's paper tape, just like before... ｜ 唔，是和之前一样的纸带…
- Yes, thanks ever so much for your help. Amber should be able to take care of everything else. ｜ 嗯，真是太谢谢你们了，剩下的事安柏小姐应该会办好的。
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- Bubble: Pink ｜ 气泡·粉色
- There are people down there! But are they the people we're looking for? Let's go over and ask them! ｜ 下面果然有人欸！不过他们会是我们要找的人吗？过去问问他们吧！
- I have no need to go there — not when the taverns are full of the Urracas of this world. Besides, we're well aware of what goes on at that place. ｜ 我没必要去教令院啊，乌拉卡这种人酒馆里多的是。再说，教令院的作为我们也不是不清楚。
- Anemo DMG dealt by all party members increased by 75%. ｜ 队伍中所有角色造成的风元素伤害提高75%。
- Since when does "Big Sis of the South" ever tip her hand before she makes her move? ｜ 「南长姊」动手前怎么可能露出风声？
- Hey, Broglie, we have the data from the two monitoring stations you mentioned. ｜ 布罗意，你说的那两座观测站的数据，我们已经拿到手啦！
- You're welcome! So... Ah... Where's the reward? ｜ 不客气，那么谢礼呢？
- Just do it! ｜ 放手去做！
- But let's just go anyway! Once everything's settled, we'll bring you back to see Mamere! ｜ #不管怎么说，{NICKNAME}、西摩尔，那我们出发吧！等一切都解决以后，再带着西摩尔回来找玛梅赫吧！
- Oh, you mean Mona, don't you? At one time, she came by every evening to grab some salad — she sometimes even asked me for an extra egg or two. ｜ 你说莫娜啊，唔…她前段时间确实每天晚上都会来买沙拉，有时候还会拜托我往沙拉里多加点蛋。
- Is that Mondstadt cuisine? I wanna try some! I heard Mondstadt has lots of local delicacies, especially meat dishes. ｜ 是蒙德菜吗？我也想吃！听说蒙德有很多美食，尤其是肉菜。
- Pass through Rings of Speed ｜ 穿过驱速之环
- The rumor we heard just now seems like a strong lead. But we need to check a few more places. ｜ 刚才的传言可以列为线索之一。不过，还得多去些地方。
- Fourth Spirit Pearl obtained! Let's go find Tsuyuko! ｜ 第四颗「御灵珠」到手！我们回去找露子姐姐吧！
- Well, you continue then. If you'd like to rest for a while over here, that's fine too. ｜ 那你们继续吧，想在这里休息一下也是可以的。
- Who are you? ｜ 你是？
- #Oh, I would've missed Festival Utsava if Nara {NICKNAME} and Paimon didn't take care of that huge monster that blocked me here in this cave. ｜ #唔…被大怪物堵在山洞里，要是没有那菈{NICKNAME}和派蒙，肯定会错过这次无忧节。
- Atsuko ｜ 竺子

- Okay, thank you so much! I'll be waiting right here! ｜ 嗯，谢谢你！我会在这里等着你的！
- Windtrace Coin bonus for achieving the objective before the time ends ｜ 提前于时间结束达成目标的「迷踪币」加成
- Flowering Life ｜ 生灵之华
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 消灭所有魔物
- Hmm, surely it wouldn't be a bad thing to spend more time with her. ｜ 唔，今后多和她来往，想必也不是什么坏事。
- Did not shatter any Frost Thorns during this challenge ｜ 此次挑战中，不曾粉碎任何凛冬之棘
- And she's selecting her own Guardians... ｜ 而且，她自己就在选拔守护者…
- Recruitment Notice ｜ 招工说明
- Character Level-Up Material ｜ 角色培养素材
- #And {REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]} was so looking forward to seeing it... ｜ #明明{REALNAME[ID(2)|SHOWHOST(true)]}也很期待的…
- It was signed "White Lily." ｜ 信上的署名是纯白铃兰。
- Welcome. Every treasure here is unique, guaranteed. ｜ 欢迎光临，这里的宝物保证独一无二。
- We ran into some small problems, but everything's fine now. ｜ 遇见一点小麻烦，已经解决了。
- A peculiar mask crowned with a mirror that exudes an air of indescribable mystery. It is said to have been inspired by one of the Eight Adepts, Sage Jian. ｜ 头顶饰有明镜的奇特面具，呈现着难以言说的神秘。据传，该面具造型的灵感来源于八奇之一的鉴真人。
- Well... I—It probably had some considerations of its own! ｜ 唔…它、它可能也有它的考虑吧！
- Princess ｜ 公主

- Abyssal monsters that have descended to this world from the deep, dark depths of a twisted and alien world, they possess a plant-like appearance.\nIt is said that where the corrosive waves of the dark tide lap, such plant-like dark monsters will grow. But they only bear a superficial resemblance to plants, for it is a form they only adopted to get closer to the tree-like world, that they might extract the necessary concepts from it, and analyze and imitate them.\nSome raving lunatics who have lost their minds say that those things that extend out like leaves are actually the beginnings of gates to other worlds. ｜ 于深邃晦暗的扭曲异界降临此世的深渊魔物，拥有类似植物的形态。\n据说在漆黑的浪潮侵蚀之处，就会长出类似植物般黑暗的魔物。但植物只是表象，之所以具备这样的姿态，只不过是为了更接近树状世界的意型以从中汲取所需的概念并进行解析与模仿。\n也有失去理智的狂言者说，那些类似叶片般伸展出去的事物，其实是通往异界的门的雏形。

- Show me Layla's list. I just need to know what she wants. Once I've finished stocking up the goods, I'll send someone to deliver them to her so that you don't have to. ｜ 莱依拉的订货单交给我吧，我只需要知道莱依拉想要的究竟是什么，备货后就托专人送过去，不劳你们跑腿了。
- Even if the bottle is the same, that doesn't mean I left it there. Why, a place the size of Fontaine must be full of drunkards like me... ｜ 就算酒瓶一样，也不能证明是我留下的啊！枫丹那么大，酒鬼当然是满地乱爬…
- Branching Paths\nTrigger the inductive switches of the corresponding colors to control the direction in which the branching path will link the circuit.\nYou will find up to two different-colored branching paths in one debug test. ｜ 分支通路\n可以通过触发对应颜色的感应式开关，控制分支通路的连通方向。\n在一次调试中，至多能见到两种不同颜色的分支通路。
- There's a certain young lady who tends to leave a deep impression on anyone who's spent any length of time among the People of the Springs, be they resident or tourist.\nFor example, let's say you're enjoying a peaceful sunbathing session by the sea, and you suddenly hear a "Woohoooooo~~!" in the distance that quickly gets closer as a young lady on a surfboard rides a wave all the way to the shore at high speeds, leaping onto the beach and kicking up a curtain of sand.\nOr maybe you're watching a beach volleyball match, and a certain lithe young lady shouts encouragement to her teammates before springing straight up the next second, spiking the ball back towards the other side, your shout of excitement resonating with the waves.\nAnd then there was that one time you were invited to join a gathering, and a bunch of guests meeting for the first time were talking quietly, and people still seemed kinda tense. Just then, she showed up, like a superstar taking the stage, and announced at the top of her lungs:\n"C'mon, why's it so quiet? Music's playing, that means it's time to boogie!"\nAnd with that, she leaped to the center of the dance floor, swaying her body in time to the music, while those around her, infected by her enthusiasm, joined in one after another...\nYou attempted to ask around about who she was, and you instantly got a name without even having to try: Mualani.\nAnd later, when you went to buy some watersports equipment, there in the shop, you saw that beaming face once more.\nAt first, you were only planning on buying a surfboard, but you ended up learning all about the different locations of the various hot springs of the People of the Springs and how the experiences they offer differ, important tips and tricks for surfing, as well as where to find her little Koholasaurus friends. Of course, she also recommended that you buy a blue board, since it'll bring you good luck.\n"Actually, I've seen you before..." You attempt to bring up all the times you met before.\n"Oh wow, I didn't realize you were an old friend! In that case, I'll give you 40% off this time, and be sure to come find me if you want some surfing lessons!"\nYou originally intended to just kick back and relax for a few days, but ended up staying for several months. Over time, you two did in fact end up becoming good friends. One day, your curiosity gets the better of you and you finally ask her why she is so enthusiastic towards every single one of her friends, and even some strangers.\n"Yeah, I'd say... There are two kinds of people in the world. Friends you already know, and friends you haven't met yet."\nMualani thinks about it for a moment, then gives you a big smile. ｜ 只要在「流泉之众」待过一段时间的人，无论是居民，还是游客，几乎都会对某位少女产生印象。\n比如说，你正在海边安静地享受日光浴，突然听到一声由远而近的「哟呼——！」，一位踩在冲浪板上的少女自海中高速冲到岸边，猛地跳到沙滩上，细沙高高扬起。\n又比如说，你旁观着一场沙滩排球比赛，某位身材灵巧的姑娘，大声鼓励着其他队友，下一秒又纵身跃起，将球用力打向对面，兴奋的喊声随海浪一同回荡。\n还有一次，你受邀参加了一场聚会，初次相见的宾客们正在小声交谈，气氛有些局促。这时候，她如大明星一般盛大登场，大声宣布：\n「怎么回事，大家太安静了！音乐动起来，要准备跳舞了！」\n随即，她应和着音乐的节奏，跳到场地中间扭动起了身体。旁人被这份热情感染，也纷纷加入其中…\n你尝试跟其他人打听她是谁，然后毫不费力地得到了一个名字：玛拉妮。\n后来当你去采购水上用品，你又一次在店里看到那张笑容灿烂的面孔。\n你本来只想买一个冲浪板，结果还从她口中得知了「流泉之众」各处温泉的位置和体验区别，冲浪需要注意的事项，以及去什么地方可以遇到她的鳍游龙小伙伴。当然，她还推荐你买蓝色的款式，据说能带来好运。\n「其实，我之前就见过你…」你尝试提起那些打过照面的场合。\n「哎呀，原来是老朋友了！那这次就算你六折，想学冲浪的话下次找我！」\n你本来只想简单放松几天，最后却待了好几个月。一来二去，你们确实成为了关系很好的朋友。你终于好奇地问她，为什么对每个朋友，甚至是第一次见面的人，都能如此热心呢？\n「嗯，我觉得嘛…世界上分成两种人，一种是已经认识的朋友，另一种是还没相遇的朋友。」\n玛拉妮略加思索，露出一个大大的笑容。

- Shinobu? I remember her, she's the Inazuman girl that came to Liyue as an exchange student to specialize in law. When she was doing her coursework, she used to meet with me to discuss some cases, and after we were done, she'd always bow and thank me, which would always make me a little embarrassed. I always felt like she was going to make an excellent lawyer in the future. Thinking about it, Inazuma went into lockdown right around the time she would have graduated. I wonder how she's been doing since she went back... ｜ 阿忍？我记得她，那个来璃月留学专修律法的稻妻人嘛。为了完成课业实习，她专门约我讨论过案件，每次结束后又是鞠躬又是谢谢的，搞得我都有点不好意思了…当时就觉得，她将来一定会成为出色的律法专家。算起来，稻妻锁国的时间正好是她毕业前后，不知道她回去后一切还顺利吗…

- This ornament, hung in a very visible spot at the storefront, features a set of lovely chimes that were a gift from Diona. They also seem to have some other special purpose...\n"According to Diona, if the people around this place have drunk too much wine, the chimes here will start to sound, and she'll come running over..."\n"But I doubt that any of our staff would slack off during opening hours, let alone drink."\n"That said, if they can actually pick out customers who may have had too much to drink — even if that doesn't outwardly show — that would be great!"\n"Paimon and I have agreed that we will welcome them... and then recommend some snacks to help them fix their hangovers discretely." ｜ 悬挂在店铺醒目位置的装饰品，精致美观的归风铃，是迪奥娜特意准备的礼物，似乎还拥有某种奇妙的功用…\n「根据迪奥娜的说法，如果周围有人喝了很多酒，这个铃铛似乎就会响起来，到时候她就会火速赶来…」\n「不过，经营店铺期间，谁都不敢怠慢吧，当然不可能喝酒了。」\n「如果这个铃铛真的能识别那些喝得很醉，但表面上没什么异常的客人，可就帮大忙了！」\n「和派蒙商量好了对策，到时候就一边说着『欢迎光临』，一边给他们推荐可以悄悄解酒的小吃吧。」
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- A detailed step-by-step blueprint for making a Red Cedar Round Table.\nAfter using this item, you can view it in the Creation Screen. ｜ 步骤详实的图纸，记载着「垂香木朱漆圆桌」的制作方法。\n使用后可进入制作界面查看。
- If I dropped it, or slipped and fell, I'd be blown to bits in an instant. So my plan was to transport the bomb to the other side, then send it over in a hot air balloon... ｜ 磕一下碰一下，一条小命就没了！所以我打算把炸药运到对面，再用热气球送过来…
- Now that you mention it, the food I made attracted Fungi and birds... So, attracting wild animals sounds about right... ｜ 这么一说…之前我做的口粮吸引过蕈兽，吸引过小鸟…现在吸引一些野兽过来倒也正常…
- Paimon's intuition says that anyone we run into here is going to be far from normal! ｜ 我的直觉告诉我，在这里遇见的，都不会是普通人！
- Score deduction from getting hit by Big Bad Barrages increased ｜ 坏坏弹幕命中后扣除的评分增加
- The clever and keen Bunny likes to jump and hop around. If it can see different scenery while leaping about, like going in and out of a treehouse, it'll probably be even happier than usual... ｜ 机灵而敏锐的兔叽喜欢蹦蹦跳跳。要是能让它在上下跳跃时看见不一样的风景，如同出入树屋，应该能使它格外愉快吧…
- Yeah, confusing is a good way to put it... ｜ 的确有些莫名其妙。
- Lixin ｜ 礼信
- Snake Handler Gulabgir seems to be in trouble... ｜ 弄蛇人古拉布吉尔似乎遇到了点麻烦…
- (TEST) The latest creation of the new bartender in Mondstadt ｜ (test)蒙德调酒新星的最新作品。
- That was a long speech. So what are you actually going to do with these research materials? ｜ 说了这么多，这些资料你打算怎么处理？
- Select Weapon ｜ 选择定轨武器
- A flower that blooms even amidst ferocious thunder and lightning. To this day, it still grants courage to travelers in thunderstorms. ｜ 仅于雷霆之怒中傲然盛放的花朵，至今仍能赐予行走在雷雨中的游人勇气。
- Ah, sorry. They mean well, it's just... ｜ 对不住啦，其实他们人都是好人…
- He's actually got other reasons for being here... ｜ 他其实另有来意…
- It's been some time since the tournament, though, so if we're able to communicate with our shroom buddies without having to rely on Wisdom Orbs... ｜ 现在距离上次大赛已经有一段时间了，如果我们不依靠「意智宝珠」也能和蕈兽伙伴沟通…
- Massive Cryo energy is coursing through this freezing ancient sacrificial altar.\nYou shall earn Talent level-up materials, if — and only if — you can pass the trial. ｜ 这座寒冷的古代祭祀场中，聚积了大量的冰元素之力。\n若能通过其中的试炼，或许能获得令人天赋成长的物质。
- Not selected ｜ 未选择
- After damaging an opponent with an Elemental Skill, the skill has a <color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color> chance to end its own CD. Can only occur once every <color=#99FFFFFF>22s</color>. ｜ 元素战技造成伤害时，有<color=#99FFFFFF>60%</color>的概率重置该技能的冷却时间，该效果每<color=#99FFFFFF>22</color>秒只能触发一次。
- If you want to put it another way, if I stay calm while everyone else panics, aren't I ahead of the curve, then? ｜ 再说了…人家都慌了，我不慌，那我不就比人家抢先一步了吗？
- *bzzt*— *bang* A sudden flash of dazzling white light heralds the arrival of an uninvited guest to the tribal settlement, perfectly round but for a single spike. *crackle* *bzzt* As it stops for a moment on the grass, a scorching smell begins to waft upon the air. "Eek! An emissary of Xibalba!" The tribesfolk look terrified when they see it. *bang* *crackle* *bzzt* "A foul abomination with no teeth... It's coming our way! It will surely devour us all!" ｜ 嗡——嘭、嘭嘭、嘭。炫目的白光消失，圆润但有刺的来客抵达了部族。滋滋、滋滋，它在草地上停留了片刻，就能闻到焦枯的气味。「噫！希泊巴的使者！」部族的人们露出恐怖的表情，嘭、嘭嘭、嘭，「它过来了！连牙也没有的邪恶生物！要把部族啃噬殆尽！」
- Alright, let's get started then. Paimon will give you some pointers while you're at it! ｜ 好，那就开工吧，我也会在一边给你出主意的！
- *whimper*... Shogun even forced great baku youkai to work all night... ｜ 呜呜…不仅是同族…就连食梦貘大妖怪，都被逼着通宵干活呶…
- Alright! The truth is, not every soldier that joins the resistance goes through formal training, so new soldiers make small mistakes from time to time. ｜ 嗯！反抗军的将士们并非每个人都经过专业训练，新兵难免会犯些小错误。

- Yes! So we'll see each other again for sure! ｜ 对！我们一定会再见的！

- An "elixir that can cure all injuries"! That sounds amazing! ｜ 「治疗一切创伤的秘药」！听上去就很了不起！

- Still, what was that trick Kichiboushi used? One moment he created that balloon with a "swoosh," and then "swish," he went floating right over. It looked pretty cool! ｜ 不过，刚刚吉法师用的那招是什么？「咻」的一下变出来气球，然后「嗖」的一下就飘过来了的那个，看起来好厉害呀？

- Aradasha cultivated slowly, starting from destroying mushrooms, all the way to shattering Big Iron Chunks. He defeated eighteen bad guys in total. ｜ 不过兰帝裟慢慢修炼，从打碎蘑菇开始，一直修炼到可以打碎大铁块，一共打败了十八个坏家伙。

- During the course of completing a single challenge, break all the grappling anchor points before the Cihuacoatl of Chimeric Bone exits the hovering state. ｜ 在完成一次挑战的过程中，曾于嵌合神骨的蛇姬进入飞悬状态时，击破所有的钩索锁点。
- What are you talking about? You didn't do anything wrong. Those greedy bandits are to blame... along with a certain someone who doesn't know when to lay off the petty tricks. ｜ 说什么呢，你又没做错什么。错的是那耍小手段的家伙，还有那群见钱眼开的盗贼。
- Congratulations, Timmie! ｜ 恭喜提米！
- That smells great! It's a success for sure! ｜ 好香啊！肯定是成功了！

- This body of water is said to contain rare fish species. Located in Mt. Aocang, it has not been registered as a fishing point due to being too close to the adepti's abodes. ｜ 据说是有珍稀鱼类生活的水域，位于奥藏山中，由于接近仙家之所，并未被列为注册钓点。
- Land safely on the next level of clouds ｜ 安全降落到下一层云海
- "But the Oceanids disappeared from Fontaine long ago. As a father, should I tell him the truth, or keep making up excuses?" ｜ 「但纯水精灵在枫丹早已经销声匿迹了。作为一个父亲，我到底是应该选择告诉他真相，还是应该继续骗下去呢？」
- A stroke of good luck. And a very welcome one. ｜ 路遇好运，不错。

- Bless you, child! I will rest better for it. ｜ 太好了，我总算能休息一下了。
- A certain power once split Yashiori Island clean in twain.\nThe giant serpent's will and dreams were ended, but its lingering malice broods still in the gloom of this gorge... ｜ 某种力量在此将八酝岛一挥两断。\n 大蛇的执愿与梦想纵然断绝，其残怨却依然在这道峡谷中间不断沉郁…

- Still, they've done well recently. We old folks are content to be idle. ｜ 不过，这些年他们做得也不错。我们这些老家伙，也乐得个清闲。

- A special pattern that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 特别的花纹，可用于装饰祝柬。
- Oh, as much freedom as you would need! I wouldn't dare doubt the tastes of Fontaine's greatest star. ｜ 那当然是最大的自由度！我怎么可能怀疑枫丹人人皆知的大明星，芙宁娜大人的审美呢？
- Electric Conduction? ｜ 电气传导？
- Um... Sounds like The Chasm. But, Aranimba, as an Aranara, traveled so far that he even left Sumeru... ｜ 唔…说的应该就是层岩巨渊吧？不过，兰宁巴一个兰那罗居然跑到那么远的地方去啦，甚至离开了须弥…
- If I had a wind glider, I'd try flying from up here, just to see how it feels. ｜ 要是有「风之翼」的话，就可以从这里试试飞行的感觉了…
- Those without Visions. ｜ 没有「神之眼」的人。
- I think Jebrael has changed his ways. ｜ 哲伯莱勒应该已经洗心革面了。

- Paimon thinks that's a great idea. If the people of Simulanka are allowed to go to Teyvat, then what's the problem with taking Mini Durin there for a visit? ｜ 这不是挺好吗？希穆兰卡的人本来就可以出去，带小杜林出去转转也没什么吧？
- I'm not, really. ｜ 真的没有。

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 5 ｜ 好感等级达到5后开启
- Sunk again... ｜ 又沉了…
- Allow me to elaborate. I am not Azhdaha the whole... but a fragment. ｜ 确切说来，我并非完整的若陀龙王…而是一小块碎片。
- Paimon didn't expect her to be so well-versed in... foreign etiquette! Was she that knowledgeable!? ｜ 没想到左右加居然还懂这些…异国的礼节！她居然这么博学的吗！
- A bedroom that embodies the notion of a "caring heart." For busy folk, a bedroom may simply be a place that contains a bed, a place where one gets a little shut-eye, and which does not require too much thought. But for those with an eye for detail, every part of one's living space is worth time and effort.\nWhether they be the winds of freedom or resistance, they all began as the tiniest of gentle breezes. One who travels far must take good care of themselves, and surely fatigue will slip away unnoticed if one lives surrounded by warmth and comfort. ｜ 随处可见「关怀之心」的卧室。对于匆忙度日的人而言，卧室或许只是容纳床铺，闭眼过夜的房间，凑合凑合就好。可在细心之人眼中，住所的每个角落，都值得倾注心意。\n无论向往自由的风，还是执着抗争的风，在吹拂之初，皆为轻柔的微风。给予自己必要的呵护，才能深行至远方。倘若一室之内的生活被温柔环抱，那么疲惫也会在不经意间悄然溜走吧。
- Plug-and-Play Plan ｜ 插电战斗方案
- Complete "The Rainbow Destined to Burn" ｜ 完成「命定将焚的虹光」剧情
- (The martial arts pros who see the protagonist as their enemy are always making a scene. The protagonist is stuck in the middle of all this, all the while clinging tight to the dream of becoming a novelist...) ｜ （把主角视为假想敌的各路高手总是闹得啼笑皆非，而主角置身其中，却从未忘记成为小说家的初心…）

- Oh, right! No wonder she keeps telling us to keep going... If it's a magical device, it must be super powerful! ｜ 原来是这样！怪不得她一直让我们再坚持一下…既然是法宝，肯定很厉害吧！
- The "Knight Who Emerges At Night" will not just stand idly by. ｜ 那位「只属于夜晚的骑士」是不会坐视不管的。
- *sigh* Ms. Ruijin really does have a good business sense. If only I could be like her... ｜ 唉，但瑞锦小姐的商业头脑可真好，要是我也能像她一样就好了…
- Mm, a lovely flavor indeed. No less would one expect of oneself, or one's own Supreme Cuisine Machine. Haha! ｜ 如此清香…闻起来真不错。不愧是本仙，不愧是本仙的「机关烹饪神机」，哈哈哈！
- If you're going to commemorate your meeting, why only take one photo? ｜ 既然是互相纪念，哪有只拍一张的道理。
- I don't expect to be working for Miss Dunyarzad very long, but I hope to finish things on a positive note if possible... Let's cut the chitchat and head into the Citadel. We'll see if the person I know has a way for you two to meet with the Lesser Lord. ｜ 这份工作也干不了多久了，至少我希望好好完成它…不闲扯了，我们到聚砂厅去。能不能给你们指路，得里面的人说了算。

- "Weep not for the withered leaf,\nIn spring winds shall it sprout again.\nAnd even the dew of autumn's dawn,\nMust fall as nourishing rain."\n— Breeze Amidst the Forest: Third Autumn Wind Song\n\nThey say that fate is fickle, but the seasons turn as they ever have.\nKnow that shriveled glory is but a pale shade of living.\nThings in life cannot be forced into being, so one might as well go with the flow and embrace what comes.\nWhether laughter or tears, all are part and parcel of living. ｜ 「无需为凋零的落叶哀叹，\n来年的春风吹过还会开出新芽。\n就像秋日清晨渐融的白露，\n也终将化作滋养山林的雨落下。」\n——林间风·秋风曲其三\n\n常言命运无常，四季却总是流转如初。\n须知一时的枯荣终究只是生活的片影，\n世间之事不可强求，不妨顺其自然吧。\n欢笑与泪水，到头来都是人生的滋味。

I'm pretty sure they've gotten longer! ｜ 哇，我现在的妖力，说不定连那个狐妖大人也…啊哈哈…还是算了，我也不想去比什么。只要能守护好每一份客户的快递，我就满足了。当然…还有一直陪伴着我的你。对了，要不要来摸摸我的尾巴？我真的感觉它们变长了欸！

- Thanks for your help, Traveler. Here's a token of our appreciation. ｜ 谢谢你帮忙，旅行者，这些东西请收下吧，就当是谢礼了。
- I've met Freminet a few times since being introduced. He quickly took an interest in Monsieur Verite — that's my Kamera-slash-assistant — and even made a few improvements to my lenses. I gotta say, though, my heart was in my mouth watching him completely dismantle Monsieur Verite in a matter of seconds... Amazing he managed to reassemble it just as swiftly. He seems very experienced — I was convinced he must have graduated from the Fontaine Research Institute, but he denied it. ｜ 在那之后，我和菲米尼又见了几次面。他对我的留影机助手「温亨廷先生」很感兴趣，还帮我改良了镜头。说实话…他三两下就把「温亨廷先生」拆解成零件的时候，我的心可是提到了嗓子眼…没想到他安装的手法也一样干净、娴熟。我差点都以为他是枫丹科学院出来的了，但他否认了。

- Last time, we had to offer tons of tasty food before she would even spare us her attention... ｜ 我们上次，是供奉了好多好吃的，才引起了她的注意…
- Ha, it's funny that even the power of alcohol is greater than knowledge. ｜ 哈，说来好笑，就连酒的力量都比知识要强大。

- Statues are wordless poems, so one shouldn't appreciate them on an empty stomach. A duelist told me so, during the final duel of his life. ｜ 雕塑是无言的诗，不要在饿着肚子的时候欣赏它们。这是一位决斗者在他人生最后一次决斗中告诉我的。
- Legendary Scout ｜ 传奇侦察师
- Prowl ｜ 伺机而动
- A while back, Mr. Hiiragi Shinsuke presented my father with a batch of fine tea. ｜ 前段时间，柊慎介大人曾赠予了家父一批好茶。
- These intricately-crafted and elegantly-shaped wall drapes remind one of a Sacred Ibis' burning-red feathers. They are one of Aaru Village's most representative handicrafts. However, they cannot be produced in large quantities and are therefore not for sale. The drapes were originally designed by an old artisan, who in their last days sought to pour all their life's experience into this piece of experimental work. As such, it ended up on a wall in the village chief's house — as a memento and also a source of inspiration for young artisans. In spite of the scorching heat in the desert, one can always find a sweet pool of water inside their heart so long as they do not give up aiming higher. ｜ 悬挂于墙面的饰物，做工精细，外形华美，如同正在燃烧的圣鹮毳羽，堪称阿如村手工制品的代表作，但却是某位年迈的工匠在迟暮之年追求技艺大成的试制品，难以被大量制作，因此并不对外出售，而是被作为纪念品悬挂在村长家的墙上，或是作为工艺典范，用以激励年轻的手工艺品匠人们——虽然生活在燥热如火的沙漠中，但只要不断追求高远的目标，总能寻找到心灵的甘泉。

- Paimon just heard that the matra have arrested some Eremites who snuck into the city. Maybe they were the ones plotting to kidnap Sachin? ｜ 刚刚我听说风纪官好像抓捕了一批混进城中的镀金旅团…会不会就是之前策划绑架萨齐因的那些人？

- Sold at general goods shops in Inazuma ｜ 稻妻杂货店购买

- (If I had the money to hire a fleet, I would've opened up a Liyue market ages ago!) ｜ （要是我有钱雇船队的话，估计早就打通璃月市场了！）
- "Furthermore, I do not understand what this 'agility honed through ten thousand underwater dashes' business is about. No Champion Duelist trains underwater in this way." ｜ 「玩具关节的灵活度来自于一万次的水下冲刺模拟，这块也不明所以，哪个决斗代理人是在水下训练的？」
- She might just have been like I was, kinda bad at dealing with people. I mean, everyone's busy training for battle or practicing their dancing... ｜ 她可能和我一样不太擅长吸引人注意吧，大家要么忙着练习战斗，要么钻研跳舞…

- The food and desserts were delicious. ｜ 饭菜和点心都很好吃。
- Stir-Fried Fish Noodles ｜ 干炒鱼河

- The most idealistic and righteous among us are the most fragile, so I must protect his edge. A strong hand is required to stand against a strong foe. ｜ 世间一切理想而正义之物，总是最容易折断。我必须守护他的锋芒，因为只有这种理想和正义才能对抗最强最恶之敌。

- Seems like we got enough now. Let's go and find <color=#00E1FFFF>Sister Jilliana</color>. ｜ 这些就应该足够了，我们去找<color=#00E1FFFF>吉丽安娜修女</color>吧。
- The azure blue of the vast expanses of water, the lush green of the mountain vegetation, intertwined with the intense fiery hues of the phlogiston... Simply breathtaking, and a masterclass intro to color contrast too. ｜ 大片水域的青蓝、山体植被的苍绿，与燃素那炽烈火焰的色彩交织，真是一绝，大概能给你们带来「撞色」的启蒙。

The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Where Simurgh Rests." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含旋律为「神鸟栖居之处」。

- And so, your plan is to liaise with the Yashiro Commission to marry her and bring her out of the Kanjou Commission as soon as possible. ｜ 对您来说，最好的办法就是在社奉行的支持下尽快办妥婚事，迎娶柊小姐。

- The Masters of the Night-Wind believe in and worship the Wayob, which manifests upon the land with the power of totems and Nightsouls.\nThe Masters of the Night-Wind have tried using many mediums to communicate with the Night Kingdom. Eventually, they discovered that the medium that allowed them to establish the most stable connection with the Wayob was obsidian. This may explain why, over the ages, Wayob Manifestations have taken on a form that resembles a stone statue. The Masters of the Night-Wind believe their Wayob has the power to control the process of freezing and crystallization, and can also command both fixedness and mutability. ｜ 「烟谜主」部族所信仰与崇拜的「大灵」，借由图腾与夜魂之力，于大地之上显化的形体。\n「烟谜主」部族的成员曾尝试过许多与夜魂的国度沟通的媒介，最后众人发现，能与「大灵」建立最为稳定联系的中介物质是黑曜石。这或许是大灵显化身在长久的岁月中形成类似石像般造型的原因。「烟谜主」的人相信他们的「大灵」拥有控制冰晶与冻结的力量，能够执掌固型和流变的话语。
- And what is that, you ask? Why, it is to follow Master Taliesin and cause songs and ballads to resound on the winds throughout Liyue. ｜ 那就是，跟着塔列辛老师一起，让诗歌随着风吹遍璃月。

- My dad keeps hoping I'll come 'round to the idea of him teaching me how to do business one day. He doesn't seem to realize that the whole reason I left my hometown in the first place is 'cause I've already figured out what's best for me. Firstly, I wanna show him that my wushou dancing isn't just a phase — I'm gonna make a name for myself or die trying! Secondly... I'm done clashing with him all the time. I don't hate the guy, I mean, he's still my dad and everything, it's just... every time he opens his mouth, it's a verbal assault, and I'd rather stay out of his line of fire! ｜ 老爸一直想我跟他学做生意，不是没想过啊我，正是因为想清楚了才离家出走的。一来要证明给他看，我舞兽不是三分钟热度，一定会出人头地！二来嘛，也可以跟老爸少打点仗…两父子哪有隔夜仇的，我不是恨他，只是他每次开口火药味都很重，我避得到就避咯。
- The problem is... I'm also planning to visit the Almighty Merchant at seven in the morning tomorrow to buy all the ingredients I need... ｜ 问题在于…我又想在明早七点去找「全能商人」，一次性买齐计划中的所有食材…

- Let's help her resolve her current problem first. ｜ 先帮她解决眼前的麻烦吧。

- Characters carrying an Electrogranum can now pass through Advanced Thunder Barriers. ｜ 携带雷种子时，角色可以通过「若雷结界·上阶」的屏障。
- Should we open it? ｜ 要打开看看吗？
- Oh, alright... fine. Thanks. It's just that... if I start moving, that means I've already given up on the life I have now. I'd really rather not... ｜ 唔…好吧好吧，那谢谢了。主要是…让我搬家就等于放弃了现在的生活，我还是挺不情愿的。
- "Weep not for the withered leaf,\nIn spring winds shall it sprout again.\nAnd even the dew of autumn's dawn,\nMust fall as nourishing rain."\n— Breeze Amidst the Forest: Third Autumn Wind Song\n\nThey say that fate is fickle, but the seasons turn as they ever have.\nKnow that shriveled glory is but a pale shade of living.\nThings in life cannot be forced into being, so one might as well go with the flow and embrace what comes.\nWhether laughter or tears, all are part and parcel of living. ｜ 「无需为凋零的落叶哀叹，\n来年的春风吹过还会开出新芽。\n就像秋日清晨渐融的白露，\n也终将化作滋养山林的雨落下。」\n——林间风·秋风曲其三\n\n常言命运无常，四季却总是流转如初。\n须知一时的枯荣终究只是生活的片影，\n世间之事不可强求，不妨顺其自然吧。\n欢笑与泪水，到头来都是人生的滋味。
- Looks like Haniyyah and Souka have met up at the campsite. Paimon wonders what they're talking about... ｜ 海妮耶和左右加小姐在营地里碰头了！她们在聊什么呢？

- I understand. ｜ 我知道了。
- "Playing cards is a lot like playing the lyre. Both have their own special little techniques. - I'll hit the shutter the instant that is done, sure as I'm a Flowcurrent Bird photography enthusiast! Well, not that a title like that inspires much confidence... ｜ 我一定会及时按下快门的，赌上我浮流鸟摄影爱好者之名…哈哈，虽然感觉这个名头听上去抵不上什么赌资。
- Thanks for your help, Traveler. Here's a token of our appreciation. ｜ 谢谢你帮忙，旅行者，这些东西请收下吧，就当是谢礼了。
- I've met Freminet a few times since being introduced. He quickly took an interest in Monsieur Verite — that's my Kamera-slash-assistant — and even made a few improvements to my lenses. I gotta say, though, my heart was in my mouth watching him completely dismantle Monsieur Verite in a matter of seconds... Amazing he managed to reassemble it just as swiftly. He seems very experienced — I was convinced he must have graduated from the Fontaine Research Institute, but he denied it. ｜ 在那之后，我和菲米尼又见了几次面。他对我的留影机助手「温亨廷先生」很感兴趣，还帮我改良了镜头。说实话…他三两下就把「温亨廷先生」拆解成零件的时候，我的心可是提到了嗓子眼…没想到他安装的手法也一样干净、娴熟。我差点都以为他是枫丹科学院出来的了，但他否认了。
- The paths of the first level have opened. Before you lies the <color=#00E1FFFF>Pyro Trial</color>. ｜ 第一层抉择通道已打开，前方为<color=#00E1FFFF>火之试炼</color>。

- Last time, we had to offer tons of tasty food before she would even spare us her attention... ｜ 我们上次，是供奉了好多好吃的，才引起了她的注意…
- Ha, it's funny that even the power of alcohol is greater than knowledge. ｜ 哈，说来好笑，就连酒的力量都比知识要强大。

Why him?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> His face comes to mind every time I've eaten a Sweet Madame recently... Really makes it hard to chow down. ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>在最近的旅行里，你有没有什么留下深刻印象的人呢？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>我的话，应该是莎拉吧。\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>提米。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸！为什么？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>最近每次吃甜甜花酿鸡，都会想到他的脸…肉也变得难吃了。

- Statues are wordless poems, so one shouldn't appreciate them on an empty stomach. A duelist told me so, during the final duel of his life. ｜ 雕塑是无言的诗，不要在饿着肚子的时候欣赏它们。这是一位决斗者在他人生最后一次决斗中告诉我的。

- Prowl ｜ 伺机而动
- A while back, Mr. Hiiragi Shinsuke presented my father with a batch of fine tea. ｜ 前段时间，柊慎介大人曾赠予了家父一批好茶。
- These intricately-crafted and elegantly-shaped wall drapes remind one of a Sacred Ibis' burning-red feathers. They are one of Aaru Village's most representative handicrafts. However, they cannot be produced in large quantities and are therefore not for sale. The drapes were originally designed by an old artisan, who in their last days sought to pour all their life's experience into this piece of experimental work. As such, it ended up on a wall in the village chief's house — as a memento and also a source of inspiration for young artisans. In spite of the scorching heat in the desert, one can always find a sweet pool of water inside their heart so long as they do not give up aiming higher. ｜ 悬挂于墙面的饰物，做工精细，外形华美，如同正在燃烧的圣鹮毳羽，堪称阿如村手工制品的代表作，但却是某位年迈的工匠在迟暮之年追求技艺大成的试制品，难以被大量制作，因此并不对外出售，而是被作为纪念品悬挂在村长家的墙上，或是作为工艺典范，用以激励年轻的手工艺品匠人们——虽然生活在燥热如火的沙漠中，但只要不断追求高远的目标，总能寻找到心灵的甘泉。

- Leave Citlali's home ｜ 离开茜特菈莉的住处
- I admit it, this whole thing was my mistake. I didn't dare to tell any of you the truth back then, and after the director disappeared, I was even more afraid to say anything. ｜ 我承认，我闯了大祸，我不敢告诉你们。团长失踪之后，我就更不敢说了。
- The food and desserts were delicious. ｜ 饭菜和点心都很好吃。
- Stir-Fried Fish Noodles ｜ 干炒鱼河
- The body of the mighty pirate ship that once fought against the Shogunate, now reduced to a children's toy, of all things... Argh... my mind is awash with strange and complex feelings. ｜ 没想到我作为大海盗船，昔日可是能与幕府一战的豪船，现在身躯居然被做成孩童玩耍的玩具，心情真是有点复杂。
- The most idealistic and righteous among us are the most fragile, so I must protect his edge. A strong hand is required to stand against a strong foe. ｜ 世间一切理想而正义之物，总是最容易折断。我必须守护他的锋芒，因为只有这种理想和正义才能对抗最强最恶之敌。
- Could it be that some of the Mikage Furnace's systems are still operational and have already purified some of the energy? ｜ 难道「御影炉心」的部分系统还在运转，已经自己净化了一部分「祟神」能量？
- Seems like we got enough now. Let's go and find <color=#00E1FFFF>Sister Jilliana</color>. ｜ 这些就应该足够了，我们去找<color=#00E1FFFF>吉丽安娜修女</color>吧。
- The azure blue of the vast expanses of water, the lush green of the mountain vegetation, intertwined with the intense fiery hues of the phlogiston... Simply breathtaking, and a masterclass intro to color contrast too. ｜ 大片水域的青蓝、山体植被的苍绿，与燃素那炽烈火焰的色彩交织，真是一绝，大概能给你们带来「撞色」的启蒙。

- If the king had chosen to appease me, I wouldn't have been able to enjoy such a scene! ｜ 当初国王推三阻四反而倒好，如今光是乐子就让我吃饱。
- Superficial Handwriting ｜ 虚浮的笔迹
- "Children of Echoes" ｜ 「回声之子」
- Now that the Sakoku Decree has ended, there's some disagreements within the International Trade Association. He's doing his best to mediate. ｜ 锁国令结束后，万国商会内部出现了一些分歧，久利须会长正在尽力调停。
- Watch your teeth, Paimon. ｜ 派蒙要小心牙齿啦。
- Defeat the Unusual Hilichurl 50 times. ｜ 击败「奇怪的丘丘人」50次。
- #Chevreuse: Medicine{SPACE} ｜ 医药·夏沃蕾
- He's so obviously joking. ｜ 明显是在捉弄你啊…
- #And I am a storyteller... so I will record the tales of heroes. Well then, {NICKNAME}, O hero from another land, please... Show me how you shall valiantly triumph over the Abyss. ｜ #对，我是叙事人…我要记录下英雄的故事。异邦而来的英雄{NICKNAME}啊，请务必…请务必让我看看你们战胜深渊的英姿吧。
- Give ten Iron Chunks to Hanfeng ｜ 将十份铁块交给寒锋
- Natlan - Little Saurian - Skill, Exit Burrowing State ｜ 纳塔 - 小龙 - 战技，退出钻地状态
- Madam Faruzan doesn't mince her words, so I can understand why some students at the Akademiya are afraid of her. She doesn't have any bad intentions, though — all she wants is to devote herself completely to the research that interests her. Some people say that all Haravatat scholars are hard to get along with, and uh... heh, I'll let you be the judge of that.\nI assume she's already asked you to be her student? She sure is a little intense when she's doing the hard sell, huh... But she can walk the walk too. She really does know her stuff. ｜ 珐露珊前辈心直口快，听说教令院有些学生怕她，能理解，不过她从来没有什么坏心思，就是一心扑在自己感兴趣的学问上。有人觉得知论派都难相处，这个嘛…哈哈。\n她应该也请你当她的学生了吧？的确，珐露珊前辈有时像个疯狂的推销员…学问倒都是真的，这点不会错。
- "Menthe works for the Maison Gardiennage. She can only have become so depressed because of encountering so much unfathomable darkness in the course of her work. I truly feel sorry for her." ｜ 「梅莘她是执律庭的人。想必是因为她接触过太多不为人知的黑暗，所以才变得如此绝望吧。真为她感到可惜。」
- The transmutation has produced the following materials ｜ 质变产生了以下物质
- So a Domain of that kind has appeared again? ｜ 上次的那种秘境又出现了？
- Anyway, it's not about the value of the treasure or the watch, but the stories hidden inside the treasures! ｜ 而且，重点不在于怀表或宝藏的价值，而是宝藏中蕴藏的故事…
- Marechaussee Hunter's Good Friend ｜ 逐影猎人的好伙伴
- Xilonen has zeroed in on the final area where Abyssal Aphids are active, and it's time to wrap up this well-executed operation... ｜ 希诺宁已锁定最后一片深渊蜜虫出没的区域，是时候为捕捉行动画上完美的句点了…
- To put it simply, we met in the Fortress of Meropide, and you helped me rescue Lanoire. ｜ 简而言之，之前我们在梅洛彼得堡相遇。你们帮助我从里面救出了莉诺尔。
- How weird. The locator says that Madam Faruzan's nearby, but... where? ｜ 奇怪，明明显示珐露珊在这附近…她去哪里了呢？
- So far, there is no sign that the Tatarigami will disappear, and the Tenryou Commission is not going to withdraw any time soon. ｜ 到今天为止，「祟神」还没有消散的迹象，天领奉行也没有撤军的意思。
- I don't have a Vision. ｜ 我没有神之眼。
- Oh, that... ｜ 这个嘛…
- According to our customs, that makes you my junior! ｜ 按照我们那儿的规矩，先来后到，你就是我的小弟啦！
- Looks like we've arrived in time! ｜ 看来及时赶到了！
- A hat once worn by the witch who dreamt of burning away all of the demons in the world. The large brim blocked her sight. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的炎之魔女曾经戴过的帽子。宽大的帽檐能遮挡她的视线。
- Complete a total of {param2} Windgrasper Challenges and reach the destination during a single challenge ｜ 单次挑战中完成{param2}次「循风挑战」并抵达终点
- Yes, nice to meet you as well. We were expecting you, in fact. Your movements correspond to the intelligence we have on hand. ｜ 嗯，你好，你果然出现了，可见你的行程与我们手头情报所显示的情况相符。
- The guards seem really nervous... Let's go see what the situation is, shall we? ｜ 那些守卫好像也很紧张的样子…我们去看看究竟发生了什么吧？
- Ah, they're all the same. I haven't had a good night's sleep for months now! Hmph, who do they think they are, ordering me to alter my design over and over again just because they have some Mora? ｜ 换谁都差不多，我已经连续好几个月没有好好休息过了。有钱了不起吗！有钱就能叫别人一次次迭代设计稿吗！
- Suspicious Lambad Fish Roll ｜ 奇怪的兰巴德鱼卷
- Still... why is it so empty here apart from that house? ｜ 唉，不过除了那个房子之外，这周围怎么空荡荡的…

- Are you saying that a "Wish Granter" caused all this? That's nonsense! I bet it has to do with the depressing atmosphere in the mine. Anyone could develop some mental issues down there. ｜ 你说「许愿石」作祟？哪有这种东西，不过就是矿坑下面环境太压抑，正常人待久了都会精神失常。
- I hope everyone can have a good time during the festival and enjoy the musical atmosphere. ｜ 希望大家在节日里都能玩得开心，享受音乐的氛围。
- Skill DMG|{param2:P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param2:P}
- I'm afraid that Freminet can be quite introverted... And the boss there tends to be pretty talkative. Freminet has always been a little afraid of her. ｜ 菲米尼他…嗯…稍微有些内向，那家店的老板又很健谈，菲米尼一直比较怕她。
- Why don't you do it yourself? ｜ 要不你亲自上？
- Let Paimon see, hmm... ｜ 我看看，唔…
- I hope that my commentary will give you a new-found appreciation for this nation, and that you'll be inspired to visit every corner of Fontaine, just like Elphane was! ｜ 希望在听了我的讲解之后，您也会更加喜欢这个国家，像欧菲妮前辈那样，走遍枫丹的每个角落！
- Haha, now that you mention it, it's been a long time since our first meeting, hasn't it? ｜ 哈哈，说起来，从我们第一次见面到现在，过去了好久。
- Let Paimon see! ｜ 让我看看…
- Is there some loophole or a backdoor we can use? ｜ 不走正规途径的话，秘密通道之类？
- Leave Wolvendom with Barbara ｜ 与芭芭拉一同离开奔狼领
- He used to say, "Books are just a bridge that bring us a little closer to history. It's up to those of us in later generations to ask these questions, search for the answers, and decide what they mean." ｜ 祖父说：「书仅仅是桥梁，带我们走向历史。至于你问的那些，就是我们作为后人该去追寻、分辨的事物。」

- Even if the price you pay is doing twice the work in the evenings. But you see, students are always coming to the office during the day to ask this and that, so I might as well do my research at night to get some peace and quiet. ｜ 虽然代价可能是晚上加倍的埋头苦干，但转念一想，白天总是有学生来办公室里问这问那，那我还不如深夜研究，图个清静呢。
- Are things alright...? ｜ 怎么样…
- Would you like to try growing some Naku Weeds? But I don't believe there to be any suitable land hereabouts... ｜ 阁下是想试种一下「鸣草」吗？但这附近可没有什么合适的土地…
- You attempt to imitate the person responsible for this whole business, but Gorou is unshaken... ｜ 在五郎的面前模仿始作俑者，但五郎似乎并不害怕…
- Bullseye! Pneumaousia annihilation successful! ｜ 准确命中！芒荒湮灭成功！
- This is so you, Bennett... ｜ 不愧是你，班尼特…
- ...Let me check. ｜ …你等我确认一下。

- Apologies. Look at me, beginning a conversation without even introducing myself. I am Sonny, the one they sometimes call the "White Glove." My friend here is Luca the Fisherman. He's pretty famous in certain circles. ｜ 您瞧瞧我，可真是失礼。我是桑尼，朋友们有时候管我叫「白手套」。而这位「渔夫」卢卡，在特定的人群中小有名气。
- ...Nechca lost her memories of the "past." But that past was clearly real... and there are many witnesses to those events. ｜ …妮赫佳失去的是有关「过去」的记忆。但这些「过去」明确地发生过…而且有很多见证者。
- Energy Flow (I) ｜ 能量流动·其一
- "How wonderful it would have been if you were as I, witnessing your noble, beautiful form as you soared through the blue sky."\n"Then you would know that this sky and this earth are both things worth fighting for." ｜ 「如果你曾是我，看见过你在蓝蓝的天上滑翔的孤高模样，见识过你的美丽身姿就好了。」\n「如此，你就会明白，这样的天空与大地，是值得为之奋战的。」

- Eight Locales Over Mountains and Seas ｜ 山海八所巡礼
- Wait a minute... You said you had two things to tell us, right? And the first one was that you'd remembered your name. What was the other one? ｜ 是嘛…对了，之前「越石丸」说有两件事要告诉我们，一件事是你记起了你的名字，另一件事是什么呀…
- Later, the Lord of Verdure taught people the mystery of the forging of black iron. The innocent mortals thus grasped the knowledge of using fire to forge blades. The Lord of Verdure took pleasure in their knowledge — Lethal as fire and blades were to her, they made ordinary people powerful. ｜ 后来，草木的主人教会了人们锻造黑铁的奥秘。就这样，天真的凡人学会了使用火与利刃的知识。草木的主人为之欢欣，纵使火与金属会伤害她，但亦会使凡人强大。
- Rawr! ...Rrrawr? ｜ 呀！…唔呀？
- I sense you are older and wiser than the last time we met. It seems your travels continue to yield valuable insights. ｜ 你的神情比以往更沉稳了。循着旅途不断追寻与收获，果然是件好事。
- Well, at least it's the right size for you... ｜ 至少大小上很适合派蒙啦…
- So what if I break it? Now that I've seen how the mechanisms in this ruin work, I no longer need you. ｜ 破坏又怎么样？这遗迹里的机关，我也差不多看明白了。所以，你已经没用了。
- Xocoatl ｜ 苦水
- Clockwork penguins? ｜ 发条企鹅？
- The unveiling of Kuronushi's portrait is about to begin. Return to The Five Kasen Plaza and admire this masterpiece together with everyone else. ｜ 黑主画像的揭幕式要开始了，返回五歌仙广场，和游客们一同欣赏这幅压轴之作吧。
- Conulaf ｜ 科奴拉芙
- My deepest thanks to the shipbuilders of Fontaine and the researchers who predicted the sea beasts' movements! ｜ 真是谢谢你们啦，枫丹的造船业，以及学者们的海兽动向预报！
- (Continue Reading...) ｜ （继续阅读…）
- One Who Speaks Coldly ｜ 冰冷的说话者
- That trick he used to bring you to the Night Kingdom isn't anything special, by the way. My technique is much more subtle. He won't notice anything. ｜ 就像他用小把戏将你的灵魂抓到夜神之国，也并非难事。我的动作比那更轻柔，他发现不了。
- I've heard of numerous incidents of researchers in Satyavada Life going insane. The state that man is now in suggests that this is a similar situation. ｜ 据我所知，「林居狂语期」学者们疯掉的情况的确不少。从那家伙的样子看，也像是类似的状况。
- Well, that's good. She is a live correspondent, and they tend to put themselves in the line of fire — I almost thought that someone had come to make a threat again. ｜ 那太好了。毕竟是现场记者，难免会遇到一些危险的事，我还以为又有谁要来威胁人了。
- That's some important info. ｜ 很重要的内情。
- Did the prophecy say where that family member went? ｜ 预言中提过它去了哪里吗？
- See you. I hope the funds will be delivered without a hitch. ｜ 再见，希望新的经费能顺利批下来啊。

- Please be careful. ｜ 务必注意安全。
- Well, if that device can be triggered multiple times... ｜ 若是反复触发的机关…
- But his financial acumen is way, way below the average! In the end, his poor wife had to deal with the fallout and took the losses. ｜ 但那家伙的经济能力跌穿地平线啦！他的损失最后还是落在了他可怜妻子的头上。
- Wow... this is a great batch! That's everything we need. It's getting late, let's get back to Mondstadt. ｜ 嗯…品质还不错呢，既然材料齐了，时间也不早了，那我们就快回蒙德城去吧。

- The Masters of the Night-Wind believe in and worship the Wayob, which manifests upon the land with the power of totems and Nightsouls.\nThe Masters of the Night-Wind have tried using many mediums to communicate with the Night Kingdom. Eventually, they discovered that the medium that allowed them to establish the most stable connection with the Wayob was obsidian. This may explain why, over the ages, Wayob Manifestations have taken on a form that resembles a stone statue. The Masters of the Night-Wind believe their Wayob has the power to control the process of freezing and crystallization, and can also command both fixedness and mutability. ｜ 「烟谜主」部族所信仰与崇拜的「大灵」，借由图腾与夜魂之力，于大地之上显化的形体。\n「烟谜主」部族的成员曾尝试过许多与夜魂的国度沟通的媒介，最后众人发现，能与「大灵」建立最为稳定联系的中介物质是黑曜石。这或许是大灵显化身在长久的岁月中形成类似石像般造型的原因。「烟谜主」的人相信他们的「大灵」拥有控制冰晶与冻结的力量，能够执掌固型和流变的话语。
- And what is that, you ask? Why, it is to follow Master Taliesin and cause songs and ballads to resound on the winds throughout Liyue. ｜ 那就是，跟着塔列辛老师一起，让诗歌随着风吹遍璃月。
- Before I decide your fate, however, I must first determine whether you have any accomplices outside the court... ｜ 在决定该如何处置你们之前，我还得找找你们有没有散落在外面的同僚…
- My apologies, I'm not giving an invitation to a complete stranger. ｜ 抱歉，我是不会邀请你这么一位生面孔的。

- My dad keeps hoping I'll come 'round to the idea of him teaching me how to do business one day. He doesn't seem to realize that the whole reason I left my hometown in the first place is 'cause I've already figured out what's best for me. Firstly, I wanna show him that my wushou dancing isn't just a phase — I'm gonna make a name for myself or die trying! Secondly... I'm done clashing with him all the time. I don't hate the guy, I mean, he's still my dad and everything, it's just... every time he opens his mouth, it's a verbal assault, and I'd rather stay out of his line of fire! ｜ 老爸一直想我跟他学做生意，不是没想过啊我，正是因为想清楚了才离家出走的。一来要证明给他看，我舞兽不是三分钟热度，一定会出人头地！二来嘛，也可以跟老爸少打点仗…两父子哪有隔夜仇的，我不是恨他，只是他每次开口火药味都很重，我避得到就避咯。

- In the tales told by older folks, the ancestral peoples of Chenyu Vale migrated here from the far south, and they built a mighty ritual tower to touch the heavens and left many mighty temples. The jade tower is no more, and only silent, ancient ruins stand amidst the thick fog that shrouds the mountains, watching over a secret none now shall know. ｜ 在老人们的传说中，沉玉谷的先民自遥远的南方迁居而来，他们在此地筑起了直通高天的祭台，留下了无数恢宏的殿宇。玉造的祭台早已无处可寻，唯有那些缄默的古老废墟依然伫立在浓雾缭绕的山岭中，看守着再也无人知晓的秘密。
- Oh, a private fund? Hmm, this does seem like a good, logical, common-sense idea. ｜ 哦？私房钱？嗯…以普遍理性而论，真是个好建议。

- A flower blossom known as "Wealth" which grows from the Ley Lines in response to someone's desires. Perhaps the treasures within it can satisfy a person's monetary desires, for now... ｜ 名为「藏金」的花蕾。回应着某人的渴望而从地脉衍出，其中的馈藏，也许能暂时满足人心之财欲…
- What kind of a joke would be so cruel...? ｜ 什么笑话这么残酷…
- An exquisitely-furnished mercantile district that pays homage to the layout of Sumeru City's streets and its Grand Bazaar. Fresh fruits, delectable dishes, and all manner of lifestyle goods may be found at the stalls here. A few rounds around the area, and you will find a unique ambience one feels when stepping foot into a bustling market.\nThey say that the shops and stalls on either side of Sumeru's streets have been modified according to specific rules that are the product of some Akademiya research, such that they can provide holistic service with the minimum possible management difficulty and acreage used. ｜ 布局精妙的商区，充分参考了须弥城的街道与大巴扎的布置，设有新鲜果蔬、诱人美食和各类生活用品的商位，只需在其中踱步几圈，就能找到别样的亲切感，似乎真的来到了热闹的市集。\n据传，须弥街道两边的店铺和摊位分布经过专门的规划，运用了部分教令院的研究成果，能在降低管理难度的前提上，尽可能利用有限的面积，为更多居民提供周到的服务。

- In "Hardly Even Hardball," there will be a fixed time limit for any given player to launch their ball in each round, and an overall launching time limit shared across all rounds. When one player <color=#F39000FF>runs out of launch time</color>, the turn will pass over to the other player, and any un-launched Finchballs will be <color=#F39000FF>discarded</color>. ｜ 「伙伴共乐」模式中，玩家有着每回合固定的投球时间限制，以及所有回合共用的投球时间，当回合的投球<color=#F39000FF>超出时限</color>后，投球权将被转让给对手，没有投出的雀雀球将<color=#F39000FF>作废</color>。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Barbara's really popular, isn't she?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}:</color> Well, she is the idol of the people of Mondstadt.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon:</color> Come to think of it... - I've had many a cup, yet my thirst is not yet quenched. Each one is different from the last... a fine brew indeed! ｜ 纵然品过千杯，依旧意犹未尽，每一杯都是不同的滋味…好酒，好酒啊！

- Father... ｜ 老爹…
- A potted plant with a spacious container and a hardy, vibrant green plant as its main feature, found within the Flower-Feather Clan. It is said that due to the society's location atop the towering branches of Quahuacan Cliff, the area is frequently swept by strong mountain winds. Only plants with well-developed and stable root systems can thrive in such an environment. For this reason, the people of the Flower-Feather Clan select larger pots to allow for ample root growth. This practice is also used by flying instructors as a metaphor, reminding students to build a strong foundation in their training, for only with solid roots can one soar through storms. ｜ 采用了内部容积宽大的花盆为底，以生命力旺盛的绿植为主体的盆栽，可见于「花羽会」内。据说，「花羽会」地处高耸的翘枝崖顶，部族内经常有猛烈的山风掠过。因此，只有那些拥有发达且稳固根系的植物，才有可能茁壮成长。正因如此，「花羽会」的人们在种植盆栽时，会特意选择尺寸更大的花盆，为植物根系的生长留足空间。当然，这一习惯也会被负责教导飞行的教官用来提醒学员们要按部就班地练习，毕竟只有打好根基，才能搏击暴风。

- Take part in the Windblume Festival event Domain to obtain these coupons and exchange them in the event shop for rewards.\nThis Domain of exceeding peculiarity is also part of the Windblume Festival celebrations, and it displays the fun-loving nature of Mondstadt's people. ｜ 参加风花节期间的挑战活动，可以获得的奖励票券。在活动期间，可以用来兑换奖品。\n将极为特殊的秘境，也作为风花节庆典的一部分，蒙德人的乐天天性可见一斑。
