- Were the workers to find out the truth behind this ship, riots would destroy the Fortress faster than any catastrophe. ｜ 如果让这里的犯人知道大船背后我们要面临的灾难，那在真正的灾难到来前，暴乱会先毁掉梅洛彼得堡。
- <color=#FFFFFFFF>After a character on whose side of the field this card is on uses a Skill:</color> Deals 1 $[K103] to the active character on that side. (Once per round)\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]: 2</color> ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>所在阵营的角色使用技能后：</color>对所在阵营的出战角色造成1点$[K103]。（每回合1次）\n<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K3]：2</color>
- Unlike other human children, Chasca's first word was neither "mama" nor "papa."\nWhen her adoptive human father Cusco first laid eyes on her, he took one look at her, her eyes feral and fierce as her teeth tore into raw meat, then stared back at Elder Allpa, who was planning to give her to him, and his jaw dropped so far you could have stuffed a whole Saurian egg into his mouth.\n"Um, Elder... I know I agreed to take an orphan in... but, you didn't say it was an orphaned Qucusaurus!"\nGiven the frequency with which Natlan faces Abyssal invasions, it was not uncommon for war orphans to be adopted, but one like Chasca, abandoned by humans and adopted by Saurians... That was the stuff of legends, and legends alone.\nAs events would prove, Cusco had in fact underestimated the destructive might of this "Qucusaurus." Qucusaurs were already well-known for doing things their own ways, but Chasca's temper would prove harder to restrain than even the proudest among that race of Saurians.\n"That vulture! She's stolen meat from the warehouse — again!"\n"My house isn't your damn nesting ground, you little vulture!"\n"Damn.. the little vulture's started another fight!"\nWorse still, Qucusaurs usually had some specific intention behind their actions. To obtain food perhaps, or to defend their territory... but little Chasca seemed set on kicking up trouble for its own sake. She had food far more delicious than raw meat set before her at the table, and her bed was far softer than a roost of straw, but still she would constantly stir up conflict, day and night.\nThis really had Cusco's brows all knitted up. He had realized that this might not be some simple wildness of temper, or an inability to adapt to her new circumstances... But what was the root of it?\nHumans would die for money, and monsters for food, but this? This pursuit of conflict without gain, without negotiation, without anything but a desire for destruction? Only one other example sprung to mind — the Abyss.\n...Perhaps it was time to have a good "talk" with his daughter.\nAnd so, when Chasca next got herself in hot water, only barely restrained by two elite members of the flying squad, Cusco hurried over to apologize once more for not watching over her carefully enough, then rubbed his forehead in exasperation and asked:\n"...Now, what do you want? If you never speak up, no one will ever understand."\n"The hell are you even asking her for, Cusco? This vulture can't even say a single damn word! Seriously, what were you and the Elder thinking..."\nLittle Chasca glared venomously at the flying squad members holding her down, a growl forming in her throat, before it warped into a single hoarse "word":\n"V... Vultures!"\n...Well, that was a start, Cusco thought with a wry smile. As far as communication went, a counter-insult still counted. ｜ 不同于其他人类婴孩，恰斯卡学会的第一个词汇，既不是「妈」，也不是「爸」。\n她的人类养父库斯可，在第一天见到她时，看了看咬着生肉面露凶光的恰斯卡，又看了看正打算把恰斯卡交给自己抚养的长老阿尔帕，下巴惊得能塞进一颗龙蛋。\n「长老——我是答应了要收养一名孤儿…但没听说是要养头绒翼龙啊！」\n在深渊侵袭频繁的纳塔，收养「战争遗孤」并不罕见，但像恰斯卡这样被人遗弃，又被龙养大的孤儿…却只在传说里出现过了。\n事实证明，库斯可还是低估了这头「绒翼龙」的破坏力。尽管绒翼龙在纳塔已经是公认的我行我素，恰斯卡的脾性却比最高傲的野生龙还要难驯。\n「那个混蛋！又来仓库抢肉吃了！」\n「混蛋！别在我家屋顶上搭草窝啊！」\n「该死…那个混蛋又来打架了！」\n更让人头疼的是，绒翼龙行事至少还有其意图，或为抢食，或为地盘…可小恰斯卡却似乎只想挑事。尽管餐盘里有比生肉更美味的佳肴，卧室里有比草窝更柔软的床垫，可她却仍在昼夜不停地挑起争端。\n库斯可紧皱着眉头——他意识到这或许不是什么简单的野性难驯、水土不服，但又究竟是为了什么？\n人为财帛死，魔物为食亡，不为逐利、不可交涉、只求破坏的「争斗者」，库斯可只能想起一例——「深渊」。\n…或许得跟恰斯卡好好「谈谈」了。\n在恰斯卡又闯出一个不大不小的祸事，被两名飞行队的精英勉强合力制服后，库斯可一如既往地跑去为自己没看好恰斯卡道了歉，然后揉着脑门，苦恼地问道：\n「…你到底想要什么？不好好说出来的话，永远没人能理解你。」\n「还问什么呢？这混蛋连『人话』都说不了一句！真不知道长老跟你是怎么想的…」\n小恰斯卡恶狠狠地盯着压住她的飞行队员，喉咙里一阵低吼，最终吐出一句嘶哑的「人话」：\n「…嗬…『混蛋』！！」\n…最起码，回骂也算是一种交流吧。库斯可无奈苦笑。
- You convey the customer feedback to Milu Nui... ｜ 将顾客的意见告诉了米卢·努伊…
- Yes, the one who taught me how to be a storyteller. He said that "Tales of Shahryar" was written by his master's master's master. ｜ 是，教我说书的师父。他说这套《山努亚故事集》，就是他师父的师父的师父写的。
- The Special Heating Cauldron is a purpose-built cauldron made to a design that no one in Mondstadt could understand. It features time-delay heating, semi-automated ingredient insertion, and temperature regulation functions.\nLisa spent an enormous budget and commandeered the alchemy workshop for two full weeks in order to build this extraordinary piece of equipment.\nShe boasts that the cauldron is capable of completing any precision heating task to perfection with a maximum of just two pulls of a lever.\nBut her most common application for it is to brew tea and keep it at the optimal temperature while she is managing her books.\nAfter all, a relaxing afternoon tea session is by far the most important part of Lisa's day. ｜ 特制加热釜，一种用蒙德人无法理解的设计打造的定制品。同时具备延时加热、辅料半自动投放和有限的保温功能。\n这是丽莎动用了大笔预算和炼金工坊两周的工作时间造出来的「特种设备」。\n用它的话，一切精确的加热操作都可以在扳动不超过两次把手的情况下完成。\n然而它最常见的使用场合，是用于在丽莎整理书籍的时候把茶泡好并维持在最佳的口感。\n毕竟丽莎一天中最重要的日程，是悠闲愉快的下午茶时间啊。
- There's powder on the ground. ｜ 地面上能看到粉末的痕迹。
- And that's where I come in! I'm here to help translate documents and hints. Any questions for me? ｜ 所以就有了我来提前翻译文书和提示。你们有什么想问的吗？

- These interesting colorful fish patterned flags are quite popular among the kids. \nIt is said that the fish flag was originally designed by the fishermen. The fishermen envied the colorful fish and their seemingly fulfilling lives. Therefore, the design was created as a wish for a brighter future, especially for the children. ｜ 彩色游鱼造型的旗帜，在晴空下随风飘荡的模样别有风趣，深受孩子们的喜爱。\n据说游鱼旗帜的最初设计出自渔民之手，渔民们羡慕海中游鱼一身斑斓，一生自得的模样，因此设计出这种旗帜，希望能为今后的生活，尤其是孩子们带来好兆头。

- You encounter Xingqiu gracefully whirling his sword in the bamboo forests outside Qingce Village. He claims to be practicing his calligraphy by working on his swordplay. You're unsure exactly how that works, but judging by the state of the trees — which look like they've been struck by a howling autumn gale — you surmise he's been at it for some time. ｜ 在轻策庄外的竹林里，你遇见了正在以剑入书的行秋，他打算用舞剑的方式练习书法。虽不知结果如何，但看周围宛如秋风过境般的竹林，想必行秋也是勤奋练了很久吧…

- Paimon, you flatter me. I simply don't think it's worth ruining anyone's vacation over a trivial matter like this. ｜ 派蒙过奖了。我只是觉得，假日难得，不要被琐事打扰才好。

- Mavuika's <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color> summons forth the All-Fire Armaments to fight alongside her. <color=#FFCC33>Tap</color> to have the Ring of Searing Radiance manifest and <color=#FFCC33>continuously deal Pyro DMG</color> to nearby opponents, and <color=#FFCC33>Hold</color> to have Mavuika ride her Flamestrider, <color=#FFCC33>converting her Normal, Charged, and Plunging Attacks to deal Pyro DMG</color>.\n\nHer <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Burst</color> is not reliant on Elemental Energy, but instead on Fighting Spirit. When nearby characters consume Nightsoul points or their Normal Attacks hit opponents, Mavuika will gain Fighting Spirit. When she has above 50% Fighting Spirit, Mavuika can unleash her Elemental Burst to deal AoE Pyro DMG and activate the Crucible of Death and Life state. During this time, <color=#FFCC33>her Flamestrider mode's Normal and Charged Attacks deal increased DMG</color>.\n\nTo facilitate experiencing the character's Elemental Burst and Nightsoul's Blessing state, additional Elemental Orbs will appear in the trial stage, and more objects will provide Phlogiston. ｜ <color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>将召唤「诸火武装」协同作战，<color=#FFCC33>点按</color>时以焚曜之环形态显现并对周围的敌人<color=#FFCC33>持续造成火元素伤害</color>，<color=#FFCC33>长按</color>时玛薇卡驾驶驰轮车出现并将<color=#FFCC33>普通攻击、重击与下落攻击转化为火元素伤害</color>。\n\n<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>不依靠元素能量，而是依靠「战意」，附近角色消耗的夜魂值或普通攻击命中敌人时将为玛薇卡提升「战意」。当其「战意」超过50%时，玛薇卡即可释放元素爆发造成火元素范围伤害，并进入死生之炉状态，期间可<color=#FFCC33>提高驰轮车状态下的普通攻击与重击伤害</color>。\n\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发与夜魂加持状态，试用的关卡中会产生额外的元素晶球，并有更多的物件提供燃素。
- It doesn't have to end like this! Don't you have anything else to say to one another!? ｜ 为什么就这么决定了！你们没有更多的话要说吗！

- If <color=#FFD780FF>Hanega: Song of the Wind</color> comes into contact with <color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>Pyro</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>Electro</color> when it is unleashed, this instance of the Windfavored state will obtain buffs according to the contacted element(s):\n·<color=#80C0FFFF>Hydro</color>: Kuugoryoku Point cap increases by 20.\n·<color=#FF9999FF>Pyro</color>: ATK increases by 30%.\n·<color=#99FFFFFF>Cryo</color>: CRIT Rate increases by 20%.\n·<color=#FFACFFFF>Electro</color>: When Normal and Charged Attacks hit an opponent, 0.8 Energy will be restored. Energy can be restored this way once every 0.2s.\n\nYou can have up to 2 different kinds of these buffs simultaneously. ｜ 施放<color=#FFD780FF>羽画·风姿华歌</color>时，若接触了<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素</color>/<color=#FF9999FF>火元素</color>/<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素</color>/<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素</color>，则会依据触及的元素，在此次优风倾姿状态下获得对应的强化效果：\n·<color=#80C0FFFF>水元素</color>：空居力上限提升20点；\n·<color=#FF9999FF>火元素</color>：攻击力提升30%；\n·<color=#99FFFFFF>冰元素</color>：暴击率提升20%；\n·<color=#FFACFFFF>雷元素</color>：普通攻击与重击命中敌人后，恢复0.8点元素能量，每0.2秒至多通过上述方式恢复一次元素能量。\n\n同时至多获得2种元素对应的强化效果。

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Rhythms From the Conch." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「随海风而来」。

- Venti's Elemental Skill not only launches opponents, but also allows him to fly high in the sky.\nHe can also use his Elemental Burst to gather opponents together to create an opening in battle — opponents held in place within a vacuum in mid-air are prime targets for attack, after all.\nAdditional Elemental Orbs will drop during the trial event challenge to facilitate the testing of the trial character's Elemental Burst. ｜ 温迪的元素战技不仅可以将敌人吹飞，如果使用得当还可以让自己也迎风高飞。\n他也可以使用元素爆发，将敌人聚集在一处来制造破绽。敌人被真空压吸在半空中时，是绝好的攻击时机。\n为方便体验角色的元素爆发，试用的关卡中会有额外的元素晶球掉落。

- A spacious spherical structure, one of the most common dwellings in the Flower-Feather Clan. Apparently, most of these buildings are equipped with two doors of different sizes: a larger front door for walking in and out, and a smaller back door for easier handling of goods. However, in practice, many people use the smaller door as a window for aerial access, while some even open the large door outward to aid in flight. Of course, such unsafe practices are not endorsed by the chief, and if attempted in defiance of the rules, may even result in the loss of flight privileges... ｜ 容积可观的大型球状独立建筑，是「花羽会」内最为常见的民居之一。据说，「花羽会」内的绝大多数建筑均设有两扇尺寸不同的前后门，而在工匠们最初的设计中，较大的前门主要供步行人员进出使用，而较小的后门则便于物品的装卸。但在实际使用中，经常有人会将小门当作飞上空中的窗口，甚至有人会将大门开向外侧，用以方便自己更好的飞行。当然，这种不安全的做法并不被首领所推荐，如果违规尝试的话，可能还会有被取消飞行资格的风险…

If your opponent has a character afflicted by the Frozen Status, then the opponent's active character will have <color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K1019]</color> attached at the start of the next Round's Action Phase. ｜ <color=#FFFFFFFF>结束阶段：</color>治疗所有未附属「冻结」状态且本回合使用过技能的我方角色6点；如果有敌方角色附属「冻结」状态，则在下回合行动阶段开始时对敌方出战角色附属<color=#FFFFFFFF>$[K1019]</color>。

- What's going on here? There's no way she could've missed that... Wait! Could she be ignoring us!? How dare she? ｜ 这到底是怎么回事啊？她明明听见我们在叫她，却对我们不理不睬的。

- Shinobu told me a saying after she got back from studying in Liyue. It went something like... "The something by day becomes..." Uhh, something by night? ｜ 本大爷记得阿忍从璃月读书回来后讲过一个俗语，好像是…什么虫在前什么鸟在后的来着？

- The phrase "hidden hero" had always stuck with little Varesa. Despite her youth, she had already come up with a more noble ambition:\n"Since I'm special, shouldn't I work hard to become a real hero instead?"\nHowever, the weight of the word "hero" was far beyond what little Varesa had first imagined...\nThe hero triumphs over evil, leaving only a few choice words in their wake — such is the sacrifice of storytelling, which sweeps away most of the grief and hardship of the truth behind each fairy tale and every comic.\nTo say nothing of real enemies who fought with true intent to kill, leaving Varesa more terrified than any wrestling match she'd ever watched.\nVaresa was five years old when she was first attacked by the Abyss. She relied on her instincts to kick the first monster that broke into her orchard, sending it flying. But when she saw the rest of them rushing towards her like a raging black tide, the little Varesa was so frightened that she collapsed, bursting into tears.\nLuckily, her father reacted in time. He drove off the nearby monsters, picked up Varesa and her mother, and brought Vanana with them to hide in their cellar. They sealed the door, then gently comforted their daughter as they awaited the Patrol Team's arrival.\nHowever, seeing her ruined orchard and the wounded warriors were what stopped little Varesa's tears. She clenched her tiny fists with such anger that she didn't even realize that her nails had pierced her palms.\nShe did not understand the enemy's motives, nor did she intend to. All she knew was that they had destroyed her home, and hurt the nice grown-ups who came to buy her fruit so badly that some might never wake up... She hoped to become like the heroes in those stories, eliminating any Abyssal threats the instant they showed their misshapen faces.\nBy the time she finished relocating and renovating the orchard with her parents, Varesa was no longer the carefree child she once was.\nWith her parents' permission, Varesa, wearing a small mask and dragging along the heaviest barbell in the gym, pushed open the thick stone door that led to the wrestling arena's prep room. She begged the warriors within to teach her their ways.\nAs a "hidden hero," Varesa must face her fears and weaknesses. She must turn her brute strength into the power to protect her people.\nSome arrogant wrestlers looked down on Varesa for her youth, and turned her away. In response, she wordlessly grabbed them by the legs and dragged them into the ring, where she — in response to their bewildered expressions — gave them a light push. Her opponents were knocked off their feet, sent hurtling out of the arena, proving to all that Varesa's strength was not to be taken lightly.\nThe warriors present, as well as Chief Acatl who had hurried over, briefly discussed the situation. In the end, Varesa's request was unanimously approved.\nIn the eyes of the valiant warriors of the Collective of Plenty, seeing that Varesa had the strength to surpass any grown-up, she soon came to be regarded as a master of her craft.\nFrom then on, Varesa received tutelage under many great warriors. She did not know what fighting style suited her, so she relied on her impressions of heroes to try out their techniques one by one, keeping what worked best for her.\nShe trained for years, but there was still a schism between theory and practice. Whenever she was in a real fight, whether by anxiety or lack of experience, she would still default to her instincts — charging at her enemies and launching a barrage of flying kicks. In her hands, melee weapons gained a new lease of life — namely, by being thrown straight at her foes...\nIn response, some hilichurls started adopting similar "ranged" tactics to counter Varesa's onslaughts, resulting in Coach Iansan getting caught in the crossfire... The latter, who then started paying special attention to the young lass, henceforth took over all of Varesa's training.\nTo help Varesa fully realize her potential, Iansan created a highly effective training program. Surprisingly, Varesa's natural talent ranked far above the rest of her trainees. Relying on just her intuition, she could effortlessly execute techniques that would require much backbreaking training from even Iansan's most devout disciples.\nIansan believed that Varesa's strength might even surpass her own. Brimming with anticipation, she encouraged Varesa in the spirit of competition, saying, "I won't lose to you!" However, this only ended up leaving Varesa flustered and at a loss for words.\nDuring her training, Varesa defeated a four-digit number of monsters, but also broke a three-digit number of weapons, leaving a two-digit number of the tribe's warriors scratching their heads in disbelief. Iansan came to the following conclusion:\nVaresa was a genius with incredible strength, but it was precisely her strength that prevented her from using common melee weapons. Therefore, she should adopt the bare-handed fighting style of wrestlers to further grow as a warrior.\nAt Iansan's recommendation, Varesa joined the tribe's Patrol Team. She frequently took to the front lines, striving to improve her fighting skills.\nAnd on her second month in the Patrol Team, Varesa once again faced a grueling trial.\nThe black tide of monsters rushed at her once more. Her comrades were exhausted after three consecutive days of fighting, and even Varesa was reaching her limit...\nBut it was in this very battle that Varesa found her second wind, and gained something precious to her — something that would make her an even more formidable warrior... ｜ 「预备英雄」的说法始终盘旋在小瓦雷莎的思绪中，年幼的她早早就产生了更有志气的想法——\n「既然我很特别，那我能不能加把劲，成为真正的英雄呢？」\n只是，英雄这两个字的分量，超出了小瓦雷莎一开始的想象——\n故事中的英雄们打败敌人时，只有轻飘飘的几段文字，背后隐藏的血与泪，常被童话故事和漫画织卷美化…\n敌人和魔物嘶吼着攻来，你死我活的拼杀场面，恐怖程度远远超过瓦雷莎观看过的摔角比赛。\n首次经历深渊袭击时，瓦雷莎才刚刚五岁，虽说她依靠本能，在惊叫中踹飞了闯入果园的第一只魔物，但看见远处河流般涌来的黑潮时，小瓦雷莎直接吓得腿软瘫倒，哇哇大哭起来。\n好在父亲反应及时，拼命击退近处的敌人，扛着瓦雷莎和母亲，带着瓦娜娜一同躲进偏僻的地窖，牢牢堵死大门，并耐心安慰小瓦雷莎，压低她哭泣的音量，他们一家才支撑到巡逻队赶来。\n看着一片狼藉的果园，还有不幸受伤昏迷的部族战士，小瓦雷莎的眼泪止住了，小小的拳头紧紧攥住，指甲刺进肉里，她都没有察觉。\n小瓦雷莎不明白对方的意图，也不打算去了解，她只知道，自己的家被这些家伙夷为了平地，总来买自家水果的叔叔阿姨们被它们打伤，甚至有醒不过来的危险…她多希望，自己能像故事里的英雄们那样，在深渊魔物进入视线的第一刻，就将对方清剿一空。\n与父母一同搬迁果园，完成了辛苦的重建工作后，瓦雷莎便不再是以前那个无忧无虑的孩子了。\n征得爸爸妈妈的同意后，瓦雷莎戴上了小小的面具，拖着健身区最重的杠铃，撑开了摔角场战备屋厚重的石质大门，向在场的摔角手们提出请求，希望跟着他们学习格斗技巧。\n作为「预备英雄」的瓦雷莎要正视自己的软弱和脆弱，要将自己的蛮力化为屏护部族的力量。\n有些心高气傲的摔角手认为瓦雷莎还是个小鬼，不耐烦地驱赶她。瓦雷莎也不废话，拎住这些战士的腿，将他们拖上擂台，让他们表情凝固，再把他们轻轻一推，叫他们完全失去平衡，咕噜噜滚下台去，证明自己的力量根本不输他们这些大人。\n在场的斗士与闻讯赶来的首领阿卡特目睹此景，稍加讨论，便全票通过了瓦雷莎的要求。\n在勇武的「沃陆之邦」，拿出了超越成年人的力量，瓦雷莎便能被视为部族中的大人。\n自此往后，瓦雷莎就成了多位斗士共同教导的学员。她不知自己适合怎样的战斗风格，只能凭借对英雄们的印象，一种种尝试技巧，寻找适合自己的最优解。\n这一练就是好几年，理论训练与实战环节对半开。不知是紧张还是生涩，真正面对敌人时，瓦雷莎还是会凭借本能的冲撞，以及早早刻在记忆中的飞踢招式，拳拳到肉地痛击敌人。刀剑枪斧在她手中最常扮演的，全都是牵制敌人的投掷武器…\n以至于个别丘丘人都开始用抛掷兵器来回应瓦雷莎的冲撞，误伤了前来支援的伊安珊…让金牌教练伊安珊重点关注这位特别的后辈，完全接过了引导她的职责。\n为了完全发掘瓦雷莎的潜能，伊安珊专门制定了准狠高效的训练科目，此后她讶异地发现，瓦雷莎的天赋在她的所有学员中位居断层式的第一，凭借直觉就能发挥出许多「方法派」学员潜心锻炼后的力量。\n伊安珊甚至认为，瓦雷莎以后的力量定然会超越自己，满怀期待地向瓦雷莎发出了「我不会输给你」的宣言，让瓦雷莎茫然失措，惊慌不已。\n不过，训练期间，瓦雷莎击退了四位数的魔物，但也砸坏了三位数的兵器，让两位数的部族战士摇头扶额，最终由伊安珊得出一个结论：\n瓦雷莎是个蛮力奇才，但也正因为力量过度汹涌，不宜使用常见的近战武器，更应该采用摔跤斗士的徒手格斗流派，充分发挥自己的特长。\n在伊安珊的引荐下，瓦雷莎也正式加入了部族的巡逻队，开始频繁出勤于各条战线，不断巩固搏击的技巧。\n而在加入巡逻队后第二个月，瓦雷莎就再次经历了严酷的考验。\n魔物的黑色浪潮重新涌来，接连三天的波状攻势令所有战士疲惫不堪，瓦雷莎险些遭遇不测…\n也正是在这场战斗中，瓦雷莎因祸得福，获授殊荣，让她的搏击攻势愈发锐不可当…
- Please, the honor is all mine. I was profoundly moved to hear about your troupe and your wonderful director. I just wanted to do something to help. ｜ 不用这么惊讶，我只是听了剧团和团长的故事之后深受感动，想要帮忙而已。

- Because I have the talent, and she doesn't want to let it go to waste. Hehe. She treats the whole crew that way. ｜ 因为我有天分嘛，她当然要培养我咯，嘿嘿。其实不仅是我，还有大家也一样。

- Alright, enough talk! Let's get crafting! ｜ 哎呀，不说这些了，我们快点开始做祝柬吧。
- Weak Voice ｜ 虚弱的声音
- If you were absent, my master... I fear I might even be quite fond of her. But today, things are different... She threatens your safety, and so affability is beyond my sphere of virtues. ｜ 若不是有您在场，我的大人…我恐怕还挺喜欢她的。但如今情况不同…既然她在威胁您的安全，我也很难友好相待了。

- In the past, if you didn't have any special connections, it might be very difficult to apply for it. ｜ 以前如果搭不上一些「特殊关系」的话，要办理这类手续，可能会花上不少功夫。
- I'm currently in charge of the International Trade Association. My main task is to be the bridge between everyone here and the Shogunate officials. ｜ 如今我负责管理「万国商会」，最主要的工作还是帮大家和幕府官员们沟通。
- I will go get a cup of tea. Miss Sigewinne, I'll leave Miss Lynette in your care. ｜ 容我先喝口茶，护士长，等会儿琳妮特小姐就麻烦你了。
- Rongo climbs up to a makeshift wooden platform set up nearby and grabs a shell... ｜ 朗戈爬上一旁临时搭建的木台，取下了一枚贝壳…
- We don't usually see these guys out at sea... Could they be here for the same reason as us? ｜ 这帮人在海上做什么，难道他们也在捞东西？
- Either way, we are ready to accept sentencing under martial law. ｜ 不论如何，我们愿意接受军法处置。
- I'll be here, waiting for your good news. ｜ 那么我就在此静候佳音了。
- If I were to rate your performance, I'd say you're like... a slow, arthritic turtle. ｜ 这次训练的成绩，打比方来说，像不太灵活的乌龟。
- Her mentor should notice, I hope. ｜ 她的导师应该会注意到的。
- Did you include all your relatives' names too? ｜ 你把全家人的名字都刻上了？
- Finally, we're in <color=#00E1FFFF>Liyue</color>! ｜ 终于到<color=#00E1FFFF>璃月</color>了！
- Plunge DMG|{param8:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param8:F1P}
- A timepiece made in imitation of the wheel of fate. It ceased turning long ago. ｜ 仿照命运之轮的样子打造的时计，如今早已无法转动。
- Everything you say is so complicated... ｜ 你说的话都好难懂喔…
- Interrogation Success Chance: ｜ 逼问成功的可能性%：
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- You actually managed to find this place. Congratulations. ｜ 没想到你们能找到这里来，做得不错嘛。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param4:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param4:F1P}
- Aiya, this isn't good... ｜ 糟糕…
- The Children of Echoes' tribespeople are working hard to save a little Tepetlisaur, and the famous sauro-vet Ifa is also present. You've heard so much about him — might as well make your way over to say hello. ｜ 「回声之子」的部族成员正在为救一只小嵴锋龙而奔走，著名的龙医生伊法也在。久闻其名，去跟他打个招呼吧。
- Rozan shakes its head indifferently and leaves... ｜ 萝赞平静地摇了摇头，转身离开了…
- Friends? But your friendship is an even more valuable gift. I can't in good conscience accept it for free... ｜ 朋友？这是一件更加贵重的宝物，我更不能心安理得地接受。
- Let's do this for Rana... ｜ 为了帮助拉娜…
- Wonder what the flower carriage is gonna look like this year? Let's go check it out! ｜ 今年的花车会是什么样子呢？我们快回去看看吧！
- I am always willing to listen to whatever you have to say, Chauvigne. Whether you wish to speak of venturing, or of flower pots... It's all fine by me. ｜ 我时刻都愿意听你说话，肖维涅。无论是远游，还是花盆…什么都行。
- Well, someone's written something on the lamp post. Shall we go have a look? ｜ 欸，灯柱上被人写了字，我们看看吧？
- "People belong where they are born, but creatures belong where they are fed." I am a vishap, not a human. So I'm going back to where I belong. ｜ 「人属于他出生的地方，畜生属于它吃饱的地方。」我是龙蜥，我不是人。所以我要回去了。
- Oh no! Run! ｜ 糟了！快逃！
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Truly mouthwatering! ｜ 真是让人垂涎欲滴！
- The abandoned zone at the end of the pipes. A good distance into the water. ｜ 管道尽头，废弃区，进入水中一定距离。
- What a sad letter... ｜ 信的内容，让人很难过…
- Default ｜ 默认
- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Countless Sights to See ｜ 沿途百景会心
- Formation requirements satisfied. Preparing to activate formation... ｜ 已满足队列要求，即将进行队列行动…
- (No one was accompanying that kid...?) ｜ （居然连个陪同的人都没有吗…）
- A Commemorative Photo ｜ 纪念合影
- That's right, yes. We'll be teaching a whole bunch of handy housework tips and tricks. Sweeping, mopping, laundry, cookery, you know, that sort of thing. All based on my years of experience as a housekeeper. ｜ 是的，里面会讲述许多家政技巧。比如扫地拖地、洗衣做饭等等，都是我这几年总结出来的经验。
- I request monetary compensation! And my participation prize. ｜ 我要申请赔偿金！还有参与奖。
- Fane of Ashvattha ｜ 觉王之殿
- A tiara worn by those tasked with offering sacrifices in ancient times. Because it harkened to the call of thunder year in and year out, it possesses remarkable resistance. ｜ 在古老的时代，司祭祀之人佩戴的礼冠。因为常年聆听着雷鸣，具有奇妙的抗性。
- To rescue Kachina, who has been trapped in the Night Kingdom, you must first seek out her Ancient Name. Kinich says that he has given the ritual implements needed to do so to the Chief of the Scions of the Canopy. Head there and ask around. ｜ 为了救回受困于夜神之国的卡齐娜，眼下必须先找到卡齐娜的「古名」。基尼奇说他将能够找回古名的仪式用具交给了「悬木人」部族的族长，到「悬木人」部族打听一下吧。
- Absentminded ｜ 恍惚
- Do you do overseas delivery? ｜ 可以送到国外吗？
- An unusual pattern that can be used to decorate a gift envelope. ｜ 奇异的花纹，可用于装饰祝柬。
- Wangshu Take-Away ｜ 望舒外送
- Next time you're here to take commissions from me, I'll make sure to give you the best ones! ｜ 下次您来我这里接受委托的时候，我一定会给您准备最好的委托的！
- I'll have a glass of juice. ｜ 来杯果汁吧。
- (Test) Excellent! Now, let's add a few of these, a touch of this, mix it all up... and I have no idea what will happen. ｜ （Test)真不错！让我们加些这个，还有这个，然后混在一起，我也不知道会出现什么。
- You're the artist who made an arrangement with Qingzhou earlier... ｜ 你是上次和清昼定了约定的画家…
- Energy Recharge Increase|{param4:P} ｜ 元素充能效率提升|{param4:P}
- You and Paimon make a fire, and before you know it, night sets in. ｜ 你与派蒙生起篝火，不知不觉已是晚上…
- #Right, thank you, {NICKNAME}! Let's go look for the remaining devices! ｜ #对哦，谢谢你，{NICKNAME}！我们去找剩下的装置吧！
- Exactly! Compared to when we first met, you're practically picking up friends left and right! ｜ 是啊，你看，比起我们刚认识的时候，愿意跟优菈成为朋友的人，也越来越多了吧。
- Medicine from Herbalist Gui. Best to send it to the one who ordered it. ｜ 从阿桂那里拿到的药，还是快点送去给订药的人吧。
- I wonder if there's anywhere safe to go adventuring... ｜ 有没有安全的冒险地点呢…
- Fair enough... I guess finding Tepal is gonna be the key to resolving this conflict. Let's hope the Children of Echoes have some info on him. ｜ 好吧…要想根除矛盾，也必须解决这个特帕尔。回声之子…希望那里能有线索。
- Hey, Kinich! Gonna take part in the tournament? ｜ 基尼奇，你果然要参赛啊。
- But, he's already signed the document, look here... ｜ 但他已经在文件上签了字，您瞧这里…
- It's no wonder all the Visions have been confiscated. The Raiden Shogun doesn't need people like him helping her rule the nation. ｜ 怪不得连「神之眼」都被收回去了，雷电将军治理国家也不想要这样的人协助吧。
- Go to the excavation site ｜ 前往发掘现场
- Well, you say that, but The Chasm was never a place that ordinary people could access. Even if people with other intentions entered... ｜ 话是这么说，不过层岩巨渊本身也不是一般人能够下来的。即使那些别有所图的人下来了…
- Challenge time may not exceed 480 seconds. ｜ 挑战时间不得超过480秒。
- Anyway, let's call it a day. Let's go back to the Komore Teahouse. ｜ 总之，这次采风之行就到此为止吧，我们先回木漏茶室去。
- You heard the question. Now answer me. ｜ 你听到我的问题了，对吗？
- He left me, built himself a wooden raft, and tried to sail across the sea to where the outsiders live. He said he wanted to hunt freely there and pick flowers he'd never seen before... Beautiful flowers... ｜ 他离我而去，扎了一条木筏想要渡海去另一边，外人的岛上…他说他想要在那里自由地捕猎，采摘没见过的花…好看的花…
- Oh, I love it here! ｜ 嗯，我很喜欢这里！
- Wait, the Divine Knowledge Capsule!? Didn't it fall into the matra's hands in Port Ormos? ｜ 这个神明罐装知识是？！我记得在奥摩斯港的时候，应该落在风纪官手里了呀？
- You may spare the formalities. Is everyone okay? ｜ 不必多礼，都还好吗？
- So before I came over this time, I took a page from Melus' book and decided to make a list of everything. This way, it's easy to see which tasks you haven't checked off. ｜ 所以这次过来之前，我学迈勒斯那样，把所有事都记在备忘本上，这样要做什么就一目了然。
- Ooh! We're coming too! ｜ 噢！也带上我们一起吧！
- Ask Little Lulu ｜ 询问璐璐
- Together with Paimon, you open the suspicious wooden box and each take out a bomb. After studying how to ignite the fuses, both of you count down "3, 2, 1" and set the detonators, and both of you throw the bombs far into Cider Lake... ｜ 与派蒙一起打开了可疑的木箱，各自取出了炸弹，研究了点火的方法，倒数「三，二，一」，拉响引信，一同把炸弹远远丢进了果酒湖里…
- Ready for trial. ｜ 放马过来。
- Another flower is blooming... ｜ 又有一朵开了…
- With your cooking skills, I don't think you will be doing a disservice to the Good Hunter brand! Hee-hee. ｜ 以你的手艺的话，应该不会砸了「猎鹿人」的招牌吧，嘿嘿。
- Cinnabar Spindle ｜ 辰砂之纺锤
- "May the Lord of Geo protect us on our journey to a faraway land, a new home where we can start a life all our own..." ｜ 「愿岩王爷保佑我们能顺利远走高飞，在新的国度展开属于自己的生活…」
- Can't be bad for business... ｜ 毕竟酒馆的客人也多了…
- Opportunistic Gain ｜ 渔人之利
- Instructor's Tea Cup ｜ 教官的茶杯
- Rawat's Notes ｜ 拉瓦特的笔记
- Perhaps. Nearly everyone who lives in the desert has some form of hardship or regret. But even so, we must still continue on with our lives. ｜ 或许吧。生活在沙漠中的人，大多各有苦衷。可就算是这样，我们也要继续生活下去。
- Wh—What did I promise? ｜ 我…约定了什么？

- Notice ｜ 通知
- Achieve victory with characters defeated less than twice during the battle ｜ 胜利时，角色被击倒次数小于2
- Good for your business? Paimon's lost. You were just talking about how the two industries were separate, and now they're suddenly connected? ｜ 我，我有点想不明白了！炼金药剂对酒庄的生意有利？这两者之间有什么联系吗？
- Oh? I don't think I've ever seen you guys before. Here for business? ｜ 嗯？生面孔啊，找我有什么事吗？
- Talk to Kinich and return to the site of the ceremony ｜ 与基尼奇交谈返回仪式现场
- Dain never handed me the eye. ｜ 戴因并没有把「眼睛」交给我。
- You have encountered her several times, correct? ｜ 你应该见过她好几次，对吗？
- Potion Characteristics ｜ 药剂特征
- Wh—Why you... you unruly maid! ｜ 你、你…！你这个大逆不道的家伙！
- Oho, a bold statement... I like it, hahaha. The rule against outsider participation is long overdue for a change anyway. ｜ 哇，口气好大，我喜欢，哈哈哈，不准外人参赛的规则，也是时候改改了。
- Now, switch to the Spiritway on the right! ｜ 就是现在，切换到右边的「游隙灵道」！
- Lyudochka departs. ｜ 柳达离开了
- No, thank YOU for taking time out of your busy schedule to pay us a visit! ｜ 没事没事，草神大人您能匀出时间来到大巴扎一趟，大家高兴还来不及呢。
- Hah. So you are not alone! Right, then. After I dispose of you, I suppose I must then burn those new-budded sprouts to the ground. Annoyances, all of them! ｜ 原来不是「一个人」哪。看来，解决你以后，还得去把所有新生的幼苗烧尽才行。麻烦死了。
- Wha— You're gonna blow this whole place up!? ｜ 你要把这里整个炸掉吗！
- Hey! Paimon doesn't eat soil! ｜ 派蒙才不会去吃土嘞！
- How much have you gathered already? ｜ 你搜集多少了？
- Artifact Set ｜ 圣遗物套装
- Later on, she was chosen by the Sun. The star was given a place in the daytime sky to complement the Sun's dazzling light. ｜ 后来，太阳选中了她，她以星星的身份来到了白天的天空，映衬着太阳的光芒。
- Use a Tatankasaurus or a Collective of Plenty character's sprint to interrupt the Furnace Shell Mountain Weasel's charge. ｜ 利用突角龙或「沃陆之邦」的部族成员的冲刺，中断炉壳山鼬的冲撞。
- Watch Your Footing ｜ 「小心脚下」
- Let's go. The final puzzle awaits. ｜ 走吧，最后的谜题还等着我们。
- All of it? Though my business may not seem so big, I should warn that I can get what you need, both legitimately and... not so legitimately. Best you give me an actual number. ｜ 所有？我先说啊，别看我的铺子不大，货源可是有明有暗，加起来广得很。
- #So, {NICKNAME} and Paimon... Do you need me to help with something? ｜ #所以，{NICKNAME}和派蒙，有什么我能帮忙的事情吗？
- Things just aren't that difficult around here. ｜ 在这里，不会这么麻烦。
- Skyward Spine ｜ 天空之脊
- No way, Gaming! You're always the one picking up the tab. ｜ 那不又跟平时一样了嘛！这怎么行，嘉明。
- Ah, let me think... Yes, this way. ｜ 我想想…来这边吧。
- Ifa ｜ 伊法
- Termination in Twilight Most Terrible ｜ 终结于苛烈黄昏
- A Blazegem Inscription! You can make them too? ｜ 「燃晶名刻」！希诺宁，你也会做？
- Energy Cost|{param7:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param7:I}
- Mr. Jakob... ｜ 雅各布先生…
- Besides, I'm sure Stanley still has a few stories left to tell. Hehe... They're what inspired me to become an adventurer in the first place. ｜ 而且，我还想再听听斯坦利先生的故事。嘿嘿…毕竟，他是我梦想的起点。
- Talk to Sara ｜ 与莎拉对话
- Aren't you curious what the other piece is used for? ｜ 哼，你就不好奇另一张符纸的作用是什么吗？
- "How to avoid awkward social situations." That's Her Excellency for you... she thinks of everything, doesn't she? ｜ 「如何避免令人尴尬的社交场合」，不愧是珊瑚宫大人，连这个都考虑到了吗？
- Among those... people, are some of my old friends who served with me under the Shogunate. ｜ 那些…人，其中有几位在下的「旧友」，之前和在下一起，在幕府效力。
- There seem to be harvestable Rainbow Roses nearby ｜ 附近似乎有「虹彩蔷薇」可采集
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Since it's for Rana... ｜ 既然是为了帮助拉娜…
- All will be united as one, and gain the power to combat the apocalypse. ｜ 我们所有人一起，也能由此获得对抗末日的力量。
- Earthquake? Oh, you mean that bit a moment ago where everything was swaying? Well, I was thinking about other things, so I didn't pay much attention... ｜ 地震…？哦哦，是说刚才晃了一下的事情吧？因为在思考别的事情，所以没有特别注意…
- I can say with confidence that I make the best steaks in Mondstadt. ｜ 我可以自豪地说，在蒙德我的肉排绝对是最顶级的。
- Veneficus Mechanicus: Inferno ｜ 奇术机关·万里焰焰
- Huh, something seems a little off about Ganyu... ｜ 嗯？感觉甘雨脸色不太对劲的样子。
- Bloodstained Iron Mask ｜ 染血的铁假面
- Nice to meet you, Gyoubu Koban. My name is Yumemizuki Mizuki. I'm a yumekui-baku. We're youkai, just like you. ｜ 你好，刑部小判，我叫梦见月瑞希，是个食梦貘，和你一样，也是妖怪哦。
- The medicine that Zakariya has made for Maruf. It smells and looks like something bitterly terrible... ｜ 扎卡里亚为马鲁夫制作的药。无论是闻起来还是看起来都很苦…
- #Oh, I don't mean to be a bother... but could you be faster, {NICKNAME}, just a little faster? They're all I can think about now... ｜ #{NICKNAME}…能不能，能不能快一点呢？柯莎满脑子想的，已经全都是异国的花了…
- Agreed. ｜ 没错。
- We have many members who can't read, so books are of little use to them. What they know of handling mechanisms has been learned solely through word-of-mouth. ｜ 我们协会里有不少成员，都不太擅长跟书本打交道，对付机关的经验，全得靠口口相传。
- The Four at Loggerheads ｜ 剑拔弩张四人众
- An Electro Hypostasis channels nearby elemental energy to repair damaged elemental entities. Contains the essence of Electro energy. An ordinary prism separates white light into its component colors; a Lightning Prism, however, channels flowing energies and weaves them into lightning. It will continue to do so even after the Electro Hypostasis has been defeated. ｜ 无相之雷用于汇聚元素，修复损伤的元素物质。其中蕴含着至纯的雷之力。棱镜能将构成光的色彩区分，而雷光棱镜将奔流的能量编织成纯粹的雷光。即使无相之雷已经被击败，雷元素也持续在这只棱镜中汇聚。
- *cough* Just go... ｜ 咳、咳咳，快走吧。
- Charged Attack Stamina Cost|{param8:F1} ｜ 重击体力消耗|{param8:F1}点
- ...Medicinal herbs? ｜ 药材？
- #But if we connect all the different pieces together, the true story that emerges is the one {M#he}{F#she} told us... the now-erased life of The Balladeer. ｜ #将其中所有不同的地方串联起来，就是{NICKNAME}所说的…散兵被抹去的一生。
- I really felt like I was ready to move on. I wouldn't be so hesitant now if it weren't for these hyper-realistic dreams I've been having. ｜ 本来我已经准备向前看了，要不是这一场过于真实的梦，我也不至于如此犹豫。
- Yeah, that's it! Tell me what you're thinking in this exact moment! ｜ 没错，就现在，这一分钟这一秒钟你的心里正在想什么呢？
- Strange Life-Form ｜ 奇怪的生物
- #Look, {NICKNAME}! That stone is floating! Luckily, it's tethered in place. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，快看！那块石头浮在空中欸，而且连链子都拉直了。
- Abandoned Production Zone ｜ 废弃生产区
- I'm not sure how, but Lady Haniyyah noticed the Sumpter Beasts' strange behavior and calmed them before it all went down. The disaster was averted before it even happened. ｜ 但海妮耶大人不知用什么方法，察觉到了这群驮兽的异样，提前将它们安抚下来，阻止了一场灾难。
- Put on Ice ｜ 未来解冻计划
- And speaking of formal tone... What is the deal with that girl, Fischl? She's a curious one. ｜ 话说回来，那个叫菲谢尔的女孩子，还真是神奇。
- Just a little. ｜ 是啊…
- I'm a little concerned about the auction. I wonder how my secretarial trio is getting along. ｜ 我还是有点担心拍卖会那边，不知道三位秘书是否顺利。
- We've only just heard of these factions... It does sound like you've got some serious beef, but... ｜ 我们现在才听说什么鹰羽派、蚱蜢派之类的…你们之间听起来好像是有很深的矛盾，但是…
- Just remember not to say too much. Be discreet. ｜ 记得别说漏嘴哦！
- Hu Tao ｜ 胡桃
- This is the spot where the painting needs to be restored... ｜ 这幅画作需要修复的地方在这里…
- Beep-beep. ｜ 哔哔——
- Plunge DMG|{param7:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param7:F1P}
- So must it be... Hahaha, yes, so must it be! ｜ 非如此不可…哈哈，非如此不可！
- "Loudly snoring Dev. Completely unaware of what's around them..."\n"If you make enough noise, it should wake them up and scare them off..." ｜ 「正在呼呼大睡的迪弗，完全没有警惕心…」\n「制造足够大的动静，应该就能把它们吵醒、吓跑…」
- #{NICKNAME}, please have a word with Garde Menthe. I'll go speak with Mr. Garcia. ｜ #{NICKNAME}，请您去向梅莘警官说明情况，我去找加尔恰先生。

- Oh, so today's your birthday! Happy birthday! Um... is there any cake left? ｜ 哦哦！今天是莉诺尔的生日呀，生日快乐！那个…蛋糕还有吗？
- Trapper's Pride ｜ 陷阵者的自矜
- But Paimon bets that the first ever scholar didn't set out to become a scholar... ｜ 不过，我觉得第一位学者的愿望肯定不是「成为学者」吧？
- Teppei, don't you think there's something strange about this place? ｜ 哲平，你有没有觉得这里的氛围有些特别？
- Good night. I'll be staying up for a little while yet — want to run some numbers while everything's nice and quiet. ｜ 晚安。我要等会儿再睡，趁夜深人静正好算几笔账。
- Hah! "Hate," you say? Such a strong word! ｜ 哈！「仇恨」！好重的词！
- On edge, you say? Ah yeah... Yeah, I've noticed it too. ｜ 大家很浮躁啊…确实，我也感觉到了。

- ...Come with me, Traveler. The hour of execution has come. ｜ …随我来吧，行刑之时已到。

- Hello: The Present ｜ 初次见面·如今
- Sakura Shrimp Crackers? That's it? Seems like he isn't so rich after all... ｜ 原来只是几份「绯樱虾仙贝」？好像也不是很富有的样子…
- Imagine how that person will react to seeing your story, and the Memento you chose to leave behind, here and now... it's really fun, isn't it? ｜ 想象那人看到你们的故事有什么反应，然后在此刻选择将要留下的物品…这件事很有趣吧。
- I am truly sorry. I have spoken to Mr. Horellou, and we will surely compensate you for the fright we caused. ｜ 万分抱歉…我已经和奥雷卢商量好了，会给您足够的谢礼。
- Energy Cost|{param4:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param4:I}
- Okay, well go get them, then bring them here. ｜ 那你准备好了之后，再拿给我吧。
- Why not do this in Fontaine? ｜ 你为什么不在枫丹取材？
- *sigh* Then again, I do have a pile of admin work waiting for me today... ｜ 唉，不过我今天确实还有别的书案工作…
- It looks like some kind of soup. Hmm... Paimon can't tell what's inside... ｜ 好像是什么汤的样子，嗯…也看不出来是用什么材料做的…
- Let's go to the Pankration Ring! ｜ 去拳力斗技场看看吧!
- "Sky-blue seas, milk-white hot springs, ash-grey mountain rock... The colors of nature reflect the vistas of the world. They teach us down-to-earth artistry." ｜ 「蔚蓝的海面，乳白的温泉，浅灰的山石…自然的色彩反映着世界原本的姿态，教会了我们朴素的美学。」
- Recipe: Poissonchant Pie ｜ 食谱：鱼鱼咏唱派
- Chat: Fate ｜ 闲聊·命运
- Sorry to disappoint you, but I've picked every last seashell off this beach today! ｜ 抱歉，要让你失望了。今天的贝壳，已经被我们捡完啦！
- Sail through the thunderstorm, Kosekimaru! ｜ 穿越过雷暴吧，「越石丸」！
- No kidding... So where's Rukh Shah? I thought I'd help these two out by asking about the theft. Anything you can tell 'em? ｜ #原来如此。老爷子，鲁克沙大哥怎么没在？我想替{M#他们}{F#她们}打听一下失窃那个事，能告诉{M#他们}{F#她们}吗？
- Err... Err? ｜ 嗯…嗯？
- Follow Dunyarzad ｜ 跟随迪娜泽黛
- A monumental stone statue that watches over Liyue. Legends say it was sculpted in the image of the Geo Archon. With its bustling harbor which attracts many traders, Liyue's history is one of enduring stability, just like this statue. ｜ 镇驻在璃月大地各处的巨大石像，据说是依照岩之神的形象塑造的。所谓「百货错出，千船继至，万商云来」的璃月，大概有着与它的神像一般深厚沉静的历史吧。
- That is a poor track record... ｜ 居然还输了这么多次…
- Let me think... I can't remember. My memory isn't that good, so I easily forget things... ｜ 我想想…记不清啦。我记忆力不是很好，经常忘事…
- Having checked all the case files, you decide to find the perpetrator's modus operandi. ｜ 查看了所有卷宗，你决定找出犯人的犯罪过程。
- How about it? Do you want to keep going? In any case... Hehe, it's 500 Mora to play. ｜ 怎么样，要继续吗，总之…嘿嘿，参加一次得五百摩拉。

- Yep, this is a comfortable place to rest, I guess that's one thing here that's better than the desert... But other than that, there's not much going for this place. ｜ 没错，我这里的环境还是很好的，不像沙漠…这可是为数不多的优点了！
- Oh, great. You're awake! ｜ 太好了，你们也醒过来了。

- May your wealth multiply in the year ahead! ｜ 也祝你今年财源广进呀。
- Do you not know? This is called the Dance of the Frenzied Turtle! ｜ 你有所不知，这是师父传我的「金鼋乱舞」！
- Headbutt! ｜ 头槌！
- Haha, everyone catch your breath... Come on, deep breaths, one... two. Now don't panic, the party hasn't started yet! ｜ 哈哈，大家都喘口气，来，深呼吸，一…二。别紧张，大会还没开始呢。
- Whoa... that's a lot! Looks like the work of a Chief Justice isn't easy at all. ｜ 居然有这么多，看来最高审判官平时的工作也不轻松呢！

- The CRIT Rate of <color=#FFD780FF>Leonine Bite</color> is increased by 10%.\nAdditionally, after a Flame-Mane's Fist attack hits an opponent and deals CRIT Hits during a single Blazing Lioness state, it will cause the CRIT DMG of Leonine Bite to increase by 15% for the rest of Blazing Lioness's duration and extend that duration by 0.5s. This effect can be triggered every 0.2s. The duration can be extended for a maximum of 2s and CRIT DMG can be increased by a maximum of 60% this way. ｜ <color=#FFD780FF>炎啸狮子咬</color>的暴击率提升10%。\n此外，在一次炽炎狮子的持续期间，炽鬃拳命中敌人并造成暴击后，将使持续期间内炎啸狮子咬的暴击伤害提升15%，炽炎狮子的持续时间延长0.5秒。该效果每0.2秒至多触发一次，至多通过这种方式使持续时间延长2秒，暴击伤害提升60%。

- All Paimon's saying is that Xianyun sure does try hard to save face. ｜ 这个女人还真要面子…

- Um... Though the bronze plate does have a musical score on it, I've never seen any of the symbols before. ｜ 唔…虽然这张铜板应该的确是乐谱没错啦，但是上面使用的符号我从来没见过。
- This is an anchor. Docked ships use it to hold themselves in position, to stop the wind and waves from blowing them away. ｜ 这个叫船锚，是靠岸的船为了防止被风浪吹跑，用来固定位置的。
- I'm searching for my husband, Inaba Tousaburou Kyuuzou. He is a tall man without any facial hair and has a scar on the side of his forehead. He has yet to return home despite the ceasefire. ｜ 寻夫稻叶藤三郎久藏。高大无须，额角有剑疤。自停战以来尚未归家。
- You're not wrong... Hold on! Why do I still hear you in my head? ｜ 这话倒是没错…欸？为什么我还是能听到？
- But the whole thing also made me realize that there are still many problems in Sumeru, and as a desert-dweller, I'm still not completely ready to settle down on this side of the wall. ｜ 不过这件事也让我意识到，须弥还存在着许多问题。而我作为沙漠子民，现阶段还没有真正成为墙壁这一侧的居民。
- I know that before he became a Forest Watcher, Master Tighnari once spent a long time conducting research at Pardis Dhyai. ｜ 我知道提纳里师父在成为巡林官以前，曾经有很长一段时间在禅那园专心钻研学术。
- Aquabuses are dedicated vehicles that use them. ｜ 巡轨船就是这种路线专用的交通工具。
- Oh yeah, they don't know Fischl yet, do they! Okay, so here's the deal, there's a princess from a faraway land and her retinue, who're also coming on this trip... ｜ 噢噢对，他们还不认识菲谢尔！是这样的，有位来自异国他乡的尊贵皇女将携大臣们参加本次旅行…
- It's nothing, I'm just surprised by the amount... The shrine maiden gig was surprisingly lucrative... ｜ 没什么，只是数目有点惊讶到我了…巫女的差事，还真是赚钱啊…
- "I only wish to give my friend a little 'surprise,' that's all. Isn't that what magicians do?" ｜ 「我只是为了给我的朋友一个小『惊喜』罢了，这不正是魔术师的职责吗？」
- That's an unexpected solution. ｜ 意想不到的办法。
- Talk to Wrench Wang ｜ 与王扳子对话
- Mr. Horellou has filled me in on everything that has happened to you. Not bad, Mr. Guardian. Turns out you're pretty talented after all, eh? ｜ 你们的事我都听奥雷卢先生说了，不错啊，「守护者先生」。你这不是挺有本事的吗？
- Tonight at midnight, the deal will take place in Guyun Stone Forest. The Alcor will wait there as long as needed. ｜ 今晚半夜，孤云阁交易，「死兆星」号会一直等着，不见不散。
- Pull! ｜ 用力拔！
- I'll do my job. ｜ 我会做好自己的工作的。
- Wonderful! Your Tepetlisaurus friend looks like a remarkable fellow, just like... just like a human. He even has his own clothes... ｜ 真棒，你们家的小嵴锋龙看上去就是个很棒的家伙，看上去…人模人样的，还穿着衣服…

- Electrograna... ｜ 雷种子…
- A flower touched by the witch who once dreamt of burning away all the demons in the world. The anonymous flames affectionately caress the hands of those who touch it. ｜ 曾经梦想烧尽世间魔物的魔女触碰过的花朵。无名的火舌温暖地舔舐触碰它的人。
- Hey! You're laughing more and more! ｜ 喂！你笑得越来越开心了啊！
- Could this cup itself have poison on it!? ｜ 这个杯子，本身就是有毒的？！
- So you get to have fun in the Furball Fortress, while Oz gets to treat himself, resting the way he likes. Seems like good deal for all! ｜ 这样看来，菲谢尔在「猫茸茸城堡」里玩得开心，而奥兹用以前习惯的方式休息养神，对他们两个都是好事呢！
- So please, have an honest and sincere conversation with one another, and put your hostile feelings to rest. ｜ 还请你们开诚布公地好好谈谈吧，努力消除彼此之间的敌意…

- *yawn*... Urgh... ｜ …啊…呜…
- I always found him fishy... ｜ 我早就觉得他有些可疑…
- Liyue Harbor's a pretty safe place. I've not seen any big trouble the whole time I've been in uniform. Maybe you get a few more pickpockets and petty thieves around Chihu Rock, but that's about it. ｜ 璃月港内的治安一向很好，我穿上这套制服以来还没碰上过什么大事，也就吃虎岩那边的小偷小摸稍微多一些。
- At its heart is a true story. ｜ 你知道它是真事。
- Of course. The Jade Chamber symbolizes wealth and abundance. The kite bearing its design is said to bring riches in the future to those who fly it. ｜ 当然。「群玉阁」寓意财源广进，祝福你在未来的日子里多多发财。
- This Vision played a major part in my fight against the Abyss. If it hadn't shown up when it did, I don't know who I would be today. ｜ 这枚「神之眼」在我与深渊的对抗中意义重大。如果不是它及时出现，不知道现在的我会是什么样子。
- Food ｜ 食物

- Haha... I fear that peeking would have been a little difficult from this altitude. ｜ 哈哈…这么远的距离，偷看有些难吧。

- Crab Roe, Rice, and Salt... ｜ 好像有蟹黄、稻米、盐…

- You surmise correctly. This place did oneself build, as did one design the mechanisms within. ｜ 那是自然，除了洞府之外，那些机关也是本仙自己所建。
- Most people who wish to have an audience with Her Excellency usually start by presenting their name cards and official documents to Miwa, who then passes them along. ｜ 外人想见珊瑚宫大人，一般会先将名帖和公文呈递给美和，再由美和转交给珊瑚宫大人。
- Mr. Garcia seems to be troubled by something... ｜ 加尔恰先生似乎正在为某事而烦恼…
- Although the instructions had come from an old and enigmatic prophecy, it is in fact nothing like the ancient mechanism that we had all imagined it to be. I believe the lantern only serves as a simple signal... ｜ 虽然来自一个古老神秘的预言，但它并不是我们所想的古老机关，就只是一个小小的信号而已。

- Give the Bamboo Slip that has elemental powder on it to the impostor Gendou Ringo (Lyudochka). This way, you can tail her. ｜ 将粘有元素粉末的特制「竹签」交给假玄冬林檎（柳达希卡），这样就可以跟踪她了。

- Once, when Mualani was surfing, she encountered a freshwater shark. Though initially far away, it approached her rapidly and soundlessly, before suddenly breaching the surface, its razor-sharp teeth reflecting the sunlight with a cold gleam.\n"Haha, are you here to surf too?" Mualani nimbly cut back, swiftly switching directions and dodging its attack. She sped up, putting some distance between them: "In that case, let's race!"\nAccepting her challenge, the freshwater shark pursued her relentlessly as Mualani sped on ahead with everything she had, the spray laying a long white raceway for them.\nAs they approached the coastline, the freshwater shark turned back in a fury, its hunt a failure. Mualani, not far away, waved back at it: "Let's play again next time!"\nLater, she would encounter this same challenger in those same waters. Mualani dubbed it "Sharky," and the two of them raced over and over. In the first few rounds, Mualani was faster, but the shark was not to be outdone, and slowly closed the gap, until finally, it caught her. But that time, it didn't chomp her, but instead elegantly shook its chubby body, announcing itself the victor.\n"You won this one! Okay, here's your promised reward." Mualani fed it the dried fish she'd brought, and rubbed its fins.\nThey became true surfing buddies. Until one day, after they finished playing, Sharky circled her a few times, and then waved its caudal fin, swimming off in the direction of the setting sun.\nMualani waved as she usually did, but when she next went to her old spot to surf, she didn't see that speedy round shape as she normally did.\nMualani knew that any encounter is but a part of the journey, and that everyone eventually finds their new destination. Still, that doesn't mean the happiness that was shared must disappear.\nSo thinking, Mualani took out a piece of paper, and began to draw. Two weeks later, she handed the design for the "Sharky Surfboard" to an artisan she was familiar with. Sharky's fins were hard, but its tail was flexible. To achieve this, she chose her materials carefully, also recreating the texture of Sharky's skin, and even reproducing how its teeth meshed together.\nAs for the color scheme, it naturally had to be eye-catching so that everyone who saw Sharky would remember what it looked like!\nAnd so, with her new gear in tow, Mualani was the center of attention once more. Amidst the ardent cries, the "Sharky Surfboard" was eventually mass-produced and sold to the public — though naturally, that version can't bite.\nWhen Mualani surfs, she occasionally wonders when the next time she'll get to race Sharky is. After all, Mualani really wants to know just who is faster: Sharky Surfboard, or Sharky. ｜ 玛拉妮冲浪的时候曾经遇到过一只淡水鲨。它从远处无声无息又非常迅速地靠近玛拉妮，一下子跳出水面，朝着玛拉妮露出锋利的牙齿，在太阳底下反射出一道寒光。\n「哈哈，你也是来冲浪的吗？」玛拉妮灵活地调转方向，避开它的冲锋，脚下加速拉开距离：「那就和我比比速度吧！」\n接受了挑战的淡水鲨猛追不舍，玛拉妮全力冲刺，浪花也自觉地为它们铺开一条长长的白色赛道。\n临近岸边，淡水鲨追猎无果，悻悻掉头离去，玛拉妮在不远处挥手：「下次再一起玩呀！」\n之后，玛拉妮好几次在相似的水域遇到了相同的挑战者。玛拉妮将它称为鲨鲨，一人一鲨多番比试。前几回玛拉妮速度更快，但鲨鲨也不甘示弱，一点点缩短距离，终于追上了玛拉妮。这回它没有张着牙咬过去，而是优雅地摆动胖胖的身躯，宣告它才是比赛的胜利者。\n「这回是你赢了！来，说好的奖励。」玛拉妮给它投喂带来的小鱼干，顺便摸了摸它的鳍。\n他们真的成了一起冲浪的伙伴。直到有一天，鲨鲨游玩结束，围着玛拉妮转了几圈，然后就摆摆尾巴，朝着夕阳的方向游远。\n玛拉妮像往常一样朝它挥挥手。后来，玛拉妮再去老地方冲浪时，却再也没见到那只圆润又迅猛的身影。\n玛拉妮知道，相遇本身即是一段旅途，大家总会有新的目的地，可是一起度过的时光却不会消失。\n想到这里，玛拉妮翻出一张图纸，在上面写写画画。半个月后，她将「鲨鲨冲浪板」的设计图交给了熟悉的工匠。鲨鲨的鳍是硬硬的，但是尾巴很有弹性。为此，她精心挑选材料，还原她记忆中鲨鲨的触感，甚至连内部的牙齿和咬合关节都进行了复刻。\n至于配色，自然要足够吸引眼球，要让见过鲨鲨的人都能记住它的样子。\n玛拉妮踩着新装备出场，再次聚集了众人的目光。在大家的呼声中，「鲨鲨冲浪板」最终得以量产并上架售卖——当然，公开出售的版本并不能咬人。\n玛拉妮冲浪的时候，偶尔会想到，什么时候能再和鲨鲨比试一回呢？「鲨鲨冲浪板」和鲨鲨到底哪边更快，她真的很想知道答案。

- A fungus that grows in layers upon layers, like a sea of clouds, and which mostly grows on trees deep in the rainforest. Therefore, they are considered by the people of Sumeru to be the holy crystallization of Rukkhadevata's legacy.\nIn Sumeru, those who dwell in the forest have a tradition of offering Rukkhashava Mushrooms to the Akademiya, but no one knows what these offerings are meant to be used for. Word has it that the Akademiya always performs a secret annual ritual at the Sanctuary of Surasthana, during which the sages will consume these mushrooms to commemorate Lord Rukkhadevata's sacrifice. ｜ 如云海般层层叠叠生长的菌类，大多寄生于雨林深处的乔木之上，因此被须弥人视为树王遗德熏结而出的圣体。\n在须弥，森林中的居民有着向教令院贡奉树王圣体菇的传统，但这些贡品的用途却不为世人所知。据某些逸话中说，教令院每年会在净善宫进行秘密的仪式。在仪式上，贤者们会通过食用树王圣体菇的方式来纪念树王的牺牲。

- Back when I was little, the adults all said I had to be more girly, that I should learn and study all these things. Wasn't ever any good at it, though, and I'd often get roasted bad. Rock 'n' roll's a different story. No one ever taught me, but I can do it just fine. And of course, the adults say "that's unladylike!" *sigh* Talk about prejudice. ｜ 小时候，大人都让我要像个女孩子，让我学这个，学那个，但我天赋不行，总是挨骂。摇滚就不一样，没人教我，我也能做得很好，但却被大人说「没个女孩儿样」，唉，这就叫成见。

- After using an Elemental Skill, gain a 20% Geo DMG Bonus for 10s. While under a shield granted by the Crystallize reaction, the above effect will be increased by 150%, and this additional increase disappears 1s after that shield is lost. ｜ 施放元素战技后的10秒内，岩元素伤害加成提升20%；若处于结晶反应产生的护盾庇护下，上述效果提高150%，进一步提高的效果将在失去结晶护盾庇护的1秒后移除。
- What an outstanding trick! Sorry, Lyney, it seems that my previous praise was woefully inadequate. Clearly, magic is the superior art form to theft. ｜ 真是精彩的魔术！抱歉林尼先生，刚刚我的称赞不是很恰当，魔术和偷窃肯定不能混为一谈。

- Gain the "Scorching Brilliance" effect when using an Elemental Skill or Burst: CRIT DMG increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color> and ATK increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color> for 6s. This effect can trigger once every 10s.\nWhile a "Scorching Brilliance" instance is active, its duration is increased by 2s after Normal or Charged attacks deal Elemental DMG. This effect can trigger once every second, and the max duration increase is 6s.\nAdditionally, when the equipping character is in the Nightsoul's Blessing state, "Scorching Brilliance" effects are increased by 75%, and its duration will not count down when the equipping character is off-field. ｜ 施放元素战技或元素爆发时，获得「焚光」效果：暴击伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>40%</color>，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>56%</color>，该效果持续6秒，每10秒至多触发一次。\n持续期间内，普通攻击或重击造成元素伤害后，将使此次「焚光」效果的持续时间延长2秒，该效果每1秒至多触发一次，至多通过这种方式使持续时间延长6秒。\n此外，处于夜魂加持状态下时，「焚光」效果提高75%，且「焚光」效果在装备者处于后台时不进行计时。
- The question we should be asking now is... ｜ 问题的关键在于…

- <color=#FFE14BFF>Shattered Armor</color>\nThe blazing twin-horned crown atop the Emperor of Fire and Iron is a <color=#FFE14BFF>Pyro</color> organ that enables mightier elemental attacks and doughtier defenses. Should its Elemental Ward be broken at the right time using <color=#FFE14BFF>Elemental Reactions</color>, the fight will be made easier. ｜ <color=#FFE14BFF>锐意碎甲之章</color>\n铁甲熔火帝皇身躯上方的双角熔火冠冕是<color=#FFE14BFF>火元素</color>的身体器官，能够使其进行更猛烈的元素攻击，并且拥有更强的防御能力。如果能利用<color=#FFE14BFF>元素反应</color>，在适合的时机将它的元素护罩消除的话，或许就能轻松应对了吧。
- Luxurious Sea-Lord ｜ 衔珠海皇
- How are we supposed to make a potion like that!? ｜ 这种药剂根本做不出来吧！
- It is no difficult matter, saving Mihir. Perhaps I might even call it trivial. But we Pari each have our mission, and we also have different... ideals. ｜ 解救米希尔对我来说可不是什么难事，应该说，不费吹灰之力。只是吾辈花灵各自使命不同，理念…理念也不同。
- Kachina, Ajaw is on the run. Help me catch him! ｜ 卡齐娜，阿乔逃走了，快去抓它！
- It's precisely because they're so strict that passing is considered impressive. Hmph, I've gotta grab this chance to ask Sedile everything! ｜ 正是因为考核的严格，所以能通过考核才了不起，哼，必须得抓住瑟琪前辈度假的机会，好好问清楚！

- The time flies by, and night soon falls... ｜ 时间流逝…夜幕降临…
- I've poured all my best effort into this fireworks show. And now that we're here, I sincerely hope you will enjoy it. ｜ 本次「烟花会」由我负责，我已竭尽全力做到我眼中的最好。无论如何，都希望你们能享受这次盛会。

- Explore the dream of the Vasara Tree ｜ 探索莎兰树的梦
- Okey-dokey. Don't worry, Albedo, I'll be on my best behavior! ｜ 嗯，可莉知道啦，阿贝多哥哥你放心吧，可莉会听话的！
- A hanging lamp that is widely used throughout the Stadium of the Sacred Flame. It features an external layer of Flammabomb Wood and a composite metal internal structure, such that durability can be balanced with lighter weight so that these lamps could be installed in all kinds of different places, no matter what the conditions.\nThe terrain in the Stadium of the Sacred Flame is quite complex, and many of its narrow passages are not suited to placing large lamps. Taking this environment into account and scenarios in which audience members or contestants might get lost, the Speaker's Chamber tailored these lights to be installed in narrow spaces such that the Stadium might stay well-lit, and also to serve as road signs for the lost. ｜ 在圣火竞技场内被广泛使用的挂灯，运用了外层「燃爆木」，内层金属的复合结构。这种设计在保证耐用性的同时，尽可能地减轻了灯具的整体重量，确保这种挂灯可以广泛地适用于不同状况的墙面。\n圣火竞技场内的地形较为复杂，许多狭窄通道不宜放置大型灯具。考虑到在这种环境下，偶尔会有观众或选手迷路的情况，「话事处」特意定制了能安装在狭小空间内的挂灯，一来为竞技场提供足够的照明，二来作为应急的路标，为迷路的人指引方向。
- Couldn't find me, huh? ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BIGBROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_BIGSISTER]}，看来确实找不到我呢。
- Elynas ｜ 厄里那斯
- Now, I trust that you're sensible people, who know better than to take advantage of their host's generosity. ｜ 相信你们也是聪明人，不可能提过分的要求，对吧？
- Ouch! Ow! I haven't been hit, but it already hurts! Please stay your merciful hands... and feet! ｜ 好痛！还没挨到但是已经觉得很痛了！唯独这点还请高抬贵手…也请高抬贵脚！
- "Four Divine Kings of Narcissus" Member ｜ 「纳西索斯·四天王之一」
- Bingo! Except, I don't think you need to have a sweet dish for it to be a complete meal. Personally, I always skip dessert. ｜ 正是！只不过正餐里未必有甜食，谨慎如我，就将甜食的部分略过咯。
- You probably shouldn't tell this sort of joke in front of strangers. ｜ 喂，不要对陌生人开这种玩笑啦！
- So, what's this shop all about? ｜ 关于这家店…

- Played by Clorinde ｜ 克洛琳德饰
- Ah, that's good to hear. I've been thinking a lot about him... If I could get some more time off, I'd love to pay him a visit. ｜ 那就好，那就好，我还一直挺惦记老爹他的，如果有假期，真想去探望他老人家。
- Help Xamaran's kin ｜ 帮助赞玛兰的同族
- A part of the "Millennial Movement" that wanders amidst the winds. Increases Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>105</color>. When the Elemental Skills or Elemental Bursts of the character wielding this weapon hit opponents, that character gains a Sigil of Remembrance. This effect can be triggered once every 0.2s and can be triggered even if said character is not on the field. When you possess 4 Sigils of Remembrance, all of them will be consumed and all nearby party members will obtain the "Millennial Movement: Farewell Song" effect for 12s. "Millennial Movement: Farewell Song" increases Elemental Mastery by <color=#99FFFFFF>175</color> and increases ATK by <color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>. Once this effect is triggered, you will not gain Sigils of Remembrance for 20s. Of the many effects of the "Millennial Movement," buffs of the same type will not stack. ｜ 飘游风中的「千年的大乐章」的一部分。元素精通提高<color=#99FFFFFF>105</color>点；元素战技或元素爆发命中敌人时，角色获得一枚追思之符，每0.2秒内至多触发一次，角色处于队伍后台也能触发。拥有4枚追思之符时，将消耗所有追思之符，使附近的队伍中所有角色获得持续12秒的「千年的大乐章·别离之歌」效果：元素精通提高<color=#99FFFFFF>175</color>点，攻击力提升<color=#99FFFFFF>35%</color>。触发后20秒内，无法再次获得追思之符。「千年的大乐章」触发的多种数值效果中，同类数值效果不可叠加。
- Souka ｜ 左右加
- Welcome, show's on! Don't miss out on this unique art show. Only five Mora for a ticket! ｜ 欢迎光临，莫失良机，随到随看，仅需五摩拉即可观赏这一独特的艺术展演！
- You've guessed it already, I reckon. In the past, when I could still change my form freely, he... and I, and many of our companions dwelled here. ｜ 你们应该也猜到了吧。在过去，我还能自由变换身形的时候，曾经和他…还有众多伙伴们生活在这里。
- Once you know that you will certainly lose, then you must certainly know the way to win. ｜ 当你知道自己一定会输时，那你肯定也知道如何能赢。
- Well, that's true, but... ｜ 话是这么说啦…
- If only someone could <color=#00E1FFFF>bring them both back</color>, and capture the rehearsal by the huge boulder... ｜ 如果能<color=#00E1FFFF>把他们全都找回来</color>，捕捉到在巨岩边练习的时刻…

- All in all, I'd say that it's all gone rather smoothly thus far, and we've got a good thing going here. ｜ 总而言之，一切顺利。所有事情都在朝着好的方向发展。
- Transmission will be triggered up to once every <color=#faeb8d>{0}</color>s after a character uses an Elemental Skill ｜ 每<color=#faeb8d>{0}</color>秒至多一次：角色施放元素战技后触发映射

- Well, the job did eventually get done, albeit with a complaint from the customer that they had cracked a tooth on a stone while eating. ｜ 虽说最后勉强完成了委托，但还是被客人投诉了，理由是吃到了崩掉大牙的石子。
- Underneath the ancient tree of Nantianmen is a mysterious path that none know of. The mysteries of yore lie buried at the end of that road... ｜ 南天门古树底部竟有一条不为人知的神秘通道。古老的秘密，就埋藏在路的尽头…
- Nope. We have to head north from here and follow the river to reach Sumeru City. ｜ 不是，我们要从奥摩斯港出发向北走，顺着河流往上，才能抵达须弥城。
- Tenacity of the Millelith ｜ 千岩牢固
- Hmm... Seeing as we now know the site of the Rainjade Rite, what should we do next? ｜ 唔…既然已经知道了投珑的地点，接下来我们该怎么办呢？
- Hmm, if I had to guess, he probably received an order from the Sinthe boss to kill my father. Had he refused, he and his family's lives would have been forfeit. ｜ …我猜，应该就是他上面的人告诉他，如果不去杀掉我的老爹，他和他的家人都会死。

- Muganna ｜ 穆甘纳
- Because this occurs, that too must... ｜ 因为这般，所以那般…
- Pale Floater, how dare you underestimate our will! ｜ 白飘飘还真是看轻我们花灵了啊！
- A dated miniature hourglass that serves no practical purpose. It seems as elusive as time itself. ｜ 老旧的微型沙漏，不具有实用性。与岁月一样不可捉摸。
- "...I'm sorry, Katya." ｜ 「…对不起，卡佳。」

- But the amount of cat food isn't too much this time, so it'll be fine if he finishes it all. ｜ 不过这次的猫饭份量很小，它吃光了也没关系。
- Everything's fine... Thanks for asking. ｜ 我没事…谢谢你们。
- *sigh* I dreamed that everyone in town was petrified, turned into statues of stone, leaving me utterly helpless and alone. ｜ 唉，我梦见镇上的大家都被变成了石像，只剩下我一个人待在镇上束手无策。
- *sigh*... There we have it, the verdict is in. What a headache. ｜ 啊…果然是这样的评价，真头疼。
- I'm curious. Did any of the adventurers who responded to the recruitment come and get this kind of Survey Anchor? ｜ 我很好奇，之前那些来应募的冒险家们，有谁也来取过这种桩锚吗？
- Collect the falling Crowns ｜ 接取掉落的花冠
- We meet again! How have you been? ｜ 又见面了！最近好吗？
- There's no more Hydro Archon, you know... And it's still a little early to celebrate. ｜ 水神大人哪都不在，你们还是先别高兴得太早了。
- I understand, I'm scared too... ｜ 我可以理解，我也很害怕…
- Faruzan ｜ 珐露珊
- I don't remember ever saying that. ｜ 我不记得我说过这话。

- I guess that's a language researcher from Haravatat for you... ｜ 不愧是研究语言和文字的知论派学者…

- ...And the rest is history... Well, it used to be... ｜ …然后，才有了后面的一切…
- Aw man! This Chicken Foo Yung is tasting awesome! ｜ 唔哦——！芙蓉鸡片好好吃啊！
- Does that mean that Fontainians are transformed Oceanids? Paimon wasn't expecting that... But if Oceanids can turn into humans, then perhaps this process can be "reversed" as well? ｜ 也就是说枫丹的人们是纯水精灵变的？真是令人惊讶…那或许这个过程，也是「可逆」的？
- We meet again. ｜ 又见面了。
- You mean... Oh, the detective must have people collecting information for them... ｜ 也就是说，一定有人帮侦探收集线索…
- And there's no way to know when I'll return... When my teacher sees my message, he'll flip his lid... ｜ 下次回来也不知道是什么时候…老师看到我留的信，说不定会大发雷霆吧…
- It really blows. Grown-ups have so many responsibilities... ｜ 没办法，身为大人应该要有责任心的…

- The Alcor's Chief Technical Officer, Muzhen, is going after a very important objective, and could use the aid of a highly-experienced adventurer... ｜ 「死兆星」号的首席技术官慕珍正在搜寻重要的目标，急需经验丰富的冒险家出手相助…
- But you have noticed, haven't you? Why my melody would break its bonds at this time, and affect the present. ｜ 你当然注意到了吧？为何我的旋律会在此时突破桎梏影响现世。
- Wishing you all the best for the new year! ｜ #{NICKNAME}，祝你万事顺遂，幸福安康。
- Say what now? They chose to eat it? ｜ 欸？是主动吃的？
- It seems I'm the one who came out on top this time, hehe. I'm actually quite enjoying myself... How about we go for another round? ｜ 看来是我比较厉害嘛。趁热再来一局吧，这游戏还挺有意思的。
- Let's keep on our guard as we have a look around. ｜ 唔，提起警惕来，去四周搜索一下吧。
- Alright! Sandstorm's whipping up now. Everyone to your positions! ｜ 好嘞，沙暴就快起来了，所有人各就各位——
- The Adventurers' Guild has an open partnership with the Eremites, so it would be more surprising if I didn't know her. She looked quite happy when she arrived, and said she was looking forward to seeing you again. ｜ 冒险家协会和镀金旅团的合作关系是公开的，我与她相识也属正常。来时婕德小姐很开心的样子，还说很期待与二位再次相遇。
- Kirya accepts his fate without saying a word. ｜ 基里亚未发一言，默然接受了命运。
- Incoming Tide ｜ 海潮将至
- Thus is the Sacred City of Tollan created. Thus did it don its original form.\nThis is the first memory preserved in the lake of blazing fire. ｜ 圣城图兰因此建立，如是拥有最初的样貌。\n这亦是流炎的湖水中保存的第一段回忆。
- Traveler, I assume you've never had an alcoholic drink before, let alone mixed one? ｜ 旅行者，你是从来没喝过酒，也没调过酒的，对吧？

- About Inazuma's policies... ｜ 关于稻妻的政策…
- Whaaaat!? Can humans really live that long? ｜ 欸欸——！人类可以活这么长时间吗？
- Gorge Guide ｜ 岩渊引路人
- Despite what the lanterns look like, whoever placed them here probably didn't mean any harm. ｜ 不管灯笼是什么样子的，会留灯笼的人多半不会害人。
- Go back to the village chief's house ｜ 返回阿如村村长家
- It is said that after the realm of yore sunk, an ancient order known as the Golden Troupe arose to succeed it. They gathered within the Faded Castle, studying the secrets of the spirit and fate. They built all manner of musical devices in imitation of constructs of the golden realm's golden age, and this portable Autoharmonic Music Box is one such device. Unusually, it resembles a piano more than reed pipes — a quirk of the designer, perhaps.\nThe ancient civilization saw fate as a cruel drama — a script that had been fixed long ago, never to be changed, no matter how the cast or their cantos might shift. By collecting and imitating what "cruel dramas" remained, they were indeed able to create what ignorant antecedents would term "magic." Yet, in matters of fate, they would fail to go any further than the people of bygone times. ｜ 传说在旧日古国沉没之后，曾有继承了古国遗产的，被称为「金色剧团」的古代教团，聚集在褪色城堡中探索精神与命运的奥秘。他们模仿旧日文明黄金时代的造物，制作出了诸多不同类型的音乐机关，这个便携的自鸣音乐盒便是其中之一。或许是出于设计者的个人趣味，它的外型不同于最为常见的簧管型机关，反而更像是钢琴。\n旧日文明曾将命运视为残酷的戏剧。无论演员与唱段如何变换，终幕都早已写定，无可更改。通过搜集遗留下来的残酷戏剧并对其进行研究与模仿，他们确实创造出了被后世无知之人视为魔法的东西。但是在关于命运的事情上，他们却未能比旧日之人走得更远。
- Oh! I, um... Surely, I've put some Mora aside for this... ｜ 喔…！我、我应该留了钱的…
- No worries! Your paper is well-written, and your research looks very promising, too! I've heard a lot of good words about it. ｜ 没关系，没关系！你的论文很好，里面的研究项目也很有应用前景，我可是听见好多人都提起过你的研究了。

- Make a prototype first, then we can talk about investing! ｜ 先做好样品，再来谈投资！

- Oh, Cesar, Cesar... Just mind your own business next time. ｜ 塞萨尔啊塞萨尔，下次你可不要再多管闲事了。
- But that's not all... there's a large void within its elemental power. ｜ 除此之外，在这团元素力中，产生了一个巨大的空洞。

- I'm glad you like it. ｜ 你喜欢就好。
- What do you sell here? ｜ 这里都卖什么？

- #{NICKNAME}? Chasca? Did you two... Oh, um, sorry. Never mind... ｜ 看你们两个的表情，啊…不好意思，没什么，没什么。
- There is a story that goes as follows. A long time ago in a place far, far away, there was a tiny little girl.\nThe girl's parents were busy adventurers. She spent most of her childhood in the library, traversing the countless universes that were contained in the pages of the library books.\nShe became the ruler of the Immernachtreich, summoned Thundering Retribution as a royal princess, and formed a soul bond with a Raven...\n...\n"███, what books did you read today?" Her parents asked her on one of the rare occasions that they were home between adventures.\nShe proceeded to tell them the story she had read from her favorite series.\n"...And then he said, Fischl von Luftschloss Narfidort, you are the Prinzessin der Verurteilung, my proud daughter. You shall never surrender your nobility and dreams.'"\n"Oh, that's a lovely story. Since you like it so much, ███, how about I call you "Fischl" too?" Her father smiled, put his hand on her head and repeated the words from the story to her.\n"Fischl, you are my wonderful princess and my proud daughter. You shall never surrender your nobility and dreams."\nThese kind and loving words lit up her world.\nHowever, the time with her busy parents was always fleeting.\nUnable to fit in with her peers due to her obsession with fantasy novels, she often felt lonely and sad. At these times, she would remind herself:\n"I am Fischl, my daddy's wonderful princess. It's true, because Mommy and Daddy said so..."\n"Never will I surrender my nobility and dreams, for they are... a princess' rite of passage." ｜ 有这么一个故事。很久很久以前，在很远很远的地方，有一个很小很小的小女孩。\n小女孩的爸爸妈妈都是忙碌的冒险家。她自幼在图书馆中，跟随书页跨越了一千个宇宙，\n成了幽夜净土的主人，成了降下圣裁之雷的皇族之女，与漆黑的夜鸦成为共享命运的至交…\n……\n「██，今天看了什么书呢？」难得从冒险中返回的爸爸妈妈，这么问她。\n然后，她会告诉他们，从自己喜欢的系列小说中读到的故事：\n「…于是他说：菲谢尔·冯·露弗施洛斯·那菲多特，你可是断罪的皇女，是我引以为豪的女儿，无论如何也不能放弃崇高与梦想。」\n「哦哦，是很好的故事呢。既然██这么喜欢，就叫你『小菲谢尔』吧。」爸爸笑着摸摸她的头，\n「小菲谢尔你可是了不得的皇女，是我引以为豪的女儿。无论如何，也不要放弃崇高与梦想喔。」\n温柔的话语充满善意与嘉许，点亮了她的心。\n但与忙碌父母相伴的温暖时间总是如此短暂。\n因沉醉幻想小说而与周遭格格不入的她，每当孤独，每当痛苦，总会告诉自己：\n「我是菲谢尔，是了不得的皇女。这是连爸爸妈妈也认可的…」\n「无论如何都不能放弃崇高与梦想…因为这些都是，对皇女的考验。」

- In each "Second Blooming" event challenge, Travelers must form 3 teams and engage in three consecutive rounds of combat. They must defeat all opponents in the allotted time and can earn bonus points from the time they have left. You will earn different levels of insignias based on the score you obtain. ｜ 「蔷薇再开时」活动挑战中，旅行者需要编成3支队伍，连续进行3轮战斗。在限制时间内击败全部敌人，可以在结束时依据通关时的剩余时间获得额外积分，并根据获取的分数获得不同级别的纹章。

- This one sprung up out of nowhere recently in Ritou. Their approach is high volume, small profit margins. The quality's not too bad, but there's always a few duds, so you'd need to inspect the goods thoroughly upon receipt. ｜ 这一家是离岛最近崛起的商人，走薄利多销的路子，质量尚可但略有瑕疵，验货时要谨慎。
- The Maison Gardiennage has paid me a considerable commission for this. Since traveling expenses are all I need, I'll leave the rest to you two as a token of my gratitude! ｜ 执律庭为此向我支付了一笔不错的报酬，我只留盘缠，其余的全都转赠你们两位，以表谢意！

- At first, I didn't dare to open my mouth. But once I couldn't hold my breath any longer, I decided to take a big breath in. Hehe, turns out the water wasn't as salty as I imagined... It didn't really taste like anything at all! ｜ 一开始我还是不敢张口，等到实在憋不住了才下定决心大吸一口。哈哈，结果没什么味道！一点也不像想象中的咸！
- It would be horrible if the Fatui were behind all of this! ｜ 如果说这件事背后是愚人众在搞鬼，那就太可恨了！
- My, you really are skilled. I was so engrossed in the game! I bet our patients would really be able to put their troubles behind them with your help! ｜ 真是高超的牌技，让我完全沉浸在牌局里了！如果你和我的病人一起玩牌，应该能让他们忘掉烦恼！
- Indeed. Sango once told me that everything had pointed perfectly to the "culprit" back then. Too perfectly, in fact. ｜ 是的。社长说，当年她找到那个「犯人」时，一切都…太完美了。
- Report back to Hosseini and Yingzhu ｜ 向胡塞尼和盈珠回报
- Oh, hello, what do you want? Are you here for a face reading, too? ｜ 你来找我做什么，莫非…你也是来找我看相的？
- Head to the location of the intelligence test ｜ 前往智能实验的地点
- At least we got to know how she really feels. ｜ 至少听到了她的真实想法。
- Mercenary's Aged Notes (II) ｜ 古旧的佣兵笔记·其二
- Warm Greeting ｜ 热情问候
- Collection of Countless Dreams ｜ 百万遐想的合集
- Hey Sara, can we have a Cold Cut Platter to go? ｜ 莎拉小姐，要一份猎鹿人特制冷肉拼盘！打包带走！
- Sheer Cold will quickly accumulate in the Subzero Climate, eventually dealing DMG to characters. Perhaps the ruins scattered across Dragonspine are remnants of a civilization destroyed in the bitter cold... ｜ 在极寒的环境下，「严寒」会迅速积累，最终导致伤害。\n或许遍布龙脊雪山的遗迹就是在严寒中灭亡的文明留下的吧…
- Don't sneak into the mountains by yourself. It's dangerous. ｜ 可不能偷偷进山哦，很危险。
- Moo! Moo! ｜ 哞——！哞！
- Sound a tune on the Horn of Heroes. ｜ 吹响英勇号角的曲调。
- Reach the Max Level of the Tree of Dreams in Vanarana. ｜ 将桓那兰那的梦之树等级提升至满级。
- Since then, I've been carrying out experiments to advance alchemical detection equipment as planned, and have worked with the Reconnaissance Company and Outriders on numerous occasions. ｜ 从那之后，我一直按照计划在推进炼金探测设备的实验，也与游击小队、侦察骑士多次配合。
- No matter the outcome, there will be treasure at its end. ｜ 无论结果如何，都会有丰厚的收获。
- You can't say that the victims of the dream really did anything wrong, and what they wanted was also not unreasonable... ｜ 受害者们的行为并不算错，他们想要的东西也不过分…
- "After all, you're the most exceptional student I've ever met." ｜ 「…毕竟你是我见过最出色的学生。」
- Suspicious Jade Fruit Soup ｜ 奇怪的琼玉果汤
- Wangshu Take-Away ｜ 望舒外送
- See you later. Wait no — don't come back in here! ｜ 回见。不是，别来了。
- Klee, I can't help you press it. ｜ #可莉，{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_BROTHER|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SISTERA]}不能帮你按。
- My dad used to play this one for me on his harmonica while we were on the way back from Springvale. ｜ 那还是小时候我老爹带我回清泉镇的路上，他用口琴吹给我听的。
- #{NICKNAME}, why don't we help Henri? ｜ #{NICKNAME}，不如我们就帮帮恩里吧！
- Thank you for your understanding. I will graciously accept your help. ｜ 谢谢你们能理解我，那就有劳了。
- No wonder he's a famous magician. ｜ 不愧是声名远扬的魔术师。
- Oh, that makes sense! So could you tell us how to get to that island? ｜ 哦哦，原来是这样！那可以告诉我们如何前往神秘岛吗？
- After a character deals <color=#f39001>Hydro DMG</color> to opponents enough times, a <color=#f39001>Tidal Shockwave</color> will be unleashed, dealing AoE Hydro DMG ｜ 角色多次对敌人造成<color=#f39001>水元素伤害</color>后，将释放<color=#f39001>浪潮冲击波</color>，造成水元素范围伤害
- I understand Kirya's decision, but I still want to stop him. Master, Sylvain, and Kirya... They all deserve to survive. ｜ 我能理解基里亚，但我更希望能阻止他。我希望老师、席尔万，还有基里亚…都能活下来。
- Chef Mao ｜ 卯师傅
- Earrings made from amber gold that shines with a strange light. ｜ 琥珀金打造的耳饰，其上镶嵌着宝石，闪烁着奇妙的光芒。
- Shopkeeper, Mondstadt General Goods ｜ 「蒙德百货」售货员
- I cannot stand her disrespectful attitude towards Rex Lapis! But he says to me, "Ganyu, this is just the kind of person Liyue needs in this day and age." I guess I'm not smart enough, because I simply do not understand what he means by that. I think I need more life experience to become wise enough to comprehend his words. ｜ 我无法认同她对帝君的态度。但是…但是…「甘雨，这才是璃月现今需要的人。」帝君反而这样说。我还是太愚钝了，要理解帝君话语中的意思，还得更努力地接触更多事务才行吧。
- My brothers and sisters, the time has come to light the fire once again, and let the Turnfire Night shine bright in Huitztlan! ｜ 所有悬木人啊，让我们再次点燃维茨特兰的回火夜吧！
- Have you been to the Sangonomiya Shrine? The huge coral really is something, isn't it? ｜ 有没有去珊瑚宫附近逛过？巨大的珊瑚很壮观吧！
- Huh? But... ｜ 这…
- The Knights of Favonius are the protectors of Mondstadt, the swords and shields of the city.\nIn addition to keeping the city and the surrounding travel routes safe from the threat of wild monsters, the Knights' most important responsibility is maintaining order among Mondstadt's inhabitants.\nMondstadt is the City of Freedom, but unchecked freedom without any kind of rules only invites chaos and anxiety.\nJean's understanding of this is the reason she remains diligent at all times, holding herself to impeccable standards.\nHowever, she often finds that she exhausts her monthly quota of coffee within the first few days of the month as a result. ｜ 西风骑士团是守护蒙德的剑与盾。\n除了清扫荒野的魔物、守护城市与道路安全之外，骑士团最重要的工作是维护蒙德的秩序。\n虽说蒙德是自由之都，但无边际的散漫只会带来混沌与彷徨。\n琴非常明白这一道理，所以才坚持严谨刻苦的作风，以最严苛的要求对待自己。\n——然后一不留神，就在月初消耗完了当月所有的咖啡配额。
- I need a while more to prepare. ｜ 不，还需要准备一下。
- You mean, your gun that's harder to tame than the proudest qucusaur? No, he wanted to build something that allows anyone to fly freely, even if they're not naturally gifted. ｜ 你的那把「枪」可比最高傲的绒翼龙还要难驯服——而他想要的，是让没有天赋的普通人也能自由飞行。
- It is a most mysterious color that most people cannot even detect. I myself had to employ special techniques to confirm its existence. ｜ 这种「色彩」十分神奇，甚至就连我也必须依靠特殊的手段才能确认它的存在。
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Shatter the Geo Crystal Ward of a Large Geo Slime. ｜ 粉碎一个大型岩史莱姆的岩晶护罩。

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙

- Your reaction tells me you probably encountered my "brothers and sisters" before. ｜ …看你的反应，似乎有些眉目。你应该遇到过我的「兄弟姐妹」吧。
- Haha! What luck that two fine-looking adventurers such as yourselves have run into me, Costentin, here today. It must be fate... ｜ 哈哈！两位仪表不凡的冒险家与我科斯唐坦在此相遇，实属缘分…
- Jean is very serious about the meaning passed down through this game, so I guess I shouldn't take it too lightly. Let's shoot a few Bouquet Balloons down, and then we can go back and make afternoon tea. ｜ 琴很看重这个游戏传承的意义，所以我也不能太敷衍啦，至少也要命中几个缤纷球，才好回去准备下午茶。
- Writing a novel... ｜ 写成小说的话…
- Quite the bummer indeed — though all is not lost. Since you're here, you'll be able to tell me all about it. ｜ 是啊，幸好这趟出行遇见了一斗兄弟，可以听你讲讲那时的盛况。

- How many reports do I still have left to write...? Four... Oh, no, five... ｜ 我还有几篇报告没写来着？嗯…四、不对…五篇…
- "Here lies Piramumon no Mikoto. Oft did he insist that there must be a world beyond our skies, but they were just wild claims." ｜ 「其名比螺梦门命，常言此天之外尚有世界，然皆为妄诞之语而已。」

- Use Elemental Tuning to use more Elemental Skills ｜ 进行元素调和，多使用元素战技
- A balanced combination of seafood. The crab, mint, and Calla Lily come together perfectly to dance on your tongue. It reminds you of playing barefoot by the lake in summer. ｜ 营养均衡的海鲜羹。蟹肉的鲜美在舌尖跃然绽放，配合上清凉的薄荷和嘟嘟莲，仿佛正赤脚在夏天的池边嬉戏。
- Yes. It's very nice. I think I'm starting to understand your reasons for leaving the Akademiya. ｜ 嗯。很好的地方。这一次来，多少能体会到你退学回这里的原因了。
- You're right! Let's take out the Abyss down here all in one go! ｜ 嗯，就在这里把入侵的深渊一网打尽！

- Huh? That sounded like Ayaka...! ｜ 嗯？绫华的声音？

- Achieve victory within 5 Rounds ｜ 5回合内胜利
- The Akademiya was originally responsible for the Sabzeruz Festival, but they've failed this responsibility for many years. I need to speak with them... ｜ 花神诞祭原本就是教令院应该举办的，是他们这么多年来没有尽责才对，我要找他们理论…

- Huh, so there's a huge cavern here... Paimon wonders if there's any treasure inside... ｜ 这里怎么会有这么大的洞窟…唔，不知道有没有宝藏…

- Maritime Express, full steam ahead! ｜ 海上列车，出发！
- Curiosity deserves a reward. ｜ 好奇心值得嘉奖哦。
- Hey, did you really have to call Paimon out like that in front of our new friend? ｜ 在新朋友面前这样揭短很失礼欸！
- Absolutely not. I would never allow such clichés in one of my novels. ｜ 没有没有，完全没有，那种俗套剧情绝对不会出现在我的小说里。
- Okay, let's go. ｜ 好，来吧。
- Well, as I was saying, I had never doubted the decisions of Her Excellency, so I think that even if I died, I would die with no regrets, right? ｜ 话说回来，我从未质疑过大御所大人的一切决定，所以我想，即使离去也不会有什么悔恨吧？

- I've only ever seen them in places that are so dangerous you'd have to risk life and limb to get there... ｜ 我只在那些需要赌上性命去挑战的险境里才见过…
- We discovered it just in time, so we should still be able to salvage it. The others are checking now to see if we lost any specific scenes. ｜ 发现得及时，应该没有大碍。其他人在检查有无缺漏。
- A feathered hat accessory worn by the old aristocrats of Mondstadt on hunts. It still stands proudly as if no time has passed. ｜ 旧日蒙德贵族会猎时在帽檐上佩戴的羽饰。如今傲然挺立依旧，不谙时光。
- Once a Relay Ball has been thrown into the fixed area of a Ball Path Converter, it will fire the ball in the <color=#FFE14BFF>direction the Converter is facing</color> after charging for a short time.\nIn this process, the Ball's color will change <color=#FFE14BFF>to that of the Converter</color>. ｜ 当「传接球」被扔进「球路转换器」的固定区域后，会在短暂蓄力后向球路转换器<color=#FFE14BFF>所对的方向</color>重新发射。\n在此过程中，传接球的颜色会变得<color=#FFE14BFF>与球路转换器相同</color>。

- Visions! You mean all the Visions that are collected from the Vision Hunt Decree are put into this statue!? ｜ 神之眼！所以眼狩令收缴来的神之眼，都会砌在这座神像上吗？
- If I didn't have to manage business at home, I'd have wanted to work here. It must be lovely to be surrounded by such beautiful clothes every day. ｜ 要不是家里还有生意要照顾，我简直都想到这里来干活了。每天都被漂亮的衣服包围，感觉肯定不错。

- Just think. We have to have seen something that most "resembles in the sun in color" and that can be found just about anywhere... ｜ 总之，说到「接近太阳色彩的东西」，我们应该见过才对，而且应该是很常见的东西…
- Well then, let's not lose any time. Come, Golden Comet, the internal test build of Fungus Mechanicus is ready for you! ｜ 事不宜迟，就请「黄金流星」来体验一下内部测试版的「灵蕈棋阵」吧！
- I even used the techniques that it taught me... Seems like its warnings were not unfounded. ｜ 这还是借助它的知识走了一些捷径…看来它的谨慎是很有道理的。

- A unique drink. Having featured in the famous light novel "Pretty Please, Kitsune Guuji?", it has since been brought to life by Sailing Breeze in collaboration with Yae Publishing House, along with its fascinating flavor. As this version does not contain any bean products, it is slightly different from the special limited edition that was available during the Irodori Festival, but this also means that there's no risk of triggering any bean allergies. ｜ 别具一格的饮品。在著名小说《拜托了我的狐仙宫司》中登场过的特别饮料，经远航之风与八重堂联合研发，还原了其神奇风味。由于不含豆制品，与容彩祭特别限定款相比，口味略有差别，不过，也就不用担心豆子过敏问题啦。

- "The Knave," Fourth of the Fatui Harbingers. A poised, ruthless diplomat. To the children in the House of the Hearth, she is their feared yet dependable "Father." ｜ 愚人众执行官第四席，「仆人」。沉静冷酷的外交官，「壁炉之家」所有孩子们畏惧又依赖的「父亲」。
- It's really important to me, so your help would mean the world. I'll wait here for your return. ｜ 拜托你们了，帽子对我很重要，我就在这里等你们回来。

- As you can see, following "The Seventh Samurai," I finally came up with a way to secure the necessary resources to shoot another film. ｜ 如您所见，继《第七个武士》之后，我终于想办法筹措到了一部新映影所需的资源。
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 and unlock any Statue of The Seven in Fontaine to participate in the "Lost Riches" event.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Shop</color>\nDuring the event, you can obtain "Ancient Iron Coins" when obtaining treasure, and exchange "Ancient Iron Coins" for all kinds of materials. After the event ends, your remaining "Ancient Iron Coins" will disappear.\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\n·Check the treasure map within Ulman's Treasure Book and follow the map to reach the area where the treasure is hidden. Equip the Treasure-Seeking Seelie from your Inventory to be able to summon it while in a treasure area.\n·Help the Treasure-Seeking Seelie absorb energy in various ways in the treasure area to help it restore vitality. For every 3 instances of energy obtained, the Treasure-Seeking Seelie will indicate the whereabouts of treasure once.\n·Dig in a treasure area to find the treasure chest and claim the rewards and "Ancient Iron Coins" within.\n·The "Ancient Iron Coins" within can be exchanged for various kinds of rewards. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并解锁任意枫丹区域的七天神像，可以参与「秘宝迷踪」活动。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动商店】</color>\n在活动期间，寻获宝藏时可获得「古铁钱」，并且可以用「古铁钱」兑换各类物资。活动结束后，「古铁钱」会被回收。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动说明】</color>\n·在乌尔曼的藏宝册中查看藏宝图，并根据藏宝图，前往埋藏了「宝藏」的区域寻找宝物。在背包中装备「寻宝仙灵」，即在藏宝的区域召唤「寻宝仙灵」，帮助寻找宝物。\n·在藏宝区域内以各种方式帮助「寻宝仙灵」汲取能量，使其恢复活力。每当「寻宝仙灵」汲取三次能量后，方可指引一次宝藏的方位。\n·在藏宝点挖掘时，可以挖掘出宝箱，可以获得各类奖励和「古铁钱」。\n·获得的「古铁钱」，可以兑换各类物资。

- Ugh, you've been keeping your true identity a secret from us this whole time! ｜ 真是的，你居然把真正的身份瞒着我们！
- Thank you for your understanding. ｜ 感谢您的谅解。
- *sigh* It's finally time to go. When I hear people say things like "A great man is ready to realize his aspiration anywhere," or "It is better to travel ten thousand miles than to read ten thousand books," I always feel so encouraged and inspired... ｜ 唉，终于还是要走了。虽然平日里我听人家说「大丈夫志在四方」，「读万卷书，行万里路」时，总觉得豪气万丈…
- Phew! That was a tough fight... ｜ 真不容易！呼~
- Home is where your family is. ｜ 亲人团聚的地方才是家。
