- Inazuma Remarkable Chest Reward ｜ 稻妻地区奇馈宝箱奖励
- Hehe. A journalist, huh... Looks like I give people the same impression as a real one, huh? ｜ 嘿嘿，记者，是说我吗…看来我的气势和真正的记者也差不多嘛！
- Huh? ｜ 啊？
- Nonsense! Paimon heard that guy over there talking about taking the Mora— ｜ 不要再狡辩了！我刚才明明听到那边那家伙说，想要独吞摩拉——
- Alright. If there is anything you wish to know, do not hesitate to ask me. ｜ 好吧，有什么想知道的就来问我哦，不用客气！
- Luckily, I'd already stuffed all my home's most valuable things in there. When the waters rose, everyone was so busy with rescue efforts that there wasn't time for anything else. ｜ 还好我提前把家里最贵重的东西都塞进去了。水涨上来时大家都忙着救援，根本没空管别的事情。
- My great work is not for the present, but the future. Still, at this very moment... you are being given the privilege to witness where it all begins! ｜ 我的伟业成就不在现在，而在将来。现在…现在是给你们机会让你们好好见证始末原由！
- A card for the tabletop game, Genius Invokation TCG. It is built tough, and some special printing method has been used for the illustration on the card's face, resulting in a truly exquisite appearance. ｜ 「七圣召唤」桌面游戏的卡牌，质地坚韧，其上作为牌面的插画不知道是用什么特殊的方式印刷，看上去十分精致。
- Oh really? That is unfortunate... But if you can do it once, you can do it again. Keep at it, and you'll pass the trial eventually. ｜ 是吗？还真不凑巧…不过能召来一次，就能有第二次，只要继续坚持，总能通过试炼的。
- Wait a minute, Chikya... You knew that this hot spring would be the final gift, yet you claimed you were searching for an "elixir that can cure all injuries," and that you'd share it with us too! ｜ 啊，不对，奇科娅你明明就知道最终的馈赠是这样的温泉，你还说找秘药，要把「治疗一切创伤的秘药」分给我们呢！
- So... let's part ways for now, and maybe next time it'll be different... ｜ 就这样先分别吧，我们下次再一起…
- It sure beats sleeping out in the open when adventuring. Way better! ｜ 比我在冒险时候露宿的地方，好上太多了！
- Solidified liquid Phlogiston is blocking the water channel... If only we could use magma to burn the icky black mud away... ｜ 固化的液态燃素把水渠堵住了…如果能用岩浆把黑泥烧掉就好了…
- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 4 ｜ 好感等级达到4后开启
- Those you'd find in a museum or Cathedral... Hardly what you'd call 'essentials,' no? ｜ 那种应该放在博物馆或者教堂里的东西，能称得上是日用品吗？
- Unselected ｜ 暂不选择
- Oh... She's a Trainee Forest Ranger who's currently stationed with us. ｜ 哦…哦，她是我们这里的见习巡林员啦。
- Some things are inevitable. It's only a matter of time. ｜ 有什么不愿意面对的，都是迟早的事啊。
- Let Paimon have a look... Oh wow, that really is one strange tree! The way it's shaped like a circle looks almost like a door, right? ｜ 让我看看…哦哦，那边有棵好奇怪的树呢，团成一圈感觉就像是个门一样。
- We flew over, of course! We were among the best flyers around when we were young, you know. How else would we have been able to serve the princess? ｜ 自然是飞过来的，我们年轻的时候，飞行能力可也是数一数二，不然怎么有能力辅佐公主呢？

- Alright then. I need to learn from you. Mr. Delerue says that I'm too stolid, which will make becoming a reviewer in the future hard... ｜ 好吧…我得向您学习才是，德勒吕叔叔也经常说我太古板了，如果未来也想做评论家的话，职业道路会很艰难…
- Uh, Anatole, have you really read his notes before? ｜ 唔，阿纳托尔，你真的看过他的笔记吗？
- Alright, but can we get a quick run-down of the situation first? ｜ 对了对了，我们还不知道现在的具体状况呢。
- Go with Anna to complete her Adventurers' Guild commission ｜ 与安娜一同完成冒险家协会的委托

- Paimon ｜ 派蒙
- Maybe he is aware of that. ｜ 他也许知道。
- If his plan were to take effect, it wouldn't even be a year before he accumulated a massive number of Fungi. I can't imagine what would happen if he was allowed to carry out his plan. ｜ 按他的计划，也许不到一年，就能凑够数量恐怖的蕈兽了。如果放任他行动，不知道局面会变得多严重。
- I'm Ubu, an adventurer and installation artist. Seeing how you guys are making zero sense, I'm guessing you're often up to crazy shenanigans... I won't pursue this matter this time. ｜ 我是冒险家，兼装置艺术家乌布。看到你们胡言乱语的样子，想来平日也是这样行事疯癫…这次的事姑且就先不计较了。

- Nice one! These are just the kind of conches I wanted. Go ahead, pick a treasure chest and open it. ｜ 不错！就是这样的海螺，去挑一个宝箱开吧。
- Allow one to restart it... ｜ 待本仙重启一下…
- Not personally. I heard someone mention her as some weird Treasure Hoarder. ｜ 嗯…也谈不上认识，但我听人提起过，她是一个很奇怪的盗宝团成员。

- #Yes, Paimon's sure! We'll be fine. And even if we do get an uninvited guest in the night, Paimon will be here to take care of {NICKNAME}. ｜ #万一有什么东西跑进来，我也会保护{NICKNAME}的，你就别担心啦哎呀。
- What? Seriously, you're so rude! ｜ 这么不客气！
- Varka? Just the thought of one day going head-to-head with him in combat, the fabled Knight of Boreas himself, titan of the Knights of Favonius... It makes me buzz with excitement. It's a beautiful life we live in this world. ｜ 法尔伽吗？哼，光是想到，有朝一日能和西风骑士团的顶点、传说中的「北风骑士」交手，就兴奋得颤抖。活在这个世界上，真是美妙。
- Complete the Desirous Trial ｜ 通关大愿试炼

- #It's alright, don't let him get to you! We're here now, and we'll help you. Because we care a lot, don't we, {NICKNAME}? ｜ #别生气啦，要不我们来帮忙找吧！听起来也不麻烦，我们心里可是很有爱的，对吧？{NICKNAME}。
- Thank you kindly, Paimon. ｜ 谢谢，派蒙。
- Come on, quit talking tough. Since you left the elemental powder behind, you must've believed that we come to rescue you! ｜ 百代小姐，这种时候你就不要嘴硬了。你既然留下了元素粉末，就是相信我们一定会来救你的呀！
- Of course! If our friends are in trouble, we'll help however we can! ｜ 如果真是这样，不问我们也会去的！

- Unlocks at Friendship Lv. 2 ｜ 好感等级达到2级后解锁
- Adventure Rank insufficient ｜ 未达到所需要的冒险等阶
- A defensive device that can lock on and fire Mist Bubbles at those brave enough to enter its targeting range!\nUse condensed water planks or the terrain to approach and extract the Hydrogranum that allows it to operate! ｜ 会锁定进入其射程范围的勇者，并发射水泡的防御装置，实在可恶！\n利用凝水板、地形等掩体接近它，取出驱动其运作的水种子吧！
- (It looks like an ordinary shrine — there is a distinct lack of any strange elemental traces.) ｜ （看起来很普通的神龛，并没有任何奇特的元素痕迹。）
- It's just that I caught sight of some strange ships when I went out recently. They seemed to be from another land... ｜ 只是前些日子在出海时看到附近有陌生的船只，似乎是从外国来的…

- Mawtiyima ｜ 「无郁夷摩」
- Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 摆设图纸
- Kolu... ｜ 咕噜…
- One of the Harbingers is already in Mondstadt. ｜ 我们「愚人众」在蒙德…可是有「执行官」坐镇的！
- Formalo Ray ｜ 佛玛洛鳐
- (Whoa, Paimon thinks he's drunk! There's no way we can talk with him now. Let's go ask someone else.) ｜ （哇，这人好像喝醉了，根本没办法交流呢。我们还是去问问其他人吧。）
- Talk to Verr Goldet ｜ 与菲尔戈黛特对话
- Please adjust camera angle to face the rocks ｜ 需要将镜头转至正确角度，对准岩石
- A—Alright, I'll do it. Just need you to sign for it. ｜ 好吧，那只需要在契约上签个字就行了。
- I dealt with the monsters. ｜ 我已经把那群怪物全部清理掉了。
- Well, I'm not surprised. ｜ 我怎么一点也不意外呢。
- Do I look like a fool who just believes whatever someone says? I know what you're trying to do! ｜ 我又不是别人说什么就信什么的白痴，你们这点伎俩，我早就识破了！
- Unfortunately, there was an incident while we were transporting the Irminsul Fruit, and it blew up. That's the long and short of it. ｜ 不过，在我们移交过程中出了点意外，「地脉之果」爆炸了，大概就是这么回事。
- Duration|{param5:F1}s ｜ 持续时间|{param5:F1}秒
- Revamping the stage for the festival couldn't have been easy, that's for sure. I bet this year's festival will be one to remember. ｜ 舞台能翻修成这样真是不容易，看来这次花神诞祭应该会办的不错。
- When he went missing a few years back, everyone wondered why Rex Lapis didn't protect him. A good man's life shouldn't have ended that way, they said. ｜ 他当年失踪之后…大家都觉得岩王爷没开眼啊，怎么好人没好报呢。
- Ouroboros ｜ 自噬之蛇
- Capture! ｜ 捕获！
- Those are the kinds of friends you want in life. ｜ 交朋友就要交这样的呢。
- Retrieve the beacon ｜ 回收信标
- Well... You are the great hero of Liyue. Perhaps it might still be a bit of a tall order to ask for huge favors, but I'm sure some people might be willing to make small exceptions for you, yes? ｜ 嗯…您毕竟是璃月的大英雄。先不说七八分啊，哪怕就三分，走到哪人家不都得看着您的面子？
- Are we there yet? ｜ 我们到了？
- Pursuing Wind ｜ 逐花之风
- Cappet ｜ 卡佩
- I'm guessing you're referring to Foltz and the others? Yeah, we're definitely not all like them. ｜ 你们说的应该是福尔茨那些人吧，也不是所有人都像他们一样啦。
- Copying Authorized ｜ 允许被复摹
- Ahem! Alright, now it's Viramdra's turn! ｜ 咳咳！这次轮到维兰德来讲！
- "Sumirezome Sangetsu Kogetsukan" depicts the fierce oni Torachiyo shattering the Shogun's naginata with a single bite, thus gaining the upper hand for a time. As such, masks that are based on him have finely crafted fangs.\nIn the denouement of this tale, the wounded oni fled into the forest, deathly afraid of showing himself even to the cold moonlight. The wind that whispers through the alleys and valleys can be said to resemble his quiet cries of agony, and so there is a poetic seasonal expression for this in Inazuma: "Torachiyo's Wind." ｜ 《菫染山月虎啮鉴》中描绘的鬼人「虎千代」，曾以利齿咬碎将军的薙刀，取得过一时的上风。因此以他为原型制造的面具上往往有精心雕琢的尖牙。\n在其结局中，负伤之兽般遁入林野，连清凉的月光也避之唯恐不及。穿过窄巷与峡谷的风声像是受伤的鬼在低声哀嚎，因此也有「虎千代风」这一季语。
- Tell us what happened and where you are now. We'll come find you immediately. ｜ 你遇到什么事了？你在哪，我们去接你。
- I understand. ｜ 我明白了。
- Score 80 points in a single challenge ｜ 在一次挑战中获取80得分
- Our thief must have jumped from the cliff. Get your wind glider ready. We're going down. ｜ 看来是跳下断崖了。准备好风之翼，我们也下去。
- Max Duration|{param8:F1}s ｜ 最大持续时间|{param8:F1}秒
- Though we are cut off by the Wall of Samiel, this is still a safe place that welcomes those who wish for rest. ｜ 虽然被防沙壁隔绝在外，但仍是可供行人小憩的安全地带。
- Quest temporarily unavailable ｜ 当前任务暂时无法进行
- You call this early...? Do you always work this late, Neuvillette? ｜ 这叫结束得早…那维莱特，你平时工作都要这么晚的吗？
- My power is no match for yours, and I will soon disappear. ｜ 我的所有力量也比不上你们，现在我也已经快要消散了。
- 2-Hit DMG|{param2:F1P} ｜ 二段伤害|{param2:F1P}
- Character and Weapon Enhancement Material ｜ 角色与武器培养素材
- Somewhere in the desert in front of a giant ruin machine, Mahamata Afratu seems to be troubled by something... ｜ 在沙漠某处的巨大遗迹机关前，教令官阿弗拉图似乎在苦恼些什么…
- Quirky Quaking Arena ｜ 「奇逸角技隆隆擂台」
- The appointed time has come. It seems the watch wound up running a little fast over the course of a century. ｜ 约定之时已到，看来钟表百年还是快了些时分。
- Timaeus, will you help us? ｜ 蒂玛乌斯，你会帮我们吗？
- Join the Eremites... ｜ 加入镀金旅团…
- S—Stratagem? No stratagem can be perfected so quickly for a situation this grave. More time is vital... ｜ …妙、妙计？眼、眼前情形与料想的相去甚远，修正计划还需要时间…
- This is Kurosawa, he's a samurai and a member of the Shogun's Army. They issue emergency provisions to the area, and he's the one responsible for distribution. ｜ 这个叫黑泽的武士，是幕府军的人。幕府军在这附近派发救济粮，他就是负责人。
- So if you want, you can try your luck there. ｜ 如果你们愿意的话，倒是可以去那边碰碰运气。
- Did you meet her? Is she still alive? I hope she can forgive me. ｜ 你遇见她了？她还活着…？我希望她能原谅我们。
- If you're tired, go to rest. ｜ 累，就休息…
- It's true that fires don't destroy them, and they stay within our organs and tissues... But they aren't born in an instant, right? ｜ 虽然确实火烧不掉结石，而且一直会藏在人脏腑里。但是它不是一瞬诞生的吧。
- Guest Message ｜ 客人留言
- As you approach the tavern, you find a plainly-dressed woman standing nearby. She appears to be rather troubled about something. ｜ 在城市的酒馆旁，有一位穿着朴素的女士看起来愁眉不展。
- Temporary chef, huh? Wow. No rest for the wicked. ｜ 原来是这样…你还真是个大忙人呢。
- An incredible creature that absorbs the faint energy radiating from jade to stay alive.\nWhen motionless, it is sometimes mistaken for jade by careless adventurers, hence the moniker, "Malachitin."\nAfter arriving in The Realm Within, their desire to locomote has been greatly increased by the high concentration of adeptal energy, and the range across which they roam has increased correspondingly, so they often seem to disappear. Perhaps only a teapot spirit such as Tubby has a hope of tracking their whereabouts. ｜ 会摄取玉石中残留的微弱能量，以此维持存续的奇特生物。\n一动不动时，偶尔会被粗心的冒险者错看成玉珑，因此得名「珉光」。\n来到仙力浓郁的壶中洞天后，这种生物的移动欲望似乎因能量的充裕而得到增强，活动范围也扩大了许多，经常不知所踪。或许，只有身为壶灵的阿圆才有能力准确地掌握它们的踪迹。
- I signed up for the Fishing Association to see, catch, and raise more cutie-pies fishies. ｜ 我为了看到、钓到和养到更多可爱的鱼，才加入了钓鱼协会。
- Every point of Elemental Mastery the Traveler possesses increases the DMG dealt by <color=#FFD780FF>Razorgrass Blade</color> by 0.15% and the DMG dealt by <color=#FFD780FF>Surgent Manifestation</color> by 0.1%. ｜ 旅行者自己的每点元素精通，能使<color=#FFD780FF>草缘剑</color>造成的伤害提升0.15%，<color=#FFD780FF>偃草若化</color>造成的伤害提升0.1%。

- #{LAYOUT_MOBILE#Tap}{LAYOUT_PC#Press}{LAYOUT_PS#Press} Ready and wait for other players. Co-Op challenge will be abandoned automatically if not confirmed in {0} second(s). ｜ 点击准备等待其他玩家，{0}秒内不确认将自动解散挑战
- Let me see... Ah, that's "sojourn," it means to stay for a while. This is a very cute moment, so make sure that comes through in the performance. ｜ 我看看，是「栖」哦，是小鸟停留在树枝上的意思。念的时候神态要可爱一点哦。

- Jailhouse Bread and Butter ｜ 奉行牢狱，茶饭之所
- She knows this road well, but in her weak and helpless state, were she to be attacked along the way, I doubt there will be anything left of her. ｜ 这条路她是熟悉的，不过就凭她现在这副软弱无力的样子，如果在半途遭遇袭击，这次可能真就不复存在了。
- In fact, Qiqi insisted on joining me at the gate tonight. She's determined to help eradicate the fetor. ｜ 嗯，今晚的八门七门大阵，也是七七执意要去。看来她对消除死气一事很执着。

- Protect the target from being destroyed ｜ 守护目标不被击毁
- When everyone's ready, I'll get the dish over to ya. ｜ 等他们都准备好了，我也会把菜交给你们的。
- Defeat all opponents ｜ 打倒所有魔物
- In any case... why did you come to Poisson? ｜ 那么…你为什么会来？
- On festive occasions, one should offer words of blessing. ｜ 佳节应赠吉语。
- The spirit of resistance! ｜ 为反抗高歌！

- Attempted Persuasion ｜ 尝试说服
- Eagle Spear of Justice ｜ 昭理的鸢之枪
- So thanks to you, too, Yelan. ｜ 也谢谢夜兰了。
- A researcher wants to measure the world, but a towering mountain stands in his way... ｜ 一名想要「测量世界」的学者，被一座高峰挡住了去路…
- Yumkasaurs and characters from the Scions of the Canopy can collect these, then hurl them to deal DMG over a wide AoE. ｜ 匿叶龙或「悬木人」成员角色可以收取炸药桶，然后可以将其投掷出去造成大范围伤害。
- Bertram mentioned Rawat's involvement with some pharmaceutical merchants. Do you know if he's registered any pharmaceutical brands? ｜ 那位贝尔特朗提到了拉瓦特接触过制售药品的商贩，他注册过药品相关的品牌吗？
- Is there anything you're not talented at, Lutong? ｜ 路通，你有什么是不擅长的吗？
- Hey, look at that stall! They have so many masks! ｜ 喂，你们看，那边摊子上有好多面具呀！

- ... ｜ ……
- Darn it! This guy is good... Annoyingly good! ｜ 可恶，说起话来一套一套的…好叫人生气！
- I wanna know, too! I had no idea the other guy was an impostor... They looked exactly the same to me. ｜ 我也想问！我、我就没发现那个是假货…看起来完全一样啊。

- ??? ｜ ？？？

- Ah yes, so it seems. I've only just arrived here recently... I've come here alone, so there are still many things I don't quite understand yet. ｜ 啊哈…好像是的，其实我刚来这边不久，而且…总是一个人，很多东西都不懂…

- That was great! Didn't know you had it in you. ｜ 说得好！
- What sort of life did you lead while you were there, seriously? That's... not quite what Paimon was expecting from a renowned artist. ｜ 你在枫丹究竟过着怎样的生活啊…和想象中的知名画家会过的生活很不一样呢。

- No need to worry if we will hurt her. It's like what she said, she's paid me. ｜ 不用担心我会对爱拉尼不利，就如她所说，她已经付过钱了。

- Chat: Situation Report ｜ 闲聊·记录状况
- You rest here first. ｜ 你先在这歇一会吧。
- It has been almost a decade since I left. Although I did make some progress in my career, I also feel more and more guilty... To everyone else, I must be a really unfilial son. ｜ 这一走就是十余年，虽然事业上也算略有成果，但我也越发愧疚…在大家看来，我一定是不孝顺的儿子吧。
- Sacred Simulacrum ｜ 仙像
- You encounter two kids beneath the cliffs outside the Scions of the Canopy tribe. They seem to require some help... ｜ 在悬木人部族外的山崖下偶遇了两位小朋友，他们看起来需要帮助…
- Her Excellency recently announced plans to stimulate the economy and created the caravans, with Todoroki at the helm. ｜ 前一阵子珊瑚宫大人发布了一些关于提振经济的计划，还组建了商队，轰大叔就是商队的负责人。
- Alpha Pose ｜ 叉腰
- Benben has helped us so much! It's part of our group! I don't know about you, but I wouldn't be so cruel as to abandon a companion! ｜ 奔奔一路上帮了我们这么多，早就是我的伙伴了！要抛下伙伴不顾，我可做不到那样冷酷。
- Lavawalker's Epiphany ｜ 渡火者的醒悟
- I have no clue either! Do Dendro Slimes really eat berries... ｜ 我也不知道啊！草史莱姆真的会吃树莓吗…
- Far from the bustling harbor, the Yujing Terrace rises along with Mt. Tianheng. Here, the Qixing and the leaders of many enterprises tirelessly drive Liyue's prosperity and stability. ｜ 远离嚣闹的港口，依着天衡山高高升起。「七星」与诸商会的首脑，在此驱动着璃月驶向无止境的平稳与繁华。

- ...Is it an "ink bottle"? ｜ …是「墨水瓶」吗？
- Talk to Albedo and hear his conclusions ｜ 与阿贝多交谈，获取结论
- Could you tell me about Goldman again? ｜ 你能再说说戈尔德曼吗？
- But there's nothing for it: the resumption of work at The Chasm is good for Liyue as a whole, of that there is no doubt. But the deluge of work will always have to be taken up by an unfortunate few. ｜ 没办法，虽然层岩巨渊的恢复对整个璃月港来说是好事，但是总有一些不幸的人要被工作淹没。
- I also came across a Teardrop Crystal. Can you purify it? ｜ 我这里也有一枚泪滴结晶。你能净化它吗？
- Skill DMG|{param1:F1P} ｜ 技能伤害|{param1:F1P}

- I want to know more about you, Seymour... ｜ 还想了解一些关于西摩尔的事…

### Part 049

- Mualani ｜ 玛拉妮

- Over here! ｜ 看这边。

- Even if an enemy is strong enough to fend me off for today, that doesn't faze me. Sooner or later, they will get their comeuppance. ｜ 即便敌人强大到足以拦住我的去路，对我来说，也不过是多了一个复仇对象而已。
- Sure... Okay... ｜ …嗯…好的…

- When a character scores consecutive hits on an opponent with Normal Attacks within 2s, this character's Physical DMG is increased by 5% for 10s. This effect stacks up to 5 times, and only 1 stack is added at a time regardless of how many enemies are hit in one strike. When 5 stacks have been obtained, further hits on opponents will unleash shockwaves that deal AoE DMG. A shockwave can be created in this manner once every 1s. ｜ 角色的普通攻击在2秒内连续命中敌人时，该角色造成的物理伤害提升5%，持续10秒，至多叠加5层；这些攻击类型同时命中多个敌人时，只能叠加一层。处于5层效果下的角色的攻击命中敌人时，会释放冲击波，造成范围伤害，每1秒至多释放一次冲击波。

- Save your questions, missy. You ain't gonna need answers where you're goin', capiche? ｜ 别打听了，小家伙。很快你们就会永远保持沉默，知道再多也没用。
- However, before I became a Name Engraver, I put a lot of thought into whether I should really get involved in such troublesome work. After all, there were a lot of easier jobs I could have picked. Even being a regular blacksmith is easier than working as a Name Engraver, and I could earn more to boot.\nBut, in the end, I chose this path.\nForging Ancient Names is an important task that someone must undertake, and given I happened to have the right abilities for the job, it became my duty to inherit the craft. It's just like what my father always said — "When every person in Natlan takes up the responsibility they can shoulder, Natlan will stand strong forever." The job is now my duty, and I perform it regardless of my level of personal interest.\n...And on top of that, I was the most skilled among those who studied the craft in the tribe. If I didn't become a Name Engraver, that would mean someone else would have to take it on in my stead. The other students constantly asked me questions and copied my homework. Had it become their job to forge Ancient Names, I'm sure they would constantly come bothering me with questions. So I figured that taking the job myself would be better than dealing with all that trouble... Yeah, it's more convenient for everyone, and saves me from having to worry about other people's work all day. ｜ 但是，在成为「铸名师」之前，我也认真想过，到底要不要沾上这份麻烦。毕竟还有很多轻松的工作供我选择，就算是做一名普通的工匠，也比做「铸名师」轻松多了，而且以我的手艺，赚得也应该更多。\n不过…我最终还是选择了「铸名师」。\n铸造「古名」是一份必须要找人来承担的重任，我正好有与之对应的能力，就有将它接下来的义务。就和我爸经常说的那句话一样：「当每一位纳塔人都担起自己能够担负的责任时，纳塔就能屹立万世。」\n这件事无关我的个人喜恶，只是责任，仅此而已。\n而且，在族内那一批学习铸造「古名」技术的人里，我学得是最好的。如果我不做「铸名师」，肯定就要换其他人，这帮家伙在课上就成天问我问题，抄我作业，要是去铸造「古名」，他们肯定还是要每天过来搅我清净。与其这么麻烦，我还不如直接做「铸名师」，这样对大家都方便，也省得我成天为分外的工作操心。

When not using her weapon to fight, she instead often smashes open rocks in search of precious gems and traces of phlogiston crystals. ｜ 来自峡谷之中的勇士，在琉晶山川巡游的部族守卫者。\n手持球首棒的部族战士，其敲击能让一切坚石化为齑粉。在不进行战斗的时候，她经常用武器敲碎山岩，以寻找宝石和燃素晶块的踪迹。

- #<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Whoa, healthcare is FREE in Sumeru?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Are you feeling unwell, Paimon?\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>No, not right now. Thanks for asking, though.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>Hehe... Eating the street food on every corner has never sounded so tempting!\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Hehe, your stomach is gonna punish you for that!\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>If so, Paimon'll go see a doctor and get treated — it's all for free! It'd be a waste not to take advantage of this, don't you think?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>Maybe... but then again, the treatment would likely include a restricted diet.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>*gasp* Oh no! So no more delicious food, then?\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}: </color>That, plus the doctor would make you take the most bitter-tasting medicine ever.\n<color=#37FFFF>Paimon: </color>O—Okay... Maybe Paimon needs to reconsider this idea... ｜ #<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>哇，须弥居然…还能免费看病吗！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>派蒙有哪里不舒服吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>现在还没有，谢谢你的关心。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>不过我从很久以前开始就一直想试试，一边吃冰棍一边吃火锅了！\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>肯定会吃坏肚子吧！\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>反正看病是免费的嘛，不看病不会觉得哪里亏了吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>嗯…但是换个角度的话，在治病的时候，饮食会被限制哦。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>欸！不能再吃好吃的了吗？\n<color=#37FFFF>{NICKNAME}：</color>还会给派蒙开很苦的药。\n<color=#37FFFF>派蒙：</color>好、好吧！那我再想想…

- DMG dealt by Vaporize and Melt reactions is increased by <color=#f39000>{0}%</color>.\nAfter triggering Vaporize or Melt <color=#f39000>{1}</color> times, you will obtain Afterimaged Might:\nDMG dealt by Vaporize or Melt reactions is increased by <color=#f39000>{2}%</color> and will unleash a shockwave at the position where the reaction was triggered, dealing DMG to nearby opponents. This effect can be triggered once every <color=#f39000>{3}</color>s. 1 Vaporize or Melt reaction will be counted as part of this effect every <color=#f39000>{4}</color>s.\nYou will encounter powerful opponents after obtaining Afterimaged Might. ｜ 蒸发、融化反应的加成系数提高<color=#f39000>{0}%</color>；\n触发<color=#f39000>{1}</color>次蒸发或融化反应后，将获得「残像威能」：\n蒸发、融化反应的加成系数提高<color=#f39000>{2}%</color>，且将在触发反应的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成伤害，该效果每<color=#f39000>{3}</color>秒至多触发1次。每<color=#f39000>{4}</color>秒至多记录1次蒸发、融化反应。\n获得「残像威能」后，将遭遇强敌。

- Material ｜ 素材
- <color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Guidelines</color>\nChugging the "Fayz Potion" in Domains allows your mind to be so extremely sharp that you can observe a fantastic scene where time almost stops amid combat. Make use of it to complete the Akademiya researcher's commissions!\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Eligibility</color>\nReach Adventure Rank 20 and complete the following prerequisite quest: Archon Quest "Song of the Dragon and Freedom."\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>Event Rules</color>\n1. Help Jami with his research during the event to obtain Fayz Potions and unlock the Fayz Experiment Facility.\n2. After entering the Fayz Experiment Facility, you can defeat opponents in combat to obtain Fayz Tinctures that will accumulate up to a certain point where they can be used to enter Time Dilation mode. You can accumulate up to 3 uses of the Fayz Potion at any one time.\n3. After you use the Fayz Potion and enter Time Dilation mode, you can use your Viewfinder to spot your opponents' Weaknesses and use a Supersense Skill. When you have spotted over 8 such Weaknesses, you can unleash a buffed Supersense Skill.\n4. Different opponents will have different numbers of Weaknesses. You will find golden Critical Weaknesses in some opponents. Spotting 1 such Critical Weakness is equal to spotting 2 ordinary Weaknesses. The former allows you to obtain a buffed Supersense Skill more efficiently. If you leave Time Dilation mode without spotting any Weaknesses, you will not expend any Fayz Potions.\n5. Elite opponents will be present during these challenges, and they will constantly summon Attendants to aid them until they are defeated. ｜ <color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动简介】</color>\n只要在秘境中使用名为「溢神剂」的药剂，就能够让思维快速运转，在战斗时看到有如时间停止下来的奇妙景象，以此完成教令院学者的委托吧！\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【参与条件】</color>\n冒险等阶达到20，并完成以下前置任务：魔神任务「巨龙与自由之歌」。\n\n<color=#D3BC8EFF>【活动规则】</color>\n1.活动开始后，帮助贾米进行他的课题研究，得到「溢神剂」，解锁「溢神实证之所」。\n2.进入「溢神实证之所」后，在战斗中击败敌人可以获得溢神剂量。溢神剂量累计到一定值后，即可使用溢神剂进入「时停超感」的状态。溢神剂的可使用次数最多累计3次。\n3.使用溢神剂，进入「时停超感」状态时，可以通过取景框捕捉敌方的「破绽」，并释放「超感技能」，当捕捉的「破绽」数量超过8个时，可以释放增幅后的「超感技能」。\n4.不同敌人身上的「破绽」数量不同，部分敌人身上存在金色的「致命破绽」，捕捉到1个「致命破绽」累计的技能增幅条与捕捉到2个「破绽」相当。如果未捕捉「破绽」直接退出「时停超感」的状态，则不会消耗溢神剂使用次数。\n5.挑战中存在精英敌人，精英敌人被击败前，会不断召唤扈从加入战斗。
- Is this all you need? ｜ 就只要这个？

- Mr. Nabati, I'm now introducing to you, the amazing "Omni-Spice." ｜ 纳巴提先生，现在，我要向你隆重推荐这份神奇的「万能调料」。
- During dinner last night, my grandpa said while he was {0}, he saw a strange creature. It had hands reaching beyond its knees and it panted heavily while moving around. It also had eyes that shone brightly. Maybe he was just too old and getting silly... I was going to tell him to go for a stroll, which might be good for his health, but now that I think about it, what if he gets lost? It's better to have someone watch over him. ｜ 昨晚吃饭的时候，听爷爷说，他{0}的时候，看到一个奇怪的东西，手长过膝，吭哧吭哧地走来走去，还有一只发着金光的眼睛。或许是老糊涂了吧…原本建议他多出去散散步，对健康有好处，现在想来，万一走丢了就糟糕了，还是得有人看着才行。
- For 12s after triggering a Swirl reaction, ATK increases by <color=#99FFFFFF>36%</color>. In addition, when 1/2 or more characters in the party are of a different Elemental Type from the equipping character, the DMG dealt by the equipping character's Charged Attacks is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>30%/72%</color> and Elemental Burst DMG dealt is increased by <color=#99FFFFFF>15%/36%</color>. ｜ 触发扩散反应后的12秒内，攻击力提高<color=#99FFFFFF>36%</color>。此外，队伍中存在至少1/2名与装备者元素类型不同的角色时，装备者重击造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>30%/72%</color>，元素爆发造成的伤害提高<color=#99FFFFFF>15%/36%</color>。
- The last expedition should have helped with their composure, or... should we say that they're growing up? ｜ 毕竟经过了上次的考古，他们的性格应该会变沉稳一些，也就是所谓的长大吧。
- Don't forget to share new stories with me when you come across them! ｜ 以后还有什么故事，记着分享给我啊！
- How long is a thousand years?\nLong enough for the Glaze Lilies that once teemed throughout Dihua Marsh to be wiped out by floodwaters, and long enough for the thriving settlement that sprung up upon Guili Plains to come to ruin in war.\nHow short is a thousand years?\nTo Ganyu, it has felt shorter than the blink of an eye.\nThroughout a passage of time unimaginable to mortals, Ganyu has been working on all manner of things at Yujing Terrace.\nShe recorded the raising and demolishing of every building, and witnessed the rise to prosperity of every industry.\nGanyu's sense of objectivity towards the passage of time comes from the endless reams of data she must trawl through, and from the ever-increasing number of colors she finds that she needs to categorize it all.\nAll this time, her mindset has never changed — she constantly wavers between her human and adeptus halves.\nOn one hand, Ganyu the qilin finds it difficult to comprehend mortal squabbles.\nBut on the other hand, her human blood reminds her always to hold out hope that she might someday be able to fit in. ｜ 千年有多长？\n长到开满荻花洲的琉璃百合，在洪水后绝迹；长到归离原人声鼎沸的集镇，在战后化为断壁残垣。\n千年有多短？\n对甘雨来说，正如白驹过隙间。\n在这凡人难以想象的漫长时光里，甘雨一直端坐玉京台，处理各种事务。\n亲手记录每一座楼阁的落成，亲眼见证每一个产业的繁荣。\n甘雨对于时间流逝的客观感受，来自于白纸上不断庞大的数字，来自于总是需要更多颜色才能区分内容的表格。\n时间几乎没能改变甘雨的心智，她的内心始终在「人」和「仙兽」之间摇摆。\n一方面，身为麒麟的她，难以理解人类世界的诸多纷争。\n而另一方面，人类的血脉却总是提醒她，要对融入社会抱有希望。
- Bruneau's Flower Request ｜ 布吕诺的鲜花需求
- ??? ｜ ？？？
- Yoimiya ｜ 宵宫
- ...Me? Yes, I will. I—I should head back and start writing my paper. ｜ …我？嗯，是的，我…我该回去写论文了。
- ...Uh, I still think you should name this after Xianyu— Master Cloud Retainer or Madame Ping instead... ｜ 要不还是用闲云…留云师父或者萍姥姥的名号冠名吧？

- "Hmm, you've grown so much already. How unexpected." ｜ 「没想到，居然已经这么强了…」

- Well, thank you... Thank you? ｜ 嗯。谢谢…谢谢？

- Traverse the mountains and plains of Sumeru, overcome danger, and seek inspiration.\nChildren will eventually grow up to understand why adults don't like Fungi. ｜ 游历须弥山野，战胜危险，寻找灵感。\n小朋友们终究会长大，明白大人们为什么不喜欢蕈兽。
- An aquatic creature that hunts by firing watery projectiles.\nFrom an evolutionary perspective, it is assumed that Fontemer Aberrants have developed from aquatic creatures due to environmental factors specific to Fontaine. As such, it can be inferred that at some point in the past, Fontaine's original aquatic lifeforms differed little from those native to the other regions of Teyvat. ｜ 通过发射水弹进行狩猎的水生动物。\n从演化的角度而言，原海异种是因为枫丹特殊的环境而产生了变化的水生动物。也因此可以认为在过去的某个时点前，枫丹原始的水生动物与提瓦特其他地区的水生动物并没有多少区别。
- Talk to Shuyun ｜ 与恕筠对话
- Claim Rewards ｜ 领取奖励
- 3 moving Detonation Zones will be present. A Detonation Zone will explode after a character stays in its AoE for 2 seconds, dealing True DMG. ｜ 存在3个会自行移动的爆轰区域。角色在区域中停留2秒后，会受到轰击，承受真实伤害。
- Woohoo! The goal is to find the Temari within the time limit! ｜ 好耶！目标是在限制时间内，找到手鞠哦！
- Whoa! I can... join the team? ｜ 呜哇？我可以参加吗？
- Mmm, not bad... compared to rations, anyway. ｜ 唔，如果当做干粮来看的话…味道还是不错的。
- 4-Hit DMG|{param5:F1P} ｜ 四段伤害|{param5:F1P}
- Such positivity. ｜ 真乐观啊。
- That's right, it's us! We've heard that that toy of yours is super awesome so we'd like to know more about it. ｜ 嘿嘿，是我们哦。我们刚才听说老板你那个玩具超级厉害，想要来了解一下啦。
- A flower meticulously carved from black crystal. It emits a mysterious light at night. ｜ 用黑色晶石精心雕琢而成的花朵，在夜间似乎会散发出神秘的幽光。
- Let the People Rejoice ｜ 万众狂欢

- You're saying that I can finally leave? ｜ 我…可以离开了吗？
- Obtained by cooking ｜ 烹饪获得
- This material indicates that this was indeed the conclusion I came to at the time as well. ｜ 从资料上来看，当时的我确实是这么想的。
- They say he's an outlander who just showed up in Mondstadt one day and was instantly taken on as Chief Alchemist by the Knights of Favonius. He's also Captain of the Investigation Team. ｜ 据说忽然有一天从国外来到蒙德，并迅速被骑士团接纳为「首席炼金术士」，还兼任了调查小队队长。

- The whole city is on the lookout, and there's only one way out. It's the path right in front of you. ｜ 如今已经是全城有眼了，而唯一的出路就在眼前。
- If we have sudden encounters with reefs or whirlpools, I must be able to act swiftly. I can't afford to slacken my watch. ｜ …要是遇到了暗礁、漩涡之类的突发情况就得迅速做出反应，真是一刻也不能松懈。
- You go with Ella Musk to communicate with the hilichurls. Perhaps this might be the start of a new friendship...? ｜ 与艾拉·马斯克一同前去与丘丘人交流，或许是一段新友谊的开始…？

- I accept my defeat. Looks really can be deceiving! Haha! ｜ 我输得心服口服。两位果真是人不可貌相啊，哈哈！
- No, no! Do what you want, but please, don't brand my forehead, please!!! ｜ 不要，不要，只有烙字千万不要…！求求你了！

- Traveler, what a coincidence. We meet again. ｜ 旅行者，真巧，又见到你了。
- This isn't right... ｜ 这样不好。
- It's my fault for having a faulty memory. Sorry I gave you guys a hard time when we were filming. ｜ 也怪我这烂记性，之前在拍摄映影的时候表现那么糟糕，给你们添麻烦了。
- I've had worse. ｜ 区区疼痛而已。
- Arderne ｜ 阿德纳
- Particles condensed by the strength of the original elements. As a basic material, it is widely used in classic alchemy. ｜ 原始元素力量凝成的微粒。作为基础素材，在古典炼金术中获得广泛应用。
- Sheikh Zubayr's Opinion ｜ 谢赫祖拜尔的看法
- But that's exactly what the person in the statue kept emphasizing to themselves, and they wholeheartedly believed in it. ｜ 但是，这就是石像里的人不断向自己强调的念头。而且他们全身心地相信着这个念头。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见
- We are gathered here today to bid farewell to all who lost their lives in this war. ｜ 今日我们齐聚于此，是为了向这场战争中的逝者送行。
- A substance that has accumulated intense Dendro energy. Offer it to the Statue and help reinstate the power it has lost over the years. ｜ 浓烈的草元素能量积聚成的物质。献给草的神像，能弥补它在漫长岁月中散失的力量。
- Hehe, that depends on how much value the customer places on the collectible. I hope you find it useful. ｜ 呵呵，这就取决于藏品在客人眼中的样子了。希望于你有用。

- That is why we are also known as the descendants of Khvarena. ｜ 也正因此我们才被称为灵光的后嗣。
- Would you like to have a chat with me? ｜ 想一起聊聊天吗？
- Sigh... To think that after a thousand years of heritage, the Guhua Clan's head doorkeeper must cheat others to survive... What shall we do, what can be done... ｜ 唉，不想我古华派千年传承，到头来竟落到了门长带头骗吃骗喝的境地…奈何，奈何啊…
- Need to buy a weapon? Or have one custom-built? Repairs are free, just let me know if you come across any prize ore. ｜ 想买兵器还是委托锻造？修东西的话免费，记得帮我留意下有没有好矿石就行。

- And something about it is giving Paimon a really bad feeling... ｜ 而且，不知道为什么，总有种不太好的预感…
- Ahahahahahahaha! ｜ 噗哈哈哈哈哈哈哈哈！

- Why is your comrade slacking off? ｜ 你的同伴为什么在偷懒？
- Ancient Engravings ｜ 古老的碑铭
- No wonder you left Inazuma... ｜ 怪不得你会离开稻妻…
- Hey, check this out! I've never seen flowers like these before... They're so beautiful, but it's kinda unsettling for them to appear like this in the desert. ｜ 快看，是之前没见过的花…好漂亮，但在沙漠里出现…总觉得有点毛骨悚然。
- Complete Tricolor Dango Sweetness on Playful Leisure ｜ 成功通过「三彩团子加方糖」乐玩难度
- Looking to buy some fabric? We have a new batch in — it's a great choice if you're looking to make loungewear... ｜ 今天要买些布料吗？我们这里新进了一批布料，很适合制作各种家居服饰…
- Huh? But... You're Arapacati's older brother, right? ｜ 欸？但是…你是兰帕卡提的哥哥？
- Energy Cost|{param6:I} ｜ 元素能量|{param6:I}
- Due to popular demand from residents and Millelith alike, a special space at the south wharf has been designated for performances by the up-and-coming Xinyan. ｜ 近期因市民与千岩军同侪呼声愈盛，特在南码头划定空旷场地，供新锐乐手辛焱演出使用。

- Score {param2} points ｜ 验证分数达到{param2}
- Oh, my apologies. How may the Feiyun Commerce Guild be of assistance to you, good sirs? ｜ 啊，不好意思，几位老爷来飞云商会有何贵干？
- Eroding Avatar of Lava ｜ 熔岩游像·蚀土者
- You'll be delighted by our hearty meals at affordable prices. ｜ 价格便宜又实惠，佳肴美味又不贵。
- Very few people in the village are into gardening. ｜ 整个村子里，有闲心种花的人很少。
- Alright. Let me tell you a story about something that happened when a couple of interesting people ate at my stall. They didn't look like they were from around these parts. My guess is that they were recent arrivals in Ritou from Snezhnaya...\n<color=#{0}>Special Rule: When Action Phase begins, the active characters on both sides will be affected by Pyro.</color> ｜ 嗯，那我就说说上次来我摊上吃饭的人的事吧，那几个人是生面孔，像是刚来离岛的至冬国人…\n<color=#{0}>【特殊规则】行动阶段开始时，对双方的出战角色附着火元素。</color>
- Equip this to your active <color=#FFD780FF>Candace</color>. ｜ 装备给出战中的<color=#FFD780FF>坎蒂丝</color>
- A fried egg dish. Beat eggs well, season and fry them slowly in a wok, roll up into a fixed shape. Pour in egg liquid again and continue until it has all reached a certain thickness, then get ready to plate up. This is an ordinary yet welcoming Inazuman delicacy. ｜ 煎制而成的蛋料理。将搅拌均匀的蛋液先行调味，倒入锅中小火慢煎，卷至一边定型，再次倒入蛋液继续…重复至一定厚度，便可摆盘作为成品。是稻妻地区平凡而又亲切的美味。
- Event Card ｜ 事件牌
- Mainstream opinion is polarized, with most people supporting one of two candidates. ｜ 现在市面上占据主流的提名…我想想…
- Can't we switch locations? Do we really have to get our Seagrass here... ｜ 我们就不能换个地方采海草吗？为什么一定要在这里…
- Rapid Hexes ｜ 连连咒诀
- This mechanism will constantly spew flames and keep spinning.\nCharacters hit by these flames will lose a fixed amount of Life Points and become affected by the element.\nCan only be placed on the ground and cannot be batch-selected. ｜ 此机关会持续喷射火焰并不断旋转。\n被火焰攻击的角色会被削减一定数量的生命点并受到元素附着。\n只能贴地布设，无法被批量选中。
- Somehow, you managed to open the entrance to the underground ruins. Once you find the core in the Dev's Cavern, the truth about the forest's "disease" will be unveiled... ｜ 误打误撞总算是打开了通往地下遗迹的入口。只要找到迪弗旧窟中的核心，就能弄清森林之「病」的真相…
- Suppressive Roll: Cast of Wisdom ｜ 制敌骰术·智骰法
- #Heh, now that young lady is one enthusiastic volunteer, especially when she heard about your involvement, {NICKNAME}. Solved our personnel problem in one fell swoop... ｜ 呵，那孩子一听你要出任「三川花祭」的代表，可是干劲满满呢，正解了人手之急…
- Shocked ｜ 吃惊
- Purchased from the Shop ｜ 商城中购买获取
- Please, take these for the journey. And you can keep the trophy, too — an old man like me doesn't have any use for it. ｜ 这些您拿着，留着路上用。还有那些战利品，老头子我也用不上，您也留着吧。
- Um... ummm... ｜ 嗯…嗯…
- An ancient greatsword discovered in the Blackcliff Forge. It swings with such an immense force that one feels it could cut straight through reality itself. ｜ 黑岩厂中秘藏的古老大刀。挥舞时，仿佛连空间本身也要被一刀两断。
- ...And even around the Shadow Pin. ｜ 就连「缝影针」那里都有他的传说。
- #{F#She's}{M#He's} the Traveler! You know? The one who even the Qixing will listen to! ｜ #{M#他}{F#她}就是那位…在七星面前都说得上话的旅行者呀！
- Hmm, this could be... ｜ 这个环节啊…
- (The purpose of my journey is to find you. I will keep going, and imagine a better tomorrow with you.) ｜ （我的旅程，是为了寻回你。我会想象着有你存在的明天，一直走下去。）
- Ah... How improper of me. ｜ 啊…失礼了。
- You sure this is nothing serious? ｜ 你真的不要紧吗…？
- Summon Station ahead ｜ 前有锚点
- Mr. Bai ｜ 「白老先生」
- #{F#She}{M#He} is of great importance to the Almighty Shogun. ｜ #{PLAYERAVATAR#SEXPRO[INFO_MALE_PRONOUN_HE|INFO_FEMALE_PRONOUN_SHE]}对将军大人很重要。
- The Art of Horticulture ｜ 栽种之法
- Have you gathered the materials yet? ｜ 材料都已经搜集好了吗？
- When Sayu is in the party, your characters will not startle Crystalflies and certain other animals when getting near them.\nCheck the "Other" sub-category of the "Living Beings / Wildlife" section in the Archive for creatures this skill works on. ｜ 早柚在队伍中时，队伍中自己的角色接近晶蝶等部分生物时，不会惊动它们。\n有效对象可参考图鉴中「生物志 / 野生动物」的「其他」分类。
- A tool to keep track of time in endurance training. It is more accurate and reliable than a regular hourglass. ｜ 进行耐力锻炼时计时的小道具，比沙漏的流转更加稳定。
- DMG Increase|{param2:P} DEF ｜ 伤害值提升|{param2:P}防御力
- Kind, as always. However, our intention doesn't necessarily change the containment device and the type of implement we need. ｜ 您很仁慈。而那关系到拘束装置和处刑器的设计。
- As an Honorary Knight, you should at least be familiar with some of this. ｜ 您是「荣誉骑士」，多少也应该了解一些这方面的知识。
- The method involves obfuscating one of the gates so that evil can't escape. The Lone Butterfly was in charge of the gate that was chosen to be obfuscated, and so she disappeared from the world in the process. ｜ 发动此阵，必须择一门隐去，才可断绝邪恶的出路。幽蝶仙子主持了隐去的那一门，便因此消失于世间。
- Wow, you traveled to all those places together? ｜ 欸，原来你们一起去过这么多地方啊？
- Yeah, blah blah blah, what is it? I'm pretty busy over here, you know! ｜ 又有什么事？先说好，我可是很忙的…
- But based on the experience of dealing with Aranara before... When we find the nursery outside the dream world, we should be able to know what Aranakula is saying. ｜ 不过根据之前和兰那罗打交道的经验…等我们找到了梦境之外的苗圃，应该自然而然就知道兰那库拉在说什么了。
- So you mean to say that there is another person like you? Another traveler from a faraway land? ｜ 你是说还有一个和你很像的人？也是从异乡来的旅行者吗？
- Well, it's not quite the same, but we've seen statues with specific faces carved onto them before, haven't we? ｜ 虽然不太一样，不过我们之前有见过刻画了具体相貌的雕像…
- A wild flower that was once a ubiquitous sight in its homeland. It was picked by a hunter who wore it on their chest. ｜ 曾经遍布某地的野花。离开了大地，被猎人佩在胸前。
- A witness from our tribe claims they saw one of the Qucusaurs that dwell nearby carrying that statue off from the ruins... We're here to find out what the situation is. ｜ 有部族的成员目击，说是供奉在遗迹中的雕像被附近栖居的绒翼龙偷走了…所以我们就过来看看情况。
- Stalwart and True ｜ 崇诚之真

- Character Card ｜ 角色牌
- Indeed. However, even I believed the clues were too vague to be of any help to you. ｜ 没错。可那些线索模糊的程度，连我都觉得对你们有些苛刻了。
- No funny-looking critters with antennae on their heads, no plants full of funky-smelling juice... Even the monsters here are all ones I've seen before. ｜ 没有长着触角的奇怪生物，没有滴着不明汁液的植物…连怪物都是之前见过的。
- Albedo's interest in drawing and painting began back in the days of traveling with his master.\nAt first, he would simply illustrate his notes with basic sketches. But he soon noticed that the process of rendering things in great detail helped him to intimately understand their physical makeup, which was of great utility to his alchemical studies.\nAdditionally, it also allowed him to enter into a pleasant state of clarity, in which he needed only to focus on observation and creating his artwork, and nothing else.\nEventually, Albedo became a master artist without ever having received formal tuition.\nWhen strolling through Mondstadt, he enjoys sketching and painting all manner of living things, but particularly people in moments of joy.\nSometimes, he even gifts his artwork to his unsuspecting models, believing that when a work of art captures a transient moment of enjoyment, it is something worth treasuring.\nAlbedo continued to refine his skills in this manner, going from strength to strength — until one day, when he was taken aback by illustrations from Inazuma.\nHow was it that drawings of such generality could possess such narrative power?\nAmazed, he decided to give it a go himself.\n...Eventually, after collaborating with a certain novelist by the name of Xingqiu, "A Legend of Sword" was printed and published.\nUnfortunately, it received lukewarm reviews, being lambasted as "a dictionary with divine illustrations." ｜ 阿贝多绘画的习惯，是在跟随师父旅行的时代养成的。\n一开始，只是学习笔记的配图。后来他发觉，画出细节有助于理解物体的结构与规律，对于学习炼金术大有裨益。\n而且绘画时，心灵会进入某种澄澈的境界，除去观察与动笔什么都不考虑，十分舒适。\n最终，阿贝多无师自通，成为了绘画高手。\n到蒙德城内闲逛时，阿贝多总会写生。他喜欢记录人们幸福的时刻。\n有时，他还会把画赠送给不知情的「模特」。因为他始终认为，凝固了瞬间欢愉的画面值得珍藏。\n时光飞逝，阿贝多的画技日渐高超。即便如此，初次看到「稻妻插画」时，他仍受到了不小的冲击。\n为什么世上会有如此依靠图像概括，却又带有巨大叙事力量的画作？\n太奇妙了。阿贝多非常想要试一试。\n…后来，在与名为行秋的某位小说作者合作后，《沉秋拾剑录》付梓问世了。\n只可惜这本小说反响平平，被普遍评价为「神插画配字典」。

- "Praise be the Harvisptokhm, extinguisher of the flaming sign searing the sky, and caller of the timely rains that will cleanse the land of its filth. The days that bask in the Khvarena's resplendence are as dawn rising through the murky fog crowning the mountains." ｜ 「赞美万千子种的母树，熄灭几欲焚天的劫火，降下涤荡污秽的甘霖。彼日灵光神耀，有如自灰暗山头初升的旭日。」

- I am Sasaki, a subordinate of the Kanjou Commissioner. I am present in charge of our Lady's security. ｜ 在下佐佐木，是勘定奉行大人的属下，正奉命保护大小姐的安全。
- This censer has a classic design and modest dimensions, thus allowing it to be mounted in various different places. Filling it with spices will just about allow it to burn quietly for an entire work day, which also gives it some time-keeping properties. These censers have patterns upon them that have been painstakingly carved over long periods of time by the craftspeople who made them, which often gives people from abroad the impression that they are highly valuable. In truth, they are made in much the same way as the exquisite cups of Sumeru City — both have made use of Kshahrewar machinery such that neither the true work hours required nor the prices are too unfriendly to the citizenry. Indeed, this is the medium via which spices have found their way into common homes. ｜ 造型经典的香炉，尺寸适中，可被摆放在各种位置。装满熏香材料时，恰能从清晨安静燃烧至一日工作结束的时刻，因此也有着一定的计时功能。这种香炉有着工匠长年累月精雕细琢般的花纹，常给外国客人昂贵的印象。实际上，这种香炉与须弥城内精致的杯盏相同，也用到了妙论派的机关辅助，所需的工时并不夸张，价格也相当亲民，是协助熏香走进普通人家的中坚力量。

- Ah, planting, I see... I mean, you should be able to get something good going either way. ｜ 种植啊…如果环境相似，那应该都能种出好东西吧。
- Oh, yes, her name is "Kumi," right? ｜ 哦，对了，她是叫「久美」，对吧？

- Theoretically, we need crew info and reason for visit for all docking ships. ｜ 理论上所有入港的船只都要登记所有人信息和入港事由等内容。
- A delicious dish with some extra seasoning! It gives off a titillating aroma... But whose tastes will this dish suit? Invite your friends, invite your pals — get them to try this new dish! ｜ 加入了调料的美味料理，散发着诱人的香气。不知道适合谁的喜好呢？快去邀请伙伴们试吃吧！
- A tall arbor with a unique crown that resembles leaping verdant flame.\nIt is said that the Queen of the Summer Festival herself received inspiration upon hearing how the children described this plant, working on light green fireworks. Perhaps it is just a coincidence, but the ore that can be found near this species can be ground down to make verdant flames rocket into the sky. ｜ 高大的乔木，树冠形状别致，如同旋转腾跃而起的苍翠火焰。\n听过孩子们对这种树木的描述后，「夏祭的女王」也受到了启发，开始研发「浅葱色」的烟花。也许是某种巧合吧，在这种树木附近找到的矿石，恰巧能研磨出产生「浅葱色」火光的焰色粉末。

- Just take them out for a spin, and tell me how things went once you're done! ｜ 你们就放心大胆地拿着这些烟花出去玩，玩好了之后，回来告诉我烟花怎么样。
- You must equip Paimon's Kamera and interact with the photo-taking point(s) or character to enter Photo-Taking Mode.\nThe process is split into an adjustment phase where you determine the position from where the photo is taken, and a photo-taking phase in which you can move and use your Skills. ｜ 旅行者需要装备「派蒙的留影机」，与留影点或角色交互后进入留影模式。\n留影分为留影点位调整阶段，和可以移动以及施放技能的留影阶段。
- Did you really have to say that, Paimon? ｜ 喂，说这种话真的可以吗？
- "It's still an amateur piece, but I would like to dedicate this painting to you, my friends. There are a great many more views and vistas that remain to be drawn. If fate will have it, we shall meet again." ｜ 「不成熟的画作，赠与两位朋友。广阔天地还有更多值得一画的风景，我们有缘再会。」
- Ba ｜ 霸哥
- Let me see... Oh right, so it's like this. "Tie the inauspicious slip onto the Fortune Slip Hanger to change ill fortune to good"... ｜ 我看看…是这样的。「把凶签捆到『御签挂』上，就可以逢凶化吉」。
- *sniff* Yeah, you might be right... I was too scared to care about anything else at that time... ｜ 呜呜…应该就是那个时候弄丢的没错…当时因为太害怕了，完全没顾得上这些…
- Mona... wh—what are you, uh... ｜ 莫娜，你、你们这是…
- "Albedo got into Mondstadt because of his master's recommendation letter."\nThis statement is technically true. But Monstadt's gates are open to everyone, and he would have been quite welcome even without the recommendation letter.\nIn fact, Albedo's life in Mondstadt may even have been more comfortable without it.\nThis is because the recipient of the letter was the famed travel writer, Alice, an old friend of Albedo's master, Rhinedottir.\nAfter receiving the letter, Alice considered its requests.\n"So, Rhine said that you'll need a laboratory... And not one of a size that a civilian could build, either. Hmm... I know!"\nAnd just like that, she threw him into the Knights of Favonius.\nThe work of the Knights was actually quite easy for Albedo, requiring only five percent of his energy.\nThe rest of his energy could be spent on experiments, with the Knights' full range of apparatus at his disposal, he thought.\nAnd yet...\nAlice has a daughter, named Klee.\nYes, "that" Klee.\n"We'll be a family from now on, treat her like a real younger sister!"\nFrom that day forth, cleaning up after Klee would come to take up most of Albedo's remaining energy... ｜ 「阿贝多是凭借师父的推荐信才得以在蒙德安身。」\n这句话倒也算是事实。不过蒙德城永远欢迎任何人，有没有推荐信并不重要。\n不如说，要是没有这封推荐信，阿贝多在蒙德城会过得更舒服吧。\n——因为，推荐信的收件人是著名游记作者艾莉丝，阿贝多师父莱茵多特的故交。\n艾莉丝读完推荐信，沉思了好一会儿。\n「莱茵说，要我给你配一个实验室…这可不是民间力量能建起的规模啊。嗯…我想到了！」\n就这样，阿贝多被艾莉丝丢进了西风骑士团。\n骑士团的工作对阿贝多来说较为轻松，只花百分之五的精力，就能把那些事情处理得很好。\n本以为除此之外的精力都可以用于实验，骑士团的实验室及全套器材也能任凭自己折腾。\n然而。\n艾莉丝有个女儿，叫做可莉。\n…没错，就是「那个」可莉。\n「从今往后我们就是一家人了。你就把她当作亲妹妹吧！」\n未来的日子里，为可莉善后一事占据了阿贝多剩余精力的大半。
- Any excuse to go for a drink, huh... ｜ 我看你就是想趁机喝酒而已吧。
- Ah, have you been to Liyue before? ｜ 哎呀，客人你去过璃月？
- Ah, so today is your birthday... "On your ceremonious reckoning of years, I task my kin with seeing to it that that which you seek, you shall surely find, and that that for which your heart longs, you shall surely receive. Remain pure of heart and true of spirit, and their protection shall be bestowed on you." There you go. May all go well in your year ahead, and may all your wishes be fulfilled. Are we done? ｜ 今日是你的生辰啊…\n「凡御岁之祝礼，以徒名之令，遇其其之所求，遂其其之所愿，正心明神，以受萌荫庇佑。」好了，就这样。祝你这一年能够诸事顺遂，得偿所愿吧。

- I've ended up with a less-than-favorable reputation in some people's eyes — I think it's because I can sometimes be a little bit, um... intense in interviews. Now, whenever I show up to interview someone, they're always really wary of me... *sigh* But in my defense, with some people, you really have to put the pressure on or they won't open up... ｜ 也许是因为我有时提问的态度会有些…激烈，导致一部分人对我的印象不太好。我每次去采访的时候，大家都是一副防备我的样子…唉，但对于某些采访对象，我必须得用这种态度来提问啊。

- Simple, honest folks like me... we don't need much to be content. ｜ 我这种老实的人啊，就适合这样的生活。
- The ugly things have gone from normal ugly to seriously ugly... There should be a more suitable location, shouldn't there? ｜ 从普通的丑东西变成碍事的丑东西了…应该有其他更合适的地方吧？
- Are we late? ｜ 我们来晚了吗？

- It's not as bad as you make it out to be, Maymunah. No need to feel so down. ｜ 迈蒙小姐没有自己说的那么糟糕哦，别太悲观了。
- Leave. ｜ 离开。
- Books are meant to be read, but in many households, they often serve another purpose. ｜ 本该拿来阅读的书籍，实际上在许多人家中起着其他作用。

- No, no, definitely not! ｜ 不是不是，绝对不是！

- You're too kind. I'll be continuing with my work then. ｜ 太客气了。那我就继续自己的工作了。

- Hilichurl ｜ 丘丘人
- When I was little, rattan figures used to creep me out... How should I describe it? I mean, a bunch of misshapen black and gray dolls throughout the house... it's the stuff of nightmares for a kid! When grandpa used to send me to study with the head family of our clan, I thought he was possessed. I thought my cousin was teaching me the dark arts! So, one night, I worked up the courage to burn all the figures I could find. Luckily, their purpose was to absorb evil energy, so they were always meant to be destroyed.\nBut, that got me thinking — if rattan figures looked cuter, maybe people wouldn't mistake them for some kind of evil sorcery... ｜ 小时候，家里放的藤人常常让我发怵，该怎么描述好呢…黑黑灰灰的枯草随便一扎，是小孩子看了就会做噩梦的程度！当时我觉得爷爷一定是中邪了，才把我送去跟宗家的姐姐学害人的法术呢！于是半夜壮着胆子，把能找到的藤人统统烧掉了。好在吸收了病气的藤人本来就是要被焚毁的，算是没捅大篓子…\n从那时我就开始思考，如果把藤人做得可爱一些，是不是就不容易被人误解成歪门邪术了呢？
- This is the final stage of the rite. I remind you both that the terms you agreed upon in advance are binding. ｜ 这是本次仪式的最后一环，请记住你们双方开出的条件。
- (...I guess I'm taking this fight!) ｜ （…只能先应战了！）
- But... What do you think we should do? Let's do it your way! ｜ 不然的话，你觉得应该怎么办呢？还是听你的吧！
- #But I'm not bored anymore, because Lisa invented Dodoco's Bomb-Tastic Adventure! {M#Mr.}{F#Miss} Honorary Knight and Paimon, let's play together! ｜ #现在不无聊啦！丽莎姐姐发明了「嘟嘟可轰轰奇遇记」，可莉很期待！想跟荣誉骑士{M#哥哥}{F#姐姐}和小派蒙一起玩！
- Increases all party members' DEF by 261 and healing effects by 8% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色防御力提高261点，治疗效果提升8%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。

- Not only do we crew members get paid very well, but during past Lantern Rites, she's also prepared gifts for our families! ｜ 不止给我们这些船员发放了超优厚的薪水，以前过节的时候，还会给我们的家人准备礼物。

- Hmph, how hasty of you. Be at ease, and let one explain it to you. ｜ 哼，你倒是心急。稍安勿躁，待本仙慢慢为你道来。
- Plain white stone walls with dark gray tiles are a common sight in Chenyu Vale. Because they are unadorned, they are often mistaken for being rough or even temporary external walls. But in reality, the courtyards of Liyue are full of hidden meanings, and their designs abhor everything being visible at a glance. There may be a completely different and fascinating world hidden behind their simplicity. ｜ 墙体素白，瓦片墨灰的石质围墙，是沉玉谷中较为常见的围墙。因其上没有什么装饰，所以它经常被人误解成粗糙甚至随意堆砌的临时外墙。但其实，在璃月的庭院讲究含蓄有致，忌一览无余，看似平实朴素的墙壁之后或许别有洞天。
- Alright, you two go have fun. I've got some important business to handle, and then I'll be right back. ｜ 好啦，那你们两个好好玩哦，我还有更重要的事，忙完了就回来。

- Is there really no way out of here apart from that broken mechanism? ｜ 除了那个坏掉的机关之外，莫非真的没有任何出去的方法了吗？

- Of course. Making a mistake because you're in bad form would suck. ｜ 没问题，要是因为状态不好失误了那可就得不偿失了。

This effect can be triggered up to once every <color=#f39001>{1}</color>s. ｜ 击败敌人时，有<color=#f39001>{0}%</color>的概率在敌人的位置释放元素冲击波，随机造成火/水/雷/冰/草/岩/风元素范围伤害，此效果每<color=#f39001>{1}</color>秒至多触发一次

- Critical Moment\nA short period after using an <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Skill</color> or <color=#FFCC33>Elemental Burst</color>.\nSupersense Skill\nUnleash a shockwave at the character's position, dealing True DMG to nearby opponents and restoring HP to all nearby party members equal to 100% of the character's Max HP. ｜ 「关键时机」\n施放<color=#FFCC33>元素战技</color>或<color=#FFCC33>元素爆发</color>后的短暂时间。\n「超感技能」\n在角色的位置释放冲击波，对附近的敌人造成真实伤害，并为队伍中所有角色恢复生命值，回复量相当于角色生命值上限的100%。
- Dandelion Seeds, eh? That does sound like my Glory alright. ｜ 啊，蒲公英…确实像是葛罗丽会做的事。

- Fortunately, I have acquired relevant experience in Fontaine... But some of the techniques Mr. Ahangar spoke of were just so hard to remember. Ouch... ｜ 还好在枫丹的时候我有过类似的工作经验…但阿汉格尔先生和我说的那些手法，有些我是真记不住，哎哟…
- Please, lend me a hand, Traveler. I'll pay you. ｜ 帮帮忙啦旅行者，我会支付给你报酬的。

- My knowledge can only prevent its condition from deteriorating any further, but Madam Faruzan, you should be able to find a way to repair it. ｜ 以我现有的知识，只能勉强维持它的状况不继续恶化。不过以珐露珊前辈的造诣，应该能找出办法？

- That's alright. None of that matters compared to the dangers that Apep is facing right now. ｜ 没关系，相比危在旦夕的阿佩普，这些都不重要。
- You should be focusing on training more. Train, train, train, that's the only remedy. Honestly, it's all such foolishness... ｜ 平时就应该再多锻炼锻炼啊，唉，真蠢…

- Anyway, thank you... and I know what we should do next — catch that awful scoundrel Jenck! ｜ 总之，谢谢…我知道接下来该做什么了——必须抓住那个可恶的让克！
- It wasn't that detective novel that everyone's been talking about, was it? ｜ 难道是最近风头正盛的推理小说？
- Well, let's go back and tell Quinn what happened. ｜ 没办法，只能快点回去告诉昆恩先生了。

### Part 050

- Any slot ｜ 任意部位
- Zzz... zzz... ｜ 呼…呼…
- It's not just the beautiful scenery, either. I love all this open space! It's so much fun just riding around the place on Turbo Twirly. ｜ 美丽的风景就不说了，室外还有宽敞到可以乘着冲天转转四处闲逛的超大空间！
- Just thinking about it makes me salivate... ｜ 一想起这样的肉，我就情不自禁地颤抖起来…

- The feather of a predatory bird that soars through lightning storms. It was said to have been adopted as an insignia by the legendary hero who pacified thunder and lightning. ｜ 在传说中，挺身平息了雷电的勇武英雄的徽章，是翱翔于狂雷的猛禽之羽。
- Cesar was maligned and hated by all for ten years, but you? Everyone sympathized with your plight. ｜ 十年来每个人都对塞萨尔充满厌恶，却也都对你满怀同情。
- Whoa. You guys are insane... ｜ 哇…听起来你们两边都够疯狂的。

- Talent Level-Up material.\nAdmonition is the branches of the nation of wisdom.\nAdmonition is completed by good deeds. What is done confers real meaning upon what is said. When one's mind, words, and deeds are aligned, their nourishment shall guarantee the fruition of wisdom's tree. ｜ 天赋培养素材。\n「诤言」是智慧之国的枝干。\n诤言终于至善的操行。行为赋予言语真实含义，言、思、行的协同一致，是令智慧之树结出善果的丰厚养分。
- When Ayato approached me about holding the Test of Courage event, it dawned on me that this would be the perfect opportunity to help Chizuru face her problem. ｜ 绫人找我商议开办「试胆大会」的时候，我突然想到这是解开千鹤心结的好办法。

- Aha! That's a clever metaphor. Then I suppose our situation is not quite so dire. ｜ 啊哈，非常巧妙的比喻，那看来我们的处境还不算太糟糕嘛。

- The deceased is one of Lyney's assistants, named Cowell. He was well-trusted by all his colleagues. His job was setting up and inspecting the props, as well as assisting with the show and keeping the crowd engaged. ｜ 死者名为考威尔，是林尼的魔术团的助演之一，生前很受其他团员的信赖。他的工作是布置与检查道具，以及在舞台上配合表演与调动气氛。
- Compared to a nameless grunt like me, the Eleven Harbingers are truly great figures. ｜ 比起我们这些无名小卒，那十一位「执行官」才是有着赫赫威名的大人物。
- Even in that life-and-death moment, the ethereal music seized his full attention, and almost made him forget the fact that he was drowning... ｜ 纵然是在那样的危机之中，仙乐也成功分散了他的注意力，使他几乎忘记自己将被淹死的事…

- Increases all party members' Physical DMG by 55% for 300s. In Co-Op Mode, this effect only applies to your own character(s). ｜ 队伍中所有角色物理伤害提升55%，持续300秒。多人游戏时，仅对自己的角色生效。
- My memories, fragmented for so long... are finally complete. ｜ 一直以来零散破碎的记忆，总算汇聚成型了。
- I should probably have expected that. You are ever advancing in skill, and the limits of my nature prevent me from making a similar breakthrough. ｜ 也罢，你的武技仍在精进，我却因为心性所限再也悟不出更高深的奥义了。
- Wait! Could this little fellow... be the "White High-Intelligence Floating Assistive Unit" from those rumors? ｜ 等等？这个小家伙难道是…那篇奇闻上的「白色高智能浮游助手单元」？
- A master of the sword... ｜ 剑术超群。
- Based on my experience, the monsters are attracted to two things — the presence of living beings and combat. ｜ 哦，就经验来看，深渊的魔物会被有生命的物体，以及正在发生的争斗吸引。
- Radiant Spincrystal 71 ｜ 旋曜玉帛·其七十一

- If people of the past deserved the gods' attention, then so do the people of the future. ｜ 过去的人值得注视，现在与未来的人亦如此。

- Letter paper emanating a faint magical glow, and a finely crafted quill. With this in hand, elegant, ebullient words shall flow across the page of their own accord, writing detailed descriptions of certain objects' locations, and seemingly hinting at the location of treasure...\nAfter using this item, you can detect "Excerpts of Bliss" within a certain AoE inside Simulanka. ｜ 隐隐泛着魔法荧光的信纸，与做工精巧的羽毛笔。手持这支羽毛笔时，就能自动在信纸上写下字体优雅、用词欢快的文字，详细描述某些事物的方位，似乎暗示着宝物的所在地…\n使用后，可以探测到附近一定范围内的「悠乐片段」。

- Finally, it's my turn! Haha! ｜ 好，这下可终于轮到我了！哈哈！

- Alright, that's enough for me. My brain's about to melt down! ｜ 不玩了不玩了，脑筋都绕不过来了！

- Alright then. ｜ 好吧。

- Several clockwork meka are out of control and threatening passersby. Clear the area and defeat all the malfunctioning clockwork meka. ｜ 数个失控的发条机关正在威胁着过往行人。清理这片区域，打倒所有失控的发条机关。
- Ugh, we can't just let them take the ingredients away. Forget the transport, let's get the hilichurls first! ｜ 不、不行，不能让它们就这样把食材拿走。先别管货车了，我们快去打倒那群丘丘人吧！
- Yes, as a matter of fact, there is. Today, we'll be gathering wild Glaze Lilies. ｜ 对，我们今天要找的是野生的琉璃百合。
- I shall meditate in contemplative silence here! May you experience true bliss during this unique battle dance! ｜ 那我就在此冥想，静候佳音了！愿你能享受这独一无二的剑斗之舞！
- Ah, it's a school of martial arts that we created ourselves with Grandpa Shousen's advice. The aim was to develop invincible martial arts using the Temari. ｜ 啊，是我们在涉川爷爷的提点下，自创的流派。目的是用手鞠开发出无敌的武术。

- Ahh, thank you, everyone! I promise to do everything I can to help! ｜ 呜呜，谢谢大家！我会尽全力帮助各位的。
- Our Lady Guuji has instructed us to prepare for the ritual. Let us scatter this dark haze — for a bright future lies ahead! ｜ 宫司大人已经吩咐我们去做好仪式的准备了。冲破黑暗的阴霾，后面就是光明的未来！
- I'm sure many of our clever audience members have already guessed our next magic trick. A swap! ｜ 想必聪明的观众应该已经猜到了——下一个魔术，就是交换！
- A swift, fierce fish with spiny fins whose spiny mouth can pierce the current when it swims at full speed. Its capabilities have earned it the nicknames "The Cutter" and "Hard-To-Get."\nUnlike others of its kind, the lunged stickleback can live in dried, muddy pools for a long time. Other than its gills, it can also breathe through its vestigial scales, which is a feature much more similar to that of amphibians. As such, apart from dealing with uninvited anglers, it also has to deal with an academic vote of no confidence in it still being a stickleback. ｜ 长满刺状鳍的迅猛鱼类，全速游动时矛般尖吻甚至能劈开水流。因此又得名「劈水刺」、「箭难追」等。\n与诸多同类相异，肺棘鱼可以在干涸的泥塘中存活很久，除了鳃部，它们还能用退化了鳞片的皮肤来呼吸，这更符合两栖类的性状，因此除了不请自来的渔师，它们还面临着被棘鱼学科除名的存在性危机。
- Little Tepetlisaur ｜ 小嵴锋龙
- Tell me about the Pilgrimage... ｜ 关于归火圣夜巡礼…
- Well, if you really are in trouble here... ｜ 如果你真的有苦衷的话。

- Oh, so polite! ｜ 哎呀，这位姐姐竟如此客气。
- 5-Hit DMG|{param5:P} ｜ 五段伤害|{param5:P}
- He need not introduce himself, for ordinary folk will never get to know him.\nNor will he need to immerse himself in the sea of humanity, for he has long forsaken any worthless emotion.\nSeveral times now he has risen and fallen, and now he lives only for himself.\n"Wanderer" is how he believes he might be best described — he has no home, no kin, and no destination.\nLike the breeze, he lives in this world, and he walks its length and breadth. ｜ 无需自我介绍，常人不会有机会认识他。\n亦无需步入人海，他自认早已舍弃了无用的情感。\n几度起落，如今他只为自己而活。\n「流浪者」是他用以描述自身立场的最佳词语——没有故乡，没有亲人，没有目的地。\n如清风一般，活在世间，行在世间。
- Agh! I—It's too spicy! W—Water! I need water... ｜ 呜哇！好辣！水、水在哪，我要喝点水…

- Meow. ｜ 喵。

- As for inviting my old fishing buddies... Some of them have settled down with family, while others are busy with work. Either way, we haven't been in touch for a long time. ｜ 至于叫上几个人和我一起钓鱼…我的那些钓鱼伙伴啊，要么成了家，要么在外面奔忙，已经很久不联系喽。

- Anyway, I suppose I'll find out once I open the door. ｜ 不过也好，开门看看就知道了。
- Wasn't the point to use swordplay as a way to transition to calligraphy practice? ｜ 你不是要以剑入书吗？

- A valuable Ornamental Fish that may be kept as a pet in the Pool of Sapphire Grace and Shaded Clarity.\nA fish with unique morphology and Sumeru's cousin to the butterfly fish. This fish has a broad skeleton and a unique curved body. Legend has it that the first fishermen to catch this fish had their rods tilted at the end of the tail fin and found that the two, when combined, resemble a polearm, hence giving rise to the name "Axe Marlin." This name has made much more of an impression than its scientific name, the "Anchor Hook Butterfly," and it is thus colloquially used amongst most people.\nThe jade-colored Axe Marlin prefers to live in areas where aquatic plants flourish, and where its shape easily blends in with the background. Small fish that wander through the grass often bump into their camouflaged bodies and become dazed, but the marlin doesn't feel provoked, and will instead offer shelter to its neighbors. ｜ 珍贵的观赏鱼，可被饲养于「灵沼云池」和「澄波游影」中。\n形貌独特的鱼类，是蝶鱼的须弥远亲。这种鱼类的骨架宽大，身形曲线独具一格。相传最早钓上这种鱼的鱼师将钓竿斜放在尾鳍末端，发现两者结合后形如某种长柄武器，为其取名「斧枪鱼」。相比它的学名「锚钩蝶」，这个名字更为形象，因而在民间广为流传。\n色泽如翡玉的斧枪鱼喜欢在水生植物茂盛的区域活动，身形极易与背景相融，若隐若现。穿行在水草间的小鱼常常撞上它们屏障般的身体，晕头转向，不过翡玉斧枪鱼也不会被激怒，反而会适时为这些邻居提供庇护。
- Combat Buffer ｜ 战斗增益
- Have a safe trip back, enjoy the scenery, and happy Lantern Rite! ｜ 那…二老回去路上慢慢走，多看看风景，也祝你们海灯节快乐呀。

- Teppei... ｜ 哲平…

- Hmm... There is little of interest in this area, and if we were to while away the time through conversation... Our throats would surely grow parched... ｜ 但这四周并无可寻趣之地，要是光这样聊天…又未免会口干舌燥…

- I'm sorry to trouble you during this festive time, Traveler, but we're a little in over our heads at the moment. The number of people requiring medicine from Bubu Pharmacy always peaks during the Lantern Rite period. ｜ 不好意思，过节还要麻烦你，每年海灯节「不卜庐」的患者都会变多，实在是有点忙不过来。

- We didn't waste any time getting here after we defeated those mercenaries. They shouldn't have been able to give any warning of our arrival. ｜ 打败那些佣兵团之后，我们立刻马不停蹄地赶往这里。之所以这么急，就是担心会有人过来通风报信。

- The Tianquan is a big spender and has made several very generous donations to our troupe. I can only return her generosity by delivering my best possible performance. ｜ 天权星出手阔绰，没少资助我们戏社。领了她的情，自然也要回报给她最好的演出。
- And remember, watch my tails for the signal! ｜ 记住哦！看我尾巴行事！

- Here are the Zaytun Peaches you wanted. ｜ 准备好了。
- Right, the Fatui were also affected by the machine. But isn't there anything we can do to bring him back to his senses? ｜ 是哦，愚人众也受到了那个装置的影响，不过到底有什么办法能够让他变得清醒过来呢？
- Aha! I suppose no party is complete without these gentlemen. ｜ 啊…哈！这群绝不会缺席的先生们果然又来了…
- Oh, no worries! But why did you approach a whole group of wild Koholasaurs? And what's this talk about "capturing them"? ｜ 没关系没关系！话说回来，你们为什么要招惹野生的鳍游龙呢？还要活捉…
- A magnificent lamp of the Grand Bazaar. Its petal-like double lampshade is painted soft, butterfly yellow and subdued azure, and its curves are multi-layered and demure. Thanks to its great height, which rivals even grown trees. The gentle light from these lamps can almost illuminate the entire hollow the Grand Bazaar is located in. They bring an elegant and calming feeling to the audience, and also make the dancers in the Zubayr Theater appear lighter and more airy. ｜ 矗立在大巴扎内的华丽灯具，花瓣状的双层灯罩漆成淡蝶黄与浅碧青两种色彩，外廓的弧线错落有致。得益于堪比成年树木的尺寸，这种灯具的柔和光芒几乎能够照亮整个大巴扎所在的树洞，给人以静雅平和的观感，更能将祖拜尔剧场之上的舞者身姿衬映得更为轻盈灵动。
- Ellin, the Wannabe Knight ｜ 艾琳，未来的骑士——
- Let's go buy some when you have the time! ｜ 有空的话，我们一起去采购吧！

- That's a... ｜ 那个是…
- "Being half-hearted won't get you anywhere." ｜ 「得好好看着牌局才行哦。」
- They say that in the past, when the fragile and short-lived mortals had yet to cross over the sea unto these lands, Inazuma was once a land that belonged to the tanuki. They say, too, that human history began as drunken tanuki nonsense... Welcome to Toki Alley, a place where history and wild tales intertwine. ｜ 传说在过去，软弱短寿的凡人尚未渡海而来的时代里，稻妻曾是狸猫的国度。而人类的历史，最初亦是醉酒的狸猫趁兴胡诌出来的…鹮巷，历史与狂言交织之巷。

- But it seems there are ever more secrets. ｜ 但是秘密却越来越多了。

- She is the most renowned of us Lochfolk scouts, and also the strongest. But she fled Fontaine, harboring a longing for the previous Hydro Archon. ｜ 她是我们纯水精灵密探中最为有名，也是最为强大的一位。不过她却怀揣着对上一任水之神的思念，叛逃了枫丹。
- Do you know where she lives? ｜ 你知道她住在哪里吗？
- But she was hanging out with some other Rtawahist students, so we didn't get a chance with speak with her. Are you gonna go and see where she's up to? ｜ 她和一些明论派的学生走在一起，我们就没有上前搭话，你们要不要去那边看看？

- Why won't it fly away like the others? Is it... ｜ 它…它怎么不一起飞走啊？难不成…

- You're always welcome. ｜ 自然欢迎。
- You're a good soul, aren't you? Would you refuse an artist's plaintive plea? ｜ 您是个好心肠的人，应该不会拒绝一位艺术家的请求吧？
- ...Of course, it's possible that it's all just a front, and that they're hiding any unhappiness from me. ｜ …当然，也可能是不想在我面前展现出不开心的样子吧。
- A stone that can be used in Liyue to search for nearby Geoculi.\nThis exquisite stone plate imitates a certain mysterious quality of the Geo Statues of The Seven, causing it to lead people to the location of Geoculi.\nElemental Oculi represent the lost power of the Statues of The Seven — perhaps offering this power back to the statues also has significance for the lands that the gods watch over. ｜ 在璃月使用时，能寻找附近的「散失的岩神瞳」。\n在某种神秘性质上拟似岩之七天神像的精巧石盘，会将人引向岩神瞳所在之处。\n神瞳代表着神像佚失的力量。将其供奉归还的话，对神眷顾着的土地或许也有重要的意义。

- Everyone has strengths and weaknesses. It's only right that we help each other out. ｜ 大伙儿都有自己擅长或不擅长的事情嘛，互相帮助是应该的。
- (Too high! I'm scared!) ｜ 好高！害怕！

- Goodbye, kind soul. ｜ 再见再见，好心人。

- Seems like Zhongli is the only one taking it easy today. Let's go say hi. ｜ #今天遇到的大家都忙忙碌碌的，就钟离这家伙最悠闲，{NICKNAME}，我们快去看看吧。
- Hey, so Paimon's been meaning to ask, what brought you here, Kokomi? ｜ 说起来，之前还没问过，心海为什么会到这里来啊？
- Though it's kind of maddening, Paimon has to admit that sometimes... being able to attack at range really does have a lot of advantages! ｜ 虽然很生气，但不得不承认，有的时候…攻击的距离远的话，确实有很多优势！
- So you're quitting the Fatui for good? ｜ 意思是你要脱离组织了？
- ...Probably would have left your parents with nothing but survivor benefits. ｜ 恐怕是只能留下些抚恤金给你的父母了。
- How rude! Questioning my cooking skills, the audacity! ｜ 真失礼啊，居然会怀疑我的烹饪水平。
- A fragment of a shattered Iridescent Inscription. It is broken beyond repair and can no longer serve its purpose. Though dismissed by many as delusional obsession, some still believe they hold the key to unraveling messages from ancient civilizations. ｜ 破碎镌光铭印的残片，破碎到了这种程度，已没有任何办法可被修复或利用。虽然被许多人说是痴心妄想，但是仍有人认为可以从中解读出古老文明的讯息。
- Echo of an Ancient Chord ｜ 悠古弦音的回响
- Learned from Realm Depot Furnishing Blueprint ｜ 洞天百宝·摆设图纸购买习得
- My logic module concludes that your decision is far from logical, Ms. Mamere. ｜ 根据逻辑模块的演算结果，您的选择极度不合逻辑，玛梅赫小姐。
- Mondstadt Reputation Level Discount ｜ 蒙德声望等级折扣
- Don't overthink it. We're your family, and we'll always help you find a way, no matter what. ｜ 别想太多，我们是你的家人，有什么事我们都会帮你一起想办法。
- Many happy returns! After all the times you've looked out for me, I didn't even remember to get you a gift — whoops! Silly me, I... What's that behind my back? Ah. You saw it then. It's a failed attempt at making a Qingxin flower cake... I wanted it to be perfect, but... Oh, you think it tastes good? Do you really? ｜ 生日快乐。这么久以来受你的关照，但却没有准备礼物，这点实在…藏在手后面的？欸，你看到了啊…是，失败了的清心花凉糕…抱着必须做完美的决心结果…欸，好，好吃的？真…真的吗。
- ...I get it. I will put a search and rescue party together immediately. If she is still in The Chasm, we should be able to find her. ｜ …我明白了，我会即刻组织起一支搜救队。如果她还留在层岩巨渊，我们应该还能找到她。
- Plunge DMG|{param9:F1P} ｜ 下坠期间伤害|{param9:F1P}
- An obsidian fragment with engraved patterns styled like those of the Children of Echoes, which you obtained by chance while exploring. It appears that you could form a full ring using three of them, though what that will achieve, you cannot tell. ｜ 在探索时偶然得到的，刻画有「回声之子」风格纹饰的黑曜石断片。看上去只要有如是三个就能够组成一个完整的环，但不知道有什么作用。
- About the fortune slips at the shrine. ｜ 是关于神社里求签的事。
- Ematol ｜ 艾玛托
- Hmph, look at them. Being all lovey-dovey when I'm right here watching. Young people these days, no sense of shame... ｜ 哼，有我盯着居然还亲热得起来，不知羞耻的年轻人…

- You must be Kachina? ｜ 你就是卡齐娜吧？

- Ask away. ｜ 直接问我就好。

- The temple will take a while more to repair, so I'll remain here for the time being. ｜ 这座庙还得一段时间才能完工，这段时间我会一直待在这里。
- Sorry. This isn't a matter of ability or lack thereof, but a matter of professionalism. We do not accept any complaints on this front. ｜ 抱歉，这不是能力缺陷，是职业道德哦。我们不会为此受理投诉的。
- Charlotte's Stella Fortuna ｜ 夏洛蒂的命星
- Hmm. You speak of the contradiction between the "range advantage granted by alchemical recon gear" and "the significant reduction in current weapon effectiveness at long ranges." ｜ 嗯。是说「炼金侦查设备带来的距离优势」与「现有武器在远距离下的威力会明显衰减」之间的矛盾吧。
- Agh... I lost, just as I thought I would. You make those sailors look like a bunch of amateurs! ｜ 唉…结果我还是输掉了啊，你比那些水手厉害多了！
- Your connection to the Ley Lines looks good... I can sense the Lord of the Night. ｜ 地脉的连通情况…良好，我能感受到夜神的存在。
- Huh? Citlali knows him, too? ｜ 茜特菈莉还认识他啊？
- Dynamic Skin ｜ 影幻牌面
- Eh? Traveler? Um... Traveler, please hold on a moment! ｜ 咦？旅行者…欸！请留步，旅行者！
- For Bosacius, perhaps dying in the heat of a great battle was no tragedy. ｜ 能在极致的战斗中死去，对浮舍而言，未尝不是一件好事。
- Indeed, there should be no enmity between us... if it is Amenoma Yuuya that stands before us. ｜ 如果是「天目优也」，那我们应该没有过节。
- Roar... Roar. ｜ 呜呜，呜。
- ...Hornless oni? ｜ …没角的鬼？
- Ei ｜ 影

- Here for the show? Come on in and take a seat! ｜ 您来捧场啦？来，坐这儿吧，别客气。
- Well, that's this road cleared up! ｜ 啊，这下道路终于通畅了。

- Alright, alright! We'll pay, even if it is a ridiculous price. ｜ 好吧好吧，贵了就贵了，我们买！

- After a while, the crowd begins to disperse, making room for you to see the Matriarch. ｜ 过了一会，围观的人群也渐渐散去，为你们让开了觐见主母的通道。
- Paimon doesn't like being made fun of... ｜ 不准敷衍派蒙哦…
- Thank you for your kindness, but it would be rude to keep our friends waiting. ｜ 好意心领了，不过我可不能让一旁观战的朋友久等啊。
- Serious ｜ 认真
- I understand. But if I do this, you'll have a clear and visible target. ｜ 我明白，但这样一来，你们的目标就更明确了。
- Defeat all the crocodiles ｜ 打倒所有鳄鱼
- But when I looked back at the drivel I'd written, I gave up on the idea. I'm sure other travelers will get that same sense of peace from the natural world as I did, if it's meant to be. ｜ 后来…看看自己的拙作，还是作罢了。若是缘分到了，其他旅人想必也能从天地万灵中收获安宁。
- Inspiration will keep on coming. ｜ 灵感会越来越多的。
- Oh, hello. I'm Ororon from the Masters of the Night-Wind. Want some vegetables?\nOh, don't worry — I'm not trying to sell anything to you or get anything in return. There's no rhyme or reason for it, really. I just like to see what every seed grows up to be, so I end up with a lot of produce. As long as my vegetables wind up in the stomach of someone who enjoys them, that's all that matters. ｜ 你好，我是来自「烟谜主」的欧洛伦。我不是卖菜的，但是可以送你一些。\n别担心，没什么特别的原因，也没有想从你这里换取什么。我只是好奇每颗种子最终会长成什么样，所以越种越多。希望它们都能在中意它们的胃里安度晚年。
- Instructor's Tea Cup ｜ 教官的茶杯
- What...!? Cloud Retainer? Y—You were still listening? ｜ 欸！真君你…你还在偷听？

- Oh, I... I think I get it... ｜ 我、我好像明白了…

- A recently formed ore deposit containing an abundance of crystal. It's the jackpot discovery for anyone looking to strengthen their weapon. ｜ 最近出现的矿簇，能开采出大量水晶。对想要锻炼武器的人来说，是非常难得的好地方吧。
- Herbs? ｜ 找药材？
- Leave this place, O Little Oceanid, and never, ever look back! ｜ 远走高飞吧，永远不要回来，水的女儿啊。
- And speaking of... I heard that it's customary to eat with chopsticks in Liyue... ｜ 听说根据璃月的用餐礼仪，进餐必须要用到「筷子」？
- No, that's impossible... I created Mehrak myself, and I perform regular maintenance every week. There's no way Mehrak would be that heartless... ｜ 不可能啊，梅赫拉克是我造的，才不会这么冷血，怎么说我也每个星期都在用心保养它…
- Paimon waited for you for hours and hours at the city wall, and you never came back! You promised Paimon that you were only taking a quick look! *sniff* ｜ 我在城墙那里等了你好久好久，你一直都不回来！不是约定好看一眼就回来的吗！呜哇…
- I see... Well, if you say so, I guess I'll put this matter aside for now. What a shame... Chances like this don't come by very often, you know. ｜ 这样啊，既然你们这么说了，那我就暂时放弃跟踪采访吧。唉，难得的好机会…
- I must go. ｜ 我马上出发。
- A group of Eremites are wandering through the forest, looking like they are up to no good. Approach them and inquire about their intentions. ｜ 一群镀金旅团成员在森林中徘徊，看似来者不善。需要上前盘问清楚才行。
- Wh—Whatever it is, it was too terrifying for me. Oh, Lord Barbatos, please protect Mondstadt... ｜ 总、总之，实在是太恐怖了，愿巴巴托斯大人的风护佑蒙德…
- Especially since Maloney mentioned that the initial plan was to cast Gillian as the lead... ｜ 之前马洛尼也提到过，原计划是让吉莲来出演「主角」…
- Those who grew alongside sun and wind. ｜ 我们和太阳与风一同成长。

- Who knows, we might just find the researcher we need there! ｜ 说不定，我们真能在那找到一位「学者」呢。
- Goodbye. ｜ 再见。

- Eh? The fragrance of what now? That's the weirdest compliment Paimon's ever heard... ｜ 嗯？什么和什么？这是我听过最奇怪的点评了…
- Otherwise, I think she would have given me a little more guidance, and I could have done a better job. ｜ 若非如此，我想她一定会给我更多的指引，我也能比现在做得更好。
- The sacks of fruits and vegetables are piled in a somewhat haphazard manner, but there is a method to the madness — some fruits and vegetables can accelerate the process of decay when next to one another. Separating them, therefore, is key to keeping them suitable for sale for as long as possible.\nOf course, there would be no need for such trivial concerns if business is good. ｜ 零散堆放的果蔬袋，无序摆放的表象下另有门道——部分果蔬可能互相影响，加速腐烂的过程，适当拉开间距，有助于长期销售。\n当然，要是生意兴隆，每天货品脱销，也就不必为这种小事烦恼了。
- *sigh* I just hope my next assignment isn't as troublesome... ｜ 唉，希望回去之后，别再给我派麻烦活了…
- Retrieve a replica of Shiki Taishou ｜ 回收「式大将」的「拓本」
- Ley Line Monolith: Frontline Fulcrum Destroyed ｜ 「地脉镇石·战线支点」损毁

- Oh, wow, so it was the origin of an ancient name? That's impressive! ｜ 哇哦，是古名的起源吗？这么厉害？
- Don't worry, I didn't take offense. I just wanted to take the opportunity to perhaps change some of the preconceived notions you might have about magicians. ｜ 没事没事，我并不介意，只是想借机改变一下大家对魔术师的固有印象。

- Chasm Seahorse ｜ 海窟骏麟
- ♩~ ｜ ♩~
- No worries, say no more — we'll handle it! ｜ 这样啊，没关系，交给我们吧！
- But don't mind me. If you concern yourself with anything, it should be these low prices! No prices lower than clearance prices. ｜ 您别在意我了，您在意在意这价钱，绝对清仓价。
- Judging from your calm demeanor, you must be one of those "been there, done that" experts who has been just about everywhere, right? ｜ 看你从容不迫的样子，应该是个专家，去过不少知名的景点？
- "He's got quite the temper though, so I'd recommend you keep your distance. He's beaten people just for looking at him twice. That's why he's called the Brute." ｜ 「他可是个暴脾气，我建议你还是避开一点。他曾因为别人多看了他一眼就跟人大打出手，恶霸这个外号就是这么来的。」
- Oh, if we can prove to Inayah's father that the Akademiya's position doesn't hold water, then they won't have a reason to demolish the theater! ｜ 对啊，如果能向阿娜耶的父亲证明，教令院的观点都是不成立的，那就没有能拆除剧场的理由了！

- This wondrous crystal contains a certain rhythm, like something beautiful woven from delicate silk. These items can be found throughout the mainland or from merchants who collect curios. The tune held within this crystal can be revivified in your Serenitea Pot using either "Euphonium Unbound: Winding" or "Euphonium Unbound: Soaring." The tune contained within this Radiant Spincrystal is "Knights of Favonius." ｜ 蕴含着韵律的奇妙结晶，宛如细腻丝绸编织而成的美玉。零星散布在大陆各地，或是寻觅珍奇的商人手中。通过「尘歌壶」中的「千籁至音·飖扬」或「千籁至音·缪绕」，可以还原记录在其中的旋律。当前「旋曜玉帛」中蕴含的旋律为「西风骑士团」。

- In my dreams, there can be anything — anything except people coming and going. But since meeting you, it's gradually started to get more lively here... Maybe you're a guide, adding a human touch to my dreams and leading me out from my cage. Hehe, c'mon, let's go. The journey's only just beginning, and I'd like you to carry on leading the way. ｜ 我的梦中什么都有，唯独缺少来来往往的人。但在与你相遇之后，这里渐渐变得热闹了。或许你在梦中扮演的是「向导」这样的角色，不仅让我的梦变得更有人情味，也带我走出了牢笼。呵呵，走吧，接下来的旅途也请你引路了。

I've marked their location on the map. If you're interested, you can go take a gander. ｜ 不过，我听一个朋友说，附近好像有一个地方蓄积着不少「魔晶矿」，不知道这算不算你所说的「好东西」。我把它们的位置给你标在地图上，有兴趣的话，就过去看看吧。

- A standard ground light of Fontaine that incorporates a metal-glass composite structure and boasts the ability to illuminate a considerable area. These lights are not only used in the Court of Fontaine as supplementary lighting at ground level but are also placed in some outdoor areas, providing emergency light sources for members of the Maison Gardiennage on duty. The casings and glass for outdoor models are reinforced, and they feature ample space for the power source. They are notably weighty, and a clockwork meka is typically required to lift them after the suction cup has been detached from the base. ｜ 标准的枫丹城区地灯，通体应用了金属玻璃复合结构，有着可观的发光面积，不仅被安放在枫丹廷内，作为脚边的补充灯光。采用相同基础设计的地灯也被部署在野外的部分区域，为在外执勤的执律庭的人员提供应急光源。作为区别，野外的型号使用了强度更高的壳体，玻璃，也为灯光所用的能源预留了更大的空间，极为沉重，通常只有发条机关才能在解除底部吸盘的情况下将其提起。
- You pick a painting up from the ground... ｜ 你们从地上捡起了一张画…
- Uh... so, should we ask the fortune-teller about Setaria? ｜ 我们是要问她有关塞塔蕾的信息吗？
- Hey, Razor... So, what are your thoughts? ｜ 雷泽，你考虑得怎么样了？

- The exterior of the flower resembles a strange, stony plant. Only in bloom does it reveal a resplendent, crystal-like core.\nIt is said that not all Skysplit Gemblooms successfully bloom during their flowering period. Sometimes, the very outer shell meant to protect the plant's inner core may be too rigid, causing the plant to miss its chance to ever blossom. The Collective of Plenty's tribespeople often use the Gembloom as a metaphor, suggesting that one must be patient in their pursuit of strength and avoid pushing themselves too hard, too fast. ｜ 花叶的外侧犹如石质的奇特植物，在绽放后，会露出晶石一般的芯。\n据说并非所有的云岩裂叶都能够成功在花期绽放，有时，原本保护着水晶般脆弱内芯的外壳会由于过度坚硬，反而错过了让花叶成功舒展的时机。「沃陆之邦」的部族人经常拿它作譬喻，说明对力量的追求也应循序渐进，切忌过犹不及。
- You've had a run-in with Eula Lawrence before, huh? All I know is that their whole family are about the worst-tempered people you could ever meet. You're better off steering clear of them if you can help it. Ah, now I'm in a Mondstadt mood again... The memories. ｜ 你还遇见过优菈·劳伦斯吗？我只知道，他们家的人脾气烂透了，最好不要有什么来往。啊，跟你聊这些，又想起了很多蒙德的往事…真好。
- Bad! ｜ 锅巴，坏！
- Dropped by Lv. 30+ Semi-Intransient Matrices ｜ 30级以上半永恒统辖矩阵掉落
- Albedo has completed his portrait of Suikou. Have a look at it and have a chat with him in the meantime ｜ 阿贝多成功完成了翠光的画像像，去看看那幅画，顺便和阿贝多聊聊吧。
- I can see that... Hmm, maybe I should try to learn some magic. If I could make things disappear, cleaning my room would be a cinch! ｜ 有道理…欸，我要不要学一下呢？能把东西变不见的话，我就不用费力气打扫房间了。
- (Is it because I didn't sleep well last night that I feel sleepy all of a sudden? Or is it because I'm too full...?) ｜ （突然这么困，是我昨晚没睡好吗？还是吃得太饱的关系呢…？）
- Wow, we've really done a great job cleaning up this time. ｜ 唔，这一趟进来，可算是把婆婆的壶好好清理了一遍呢。
- Huh? You're just gonna leave? Why? You could come with us, y'know. ｜ 欸，你怎么又要走了，明明跟我们一起也可以呀？
- Yes! I've been looking for you all over! The folks at Zubayr Theater had some questions about the program for the Sabzeruz Festival. ｜ 嗯！找了您好久呢。关于花神诞祭上要表演的节目，祖拜尔剧场的大家有些问题想要问您。
